title: 剛到工廠啊偉打電話來聯絡
body:
<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站通話)>>
Уэйн Чжэн(c): Hi! Jason? Are you at the farm yet?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> I'm here.
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): Good.
-> How did you know?
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): I thought it's about time.
<<#EndSimple>>
//if沒錄取篩選組但有錄取操作組
<<#If($UpShelfWrongCount<4&&$SelectGroupScore<0)>>
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): Go to the contract rooms. Justin Wu will be there waiting for you.
    <<#GoTo(@阿緯不解釋幹嘛去簽約室)>>
<<#EndIf>>
Уэйн Чжэн(c): Come find me in the contract room. The one we had field practice in.
<<@阿緯不解釋幹嘛去簽約室>>
Уэйн Чжэн(c): Don't forget to put on your uniform!
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> What's happening?
-> Is it urgent?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн(c): That's it. See you there.
Внутренний голос: He hung up... ; <<CloseCommunicator()>>
Внутренний голос: What's this about? Time to announce that I failed the interview? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_便服3_側站通話返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 換完衣服司徒來了
body:
//在廁所裡換衣服的時候
<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話)>>
Нин Ситу(c): Jason Dai. Do you copy?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Ms. Situ?
    Нин Ситу(c): Yes.
-> I copy.
    Нин Ситу(c): Good.
<<#EndSimple>>
Нин Ситу(c): Comms are good.
<<#Simple(6)>>
-> Are you done with the job?
    Нин Ситу(c): Yes.
    23(c): Yes my ass! There's a whole report to write, and didn't you want to—
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Нин Ситу(c): We are back at the safehouse. Lawrence is on his way.
Нин Ситу(c): Report your status.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> The Screening lead wants to see me.
-> I just changed into my uniform.
    Нин Ситу(c): Roger.
<<#EndSimple>>
Нин Ситу(c): Today is your big day, isn't it? They're gonna decide whether you should go to Screening or Ops.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Yes.
    Нин Ситу(c): Roger.
-> How did you know?
    Нин Ситу(c): Frances told me.
<<#EndSimple>>
Нин Ситу(c): Hmm...
Нин Ситу(c): Based on the result, we may have to make adjustments to our plan.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Do I need to pick a division over the other?
    Нин Ситу(c): No. Both sides have pros and cons.
    Нин Ситу(c): And you will remain an employee there after the investigation. Choose whatever you see fit.
-> Roger that.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Нин Ситу(c): More work coming in. Excuse me for a while.
Нин Ситу(c): 23 will remain online for comms support.
23(c): I'll mute myself on restroom breaks. If I don't answer, you know what's happening. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
-> What about my restroom breaks?
    23(c): Haha! I'll mute you. Chill.
    Внутренний голос: Hmm...
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Нин Ситу(c): Lawrence will join you over the comms when he arrives. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭返回)>>
Нин Ситу(c): Start the job once Lawrence is in position.
Нин Ситу(c): Situ out.
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 簽約室定操作還篩選
body: //先判斷 //俊恩:錄取、不錄取 //$UpShelfWrongCount<4 = 錄取 //$UpShelfWrongCount>3 = 不錄取 //阿偉:主角表現好可以錄取、還可以、不好 //$SelectGroupScore>-1 = 錄取 //$SelectGroupScore<0 = 不錄取 //if阿緯錄取+俊恩錄取 <<#If($UpShelfWrongCount<4&&$SelectGroupScore>-1)>> Внутренний голос: The atmosphere in this room is suffocating... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I guess you know what we're about to announce. ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I'm fired? Уэйн Чжэн: No way! What made you think that!? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> The vibes are kinda...ominous. Уэйн Чжэн: I see... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: You're not fired. Rest assured. It's something else. ; <> -> I was joking. Уэйн Чжэн: Joking about your own career? Haha... -> What else could it be? <<#EndSimple>> -> Time to decide my division? Уэйн Чжэн: Yes. ; <> -> I have no idea. <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: We're about to decide which division you should go to, Screening or Ops. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Or rather, you are about to decide. Джастин Ву: Yes. ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: After two hectic days, you have finally finished your field practice. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Before anything, though, let us explain the current situation of the farm. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: First of all, Ms. Yeh will be absent for a while. Because of…reasons. ; <> Внутренний голос: She's absent for good, I reckon... Внутренний голос: I wonder how much they know about what happened to her...? Уэйн Чжэн: With the manager absent, according to company policies, each division shall manage itself. Джастин Ву: The lead of Ops, however, will be absent for a while, too. I am the acting lead. ; <> Внутренний голос: What happened to the Ops lead? Внутренний голос: Ah, right, Mr. Hsu knocked their asshole lead into next week. Уэйн Чжэн: As a result, Justin and I have the power to decide whether or not to hire you. ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: We both decided to hire you, which makes the situation awkward. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: After negotiation, we agreed that it should be up to you. Уэйн Чжэн: Think about it. Which division would you like to go? ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Do I have to decide, here and now? Уэйн Чжэн: I'm afraid so. Unless you prefer Silencio to make the decision. -> I see. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Oh, right, folks at Screening want me to tell you welcome aboard. Джастин Ву: ...I thought we agreed not to play the friends card? ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I'm just passing a message for my colleagues. ; <> Джастин Ву: Good. I have a bit to add, myself. Джастин Ву: Our paycheck is about twice as much as what you get at Screening. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Not the salary card, man... Джастин Ву: He has the right to know. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I don't think judging a job solely by its salary is a good idea. A positive, friendly atmosphere is a big plus. ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Working constantly under pressure and risk is not good for your mental health. Джастин Ву: Says the division that caused that risk... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Huh? What are you blaming us for? ; <> <<#Simple(3)>> -> Calm down, you guys. Джастин Ву: I am calm. Уэйн Чжэн: Calm my ass! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Screening is at the forefront of our business. We try hard to broker deals with contributors! ; <> Джастин Ву: You call that the forefront? ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: What about us then? Who rack juicers up? Who take the fall when shit happens? Уэйн Чжэн: Shit wouldn't happen if only you listened to us! ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Who are you to talk about listening? ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: We said a million times. We can't adjust generation power case by case! Джастин Ву: What did you do? You kept sending unqualified juicers down! ; <> Джастин Ву: How could you ask us to listen when you don't listen? Уэйн Чжэн: We listen to reason, not command without real explanation. ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: We tried to explain things to you, to find a middle ground... Уэйн Чжэн: Every time we ask questions, you slap a stack of tech documents in our face. ; <> Джастин Ву: We don't have the time to read it to you. Can't you just trust professional judgments? ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I can't, if "professional" means snobby attitude. Джастин Ву: Damn... ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Whatever you say. Jason worked with us. Джастин Ву: He knows what it's like at Ops. Уэйн Чжэн: And he knows better than you do how hard we have been trying. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Let him make the decision. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: That was the plan in the first place. ; <> Джастин Ву: Which side do you choose, Jason? ; <> Внутренний голос: Heck, they're both grilling me with burning stares... <<#Simple(99999)>> -> May I ask questions? Уэйн Чжэн: Ask away. Джастин Ву: Hold on. ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: What? ; <> Джастин Ву: Let's make this clear. When one of us is answering his questions, the other must shut the hell up. Уэйн Чжэн: Agreed. What are your questions? ; <> ; <> ; <> <<@問兩邊一些問題來決定去哪組>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Does Screening really pay less?($SelectGroupPoorSalaryTrue) <> <> Уэйн Чжэн: Yes, although... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: It's just the base salary. We have bonuses to somewhat level the playing field. Джастин Ву: Tsk. ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: What? ; <> Джастин Ву: I said nothing. "Tsk" is not a word. Уэйн Чжэн: Whatever it is, say it already. I'm not like you. I listen. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Don't you get it? ; <> Джастин Ву: They get bonuses for signing more people. That's why we have so many unqualified juicers down there. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I told you. We don't have incentives for that... ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> I believe Wayne and Screening are only trying to help more people. Уэйн Чжэн: See? Внутренний голос: Justin doesn't want to respond... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Anything else you'd like to ask? ; <> ; <> ; <> <<#GoTo(@問兩邊一些問題來決定去哪組)>> -> Is Ops really working towards farm closure?($ControlGroupShutDownFabTrue) <> <> Джастин Ву: We are. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: ... Внутренний голос: But looks like he doesn't want to offer any explanation...? ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> Won't I lose my job? Джастин Ву: You will, but not in the immediate future. Джастин Ву: Even if the board decides to shut down Silencio right now, it takes 5 to 8 years to close the deal. Джастин Ву: You have plenty of time to learn skills that will easily get you a job in other Vision farms. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#GoTo(@問兩邊一些問題來決定去哪組)>> -> I'm done with questions.($FinishAskSAndCQuestion) Уэйн Чжэн: Which side do you choose? Внутренний голос: Gah, that grill-you-with-stare treatment again... <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Ops. <<#GoTo(@玩家確定選操作組)>> -> Screening. <<#GoTo(@玩家確定選篩選組)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> -> Ops. ; <> <<@玩家確定選操作組>> Джастин Ву: I see. Уэйн Чжэн: Are you sure? After you've seen how terrible things are? ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I'm sure. Уэйн Чжэн: Okay. -> All the more reason for me to change it. Уэйн Чжэн: Um... -> Well, they pay better. Уэйн Чжэн: But... Уэйн Чжэн: Okay, it's a legit reason. <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: As long as you've thought it over. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: That's it, then. I'll leave the rest to Justin. Уэйн Чжэн: And, there's something you should know. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I've decided to make some changes while I have the power? Джастин Ву: What changes? Уэйн Чжэн: From today on, the Screening office is permanently open house. People from Logistics and Ops could come any time. No paperwork needed. ; <> Джастин Ву: You don't have this power. Even Ms. Yeh doesn't. It's up to HQ— ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: That is not true. Уэйн Чжэн: I spent years lobbying for more transparency. HQ gave us the green light long ago. ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Only Ms. Yeh didn't allow it, saying some directors of the board might be unhappy. I don't care about them. Джастин Ву: You... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Justin, I'm doing what we always wanted to do, facilitating communication across divisions. Уэйн Чжэн: I never gave up trying. You? ; <> Джастин Ву: ... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: When I say welcome aboard, I mean it, Jason. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: The fact that you're joining Ops doesn't change a thing. You're still a friend. Come visit us. Уэйн Чжэн: See you guys around. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Bye. // -> Thank you, Wayne. Уэйн Чжэн: Hey, I'm doing this for the greater good, not just you. Haha! ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //鄭緯離開簽約室 <> Джастин Ву: First of all, welcome aboard. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: But we're not sure when you can start yet. Внутренний голос: I guess he won't explain why if I don't ask... <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why's that? Джастин Ву: Ms. Yeh's suspected espionage threw everything off track. Джастин Ву: HQ told us to suspend certain operations before the investigation is closed. Джастин Ву: Hiring is one of them. <<#Simple(6)>> -> I see. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: ... Джастин Ву: You're not surprised? About Ms. Yeh? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I always thought she's fishy. Джастин Ву: Really? Then you're much better at reading people than I am... -> I was sort of involved, so... Джастин Ву: Huh? What? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Never mind. Джастин Ву: It's OK. I won't force you. -> She asked me to cover up for her. Джастин Ву: She must be pretty desperate... <<#EndSimple>> -> I thought it's common in big corporations? Джастин Ву: Huh. No, not as common as you may think. <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: I still have trouble facing that fact... ; <> Джастин Ву: And Wayne just said she was against cross-division transparency... Внутренний голос: He looks confused. And a bit angry, too...? Джастин Ву: *Sigh* Джастин Ву: She must have her reasons, I guess. ; <> -> I understand. Джастин Ву: Good. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: We may restore operations next Monday. Your new job starts by then. ; <> Джастин Ву: Before that, feel free to walk around the farm. I advise you to do so. Джастин Ву: Get to know what's what. Maybe help people with errands, too. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Sounds good. -> Errands, like? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: Oh, wait, no... ; <> Джастин Ву: The entire Cellar is now under maintenance. There's no one at the Ops office. Джастин Ву: ... Джастин Ву: Anyway, you have the security clearance to walk around, but the job won't start until next week. ; <> Джастин Ву: Maybe you can spend some time with Screening, too. Внутренний голос: He really hates the mere idea of Screening. <<#Simple(8)>> -> It's a shame, you and Wayne. Джастин Ву: Yeah... ; <> Джастин Ву: He used to trust me unconditionally. These days whatever I say, he just asks for evidence. Джастин Ву: Asking for evidence is not the worst. It's that— ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> It's that he stopped trusting you. Джастин Ву: Exactly. Джастин Ву: You're awfully perceptive. //if之前俊恩等電梯有猜到鄭緯心情 <<#If($GuessAWeiReactionAtTheTime=true)>> Джастин Ву: You read Wayne correctly last night, too. <<#EndIf>> -> It's that he couldn't adapt and learn. Джастин Ву: No, I think he could. It's just that... Джастин Ву: He simply needs me to convince him. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: ... Джастин Ву: I just don't know what he's thinking... -> He just refuses to listen, right? I mean Wayne. Джастин Ву: Yeah... Джастин Ву: Won't listen, no matter what. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: OK, I'm running out of time. ; <> Джастин Ву: I'll get in touch with you next week. Again, welcome aboard! Джастин Ву: Sorry to put you under so much stress. ; <> Джастин Ву: ... Джастин Ву: See you next week. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //吳郡恩離開辦公室 <> Внутренний голос: Ops, huh... <> <<#End>> -> Screening. ; <> <<@玩家確定選篩選組>> Уэйн Чжэн: Yes! Джастин Ву: That is a good decision. ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> Sorry, Justin. Джастин Ву: Nothing to be sorry for. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: I said I'm with you, whatever you decide. ; <> Джастин Ву: I know that Ops is a terrible place. Sparing you of it is actually a relief. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why? Джастин Ву: Knowingly leading someone to a terrible place? I'd feel guilty about it. Уэйн Чжэн: ... -> Good to know. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: That's it. ; <> Джастин Ву: See you guys around. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //俊恩離開簽約室 <> Уэйн Чжэн: You made a wise decision, Jason. ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> I think so, too. Уэйн Чжэн: Great! -> Probably. Уэйн Чжэн: It is! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: And one more thing that you should know. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: We're not sure when you can start yet. Внутренний голос: ...What? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why's that? Уэйн Чжэн: Ms. Yeh's suspected espionage threw everything off track. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: HQ told us to suspend certain operations before the investigation is closed. Уэйн Чжэн: Hiring is one of them. ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> I see. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: ... //if有跟阿緯猜過阿姨竊取機密(有說只是猜可能是這樣，也可能選直接說阿宜有找自己幫忙) <<#If($ToldAWeiYehAskMCForHelp=1)>> Уэйн Чжэн: Say, you guessed it right yesterday? <<#Simple(8)>> -> Guessed what right? I did say that. -> Yes. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if有跟阿緯猜過阿姨竊取機密(有說只是猜可能是這樣，也可能選直接說阿宜有找自己幫忙) <<#If($ToldAWeiYehAskMCForHelp=2)>> Уэйн Чжэн: Say, what you said yesterday turns out to be true. <<#Simple(8)>> -> What do you mean? Уэйн Чжэн: Ha, you agreed! Don't complain when I dump work on you. ; <> Внутренний голос: Ugh... Уэйн Чжэн: No, I was just kidding! Hahaha! ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Ah, two more things! Уэйн Чжэн: Sorry, this is taking longer than I intended. Уэйн Чжэн: First, the Cellar is still under maintenance, due to yesterday's incident. ; <> Внутренний голос: Yesterday's malfunctioning is that bad...? Уэйн Чжэн: Hopefully! ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: From today on, the Screening office is permanently open house. People from Logistics and Ops could come any time. No paperwork needed. Уэйн Чжэн: And sorry to put you under so much stress. <<#Simple(10)>> -> It's not a big deal. Уэйн Чжэн: I knew you'd take it like a man. ; <> -> As long as I do get the job. Уэйн Чжэн: I like your attitude! ; <> -> *Sigh* Уэйн Чжэн: Look forward. The tough days are now over. ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: That wraps it up. I'm running out of time. Уэйн Чжэн: No way! What made you think that!? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> The vibes are kinda...ominous. Уэйн Чжэн: Ha, no such thing! Уэйн Чжэн: It's just that I'm a bit nervous, too. Because of…reasons. ; <> Внутренний голос: She's absent for good, I reckon... ; <> Внутренний голос: I wonder how much he knows about what happened to her...? There's no one at the Ops office. Джастин Ву: ... These days whatever I say, he just asks for evidence. Джастин Ву: Asking for evidence is not the worst. It's that— ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> It's that he stopped trusting you. Джастин Ву: Exactly. ; <> Джастин Ву: You're awfully perceptive. //if之前俊恩等電梯有猜到鄭緯心情 <<#If($GuessAWeiReactionAtTheTime=true)>> Джастин Ву: You read Wayne correctly last night, too. <<#EndIf>> -> It's that he couldn't adapt and learn. Джастин Ву: I just don't know what he's thinking... -> He just refuses to listen, right? I mean Wayne. Джастин Ву: Yeah... Уэйн Чжэн: You are not hired by either of us. <<#GoTo(@呀阿緯告知主角一組都沒進)>> <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Let me explain the situation of the farm first. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: First of all, Ms. Yeh will be absent for a while. Уэйн Чжэн: I'm getting to that. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Like I said, Silencio is currently under the joined leadership of Justin and I. We have more power than usual. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: The decision to not hire you is largely due to Ms. Yeh's opinion. Уэйн Чжэн: I, personally, don't think you're a good fit, either. However... Уэйн Чжэн: With my temporary power, I decide to hire you. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why? -> Great! Thank you! Уэйн Чжэн: Let me finish. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: I want to change the corporate culture here. Ms. Yeh used to judge Screening candidates by their moral standard. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I do agree with the general principle, but not her specific approach. Уэйн Чжэн: I believe Silencio, as it is, needs cross-division communication more than moral standard. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: A large part of our problems boil down to the lack of transparency. We waste too much resource on infighting. ; <> Внутренний голос: This is not the usual Mr.-nice-guy Wayne. Внутренний голос: He's a proper leader now. Уэйн Чжэн: To solve this issue, the simplest way is to break down the walls between divisions. Уэйн Чжэн: For example, I'm making the Screening office permanently open house from today on. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Members of Ops, either for business or otherwise, are always welcome. Уэйн Чжэн: What do you think? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I'm happy enough to have a job. Уэйн Чжэн: Great! ; <> -> I need some time to process this. Уэйн Чжэн: Take your time. ; <> -> I'll try my best. Уэйн Чжэн: Great! ; <> <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: We have no idea when you can start, though. Ms. Yeh threw the entire farm off track. Уэйн Чжэн: HQ wants us to suspend hiring for the time being, in case the situation gets more complicated. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: We may restore operations next Monday. Your new job starts by then. Уэйн Чжэн: Before that, feel free to walk around the farm. I advise you to do so. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Get to know what's what. Maybe help people with errands, too. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Sounds good. Уэйн Чжэн: Ha, you agreed! Don't complain when I dump work on you. ; <> Внутренний голос: Ugh... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: No, I was just kidding! Hahaha... ; <> Внутренний голос: Back to his usual self, huh. ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Oh, and one last thing. Уэйн Чжэн: The Cellar is still under maintenance, due to yesterday's incident. ; <> Внутренний голос: Yesterday's malfunctioning is that bad...? ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: That wraps it up. I'm running out of time. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: You may stay here a bit longer if you want to, but not for too long. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Someone needs to use this contract room. Уэйн Чжэн: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //鄭緯離開辦公室，在小峰泰銘面前停下 <>;<> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>>

title: 阿姨辦公室門前進不去
body: //靠近阿姨辦公室觸發 <<#If($GoYehOfficeFirst=0)>> Внутренний голос: She's not here anymore. <<#EndIf>> //阿姨辦公室門口鎖住了，玩家調查後得知這點。 //如果玩家先去阿姨辦公室門口會看到調查人員站在門前 Внутренний голос: The IIB locked the door after their investigation... 23(c): What's up? Door locked? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Yes. It's locked tight. 23(c): Figured. -> How did you know? 23(c): Well, because they must know what they're doing? <<#EndSimple>> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why didn't you tell me, then? 23(c): I was counting on the slim chance that you may hit the jackpot. Лоуренс Чжан(c): Typical 23. 23(c): Shut up, boy. -> Is there any way to open it? 23(c): There is, but you won't like it. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): I suggest cutting off the power. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> That will attract a lot of unwanted attention. 23(c): What attention? It's a total blackout! 23(c): No one's gonna see you. Relax. -> I may as well kick the door in. 23(c): It's a steel door, dude. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Listen. Follow the wiring. Locate the breaker box on your floor. ; <> 23(c): Turn the master switch off. That will get you a total blackout. 23(c): Then the magnetic lock disengages! 23(c): I have the floor plan here. The breaker box should be in the break room. //電梯也會不能運作，辦公室會開進去要有一些小對話 <<#Simple(8)>> -> How do I turn it off? 23(c): You will know when you see it. Self-explanatory. Trust me. -> Can't you use some of your hacker mojo? 23(c): What happened to your morning briefing? 23(c): I can't hack anything unless you have the beacon up and running. 23(c): Capeesh? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Hey. 23(c): If you seriously don't like my idea, think of something yourself. 23(c): You've been there for two days. Use your field knowledge! <> Внутренний голос: Ways to open the door without attracting attention...? ; <> <<#End>>

<<#EndSimple>>

title: 到茶水間
body: //進到茶水間發現葉慈恩在泡茶 Эдит Е: Oh hi, Jason! ; <> <>;//確認有在茶水間葉慈恩碰上 //IF操作組 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Эдит Е: I heard you chose Ops in the end? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Yes. Эдит Е: Wow... ; <> Эдит Е: I'm surprised. <> -> Who told you? Эдит Е: Wayne. Who else? <<#EndSimple>> Эдит Е: We are adults. So I won't judge your choice. ; <> Внутренний голос: This comment is already judging... <<#EndIf>> //IF篩選組 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> Эдит Е: I heard about it. Welcome aboard! ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Thank you. Эдит Е: You're welcome. -> But I heard the salary here is kinda low. Эдит Е: You heard it right, haha... Эдит Е: But we have nice office vibes! Внутренний голос: Exactly like what Wayne said. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Эдит Е: So, what are you doing here? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Mr. Liao asked me to make him some tea. Эдит Е: Eh? He just asked me for tea. Внутренний голос: Shit... <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Maybe he forgot? Эдит Е: ...Huh? -> Maybe he thought you may forget. Эдит Е: I feel hurt. Everyone knows I never forget things. <<#EndSimple>> Эдит Е: Anyhow, his tea is made. I'll bring it over. ; <> //慈恩離開 <> Внутренний голос: Phew, that was close... -> I'm not here. You didn't see me. Эдит Е: You're not here? ; <> Внутренний голос: What the hell am I talking about... Эдит Е: Is that a joke? You're weird. Haha. ; <> Эдит Е: See you around. <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //葉慈恩離開 <> -> Um, what happened to that guy? The one I knocked out. Эдит Е: You're asking about him? That's awfully nice! Эдит Е: I don't have any good news to share, though. I heard... ; <> Эдит Е: Death sentence, most likely. ; <> Эдит Е: This is unfair. He's a victim, too... <<#Simple(99999)>> -> The one killed by him is the real victim. Эдит Е: And I thought you'd have a bigger heart than them. ; <> Эдит Е: Turns out you're the same, after all. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Wait. That came out wrong. I didn't mean that. Эдит Е: Good! ; <> -> I just meant the deceased deserve the most sympathy. Эдит Е: What about those forced to kill? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I didn't mean that. Эдит Е: But it sounds to me like you mean it. ; <> -> Alright. They deserve as much sympathy, too. Эдит Е: I'm glad you understand. ; <> <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Эдит Е: I should go now. Эдит Е: Bye. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //葉慈恩離開 <> Внутренний голос: Talking to her is like treading on thin ice... <<#GoTo(@跟葉慈恩茶水間喇類結束)>> -> Yeah. There's something fundamentally wrong with this world. Эдит Е: Right! ; <> Эдит Е: We must try to make it a better place! <<@迴避詞恩問體趕快關掉電>> Эдит Е: Ah, I should go now. ; <> Эдит Е: Nice talking to you. See you later. ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //葉慈恩離開 <> Внутренний голос: Talking to her is like treading on thin ice... <<#GoTo(@跟葉慈恩茶水間喇類結束)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@迴避詞恩問體趕快關掉電)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<@跟葉慈恩茶水間喇類結束>> 23(c): I don't like this woman. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан(c): Eh? Why? Edith is awfully nice. 23(c): You will know when you grow up. 23(c): Go cut the power, Jason. 23(c): If you're really, really sure about it. Внутренний голос: I was really, really sure, until you asked that way... ; <> ; <> <<#End>> //成功切斷電源

title: 阿姨辦公室出來
body:

<<#EndIf>>

<<@跳過23聽到電恢復聲音>>

    //剛剛選過
    <<#If($YouGuessResult23=true)>>

    <<#EndIf>>
    //沒選過。
    <<#If($YouGuessResult23=false)>>
        Лоуренс Чжан(c): You blew it!?
        23(c): Relax. He wouldn't ask you to guess if he blew it.
    <<#EndIf>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Лоуренс Чжан(c): Now what? Attach the beacon to Wayne's computer?
23(c): Yes. Easy peasy. Just don't get caught.
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

Get the beacon online and I'll take care of the rest. 23(c): Follow the plan. <> <<#EndIf>> //有成功請求求幫忙 <<#If(($BallHelpOpenDoor=0)>> Эдит Е: Oh hi, Jason! ; <> ; <> <> Внутренний голос: If Edith remains here... I thought maybe I should tell him in person. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Эдит Е: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> //慈恩去等電梯(主角裝轉送器後要關掉慈恩) <> 23(c): Well done. title: 去鄭緯電腦裝轉送器
body: //主角蹲下靠近主機，攝影機拉近拍不到旁邊，但會看到慈恩走過來 Внутренний голос: Man, installing this thing is so much harder than pulling it out... Внутренний голос: Now, here you go. //if沒有支開慈恩 <<#If($LieToYehTsuFongNotThere=false)>> //慈恩走過來 <> Эдит Е: Jason? ; <> Эдит Е: What are you doing? <> Внутренний голос: Crap, I'm caught... <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I dropped something. -> My shoelaces are loose. <<#EndSimple>> Эдит Е: I mean, what are you doing in Wayne's cubicle? ; <> Лоуренс Чжан(c): Aaaaahhhh he's caught! Alert! Alert! ; <> 23(c): Shut the heck up and calm the heck down! <<#Simple(3)>> -> Shut up, you both! Эдит Е: We...both? Внутренний голос: What the hell am I doing... 23(c): Hey, don't talk to us! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> Эдит Е: I'm asking you a question, Jason? ; <> <> <<@慈恩質問幹嘛在阿緯座位>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Huh? Why ask?($DLStateFloat) <> Эдит Е: Because you look suspicious? ; <> Эдит Е: Appearing in Wayne's cubicle and acting shady. Внутренний голос: She won't let go me of so easily... ; <> Эдит Е: So...? <<#GoTo(@慈恩質問幹嘛在阿緯座位)>> -> I'm checking out Wayne's pictures here. Эдит Е: Ah! ; <> Эдит Е: Which one? Внутренний голос: She seems somehow...expectant? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> The one of all you guys at a dinner party. Эдит Е: That one, huh... ; <> Внутренний голос: She's a bit disappointed...? Эдит Е: That was taken at an end of the year party. Эдит Е: I thought you were looking at the award one. <<#GoTo(@領獎照片慈恩開心)>> -> This one here. Some sort of...award ceremony? Эдит Е: Ha, that one! ; <> <<@領獎照片慈恩開心>> Эдит Е: That's from last year. We won the bronze trophy for outstanding performance! ; <> Эдит Е: Everyone was sooo happy. Our hard work was appreciated! Эдит Е: Especially when we were giving so much to our contributors. ; <> Внутренний голос: She's heartfelt proud of it. ; <> Эдит Е: Ah, sorry I'm rambling. Эдит Е: Take your time! There are some good memories there. ; <> Эдит Е: I'm going back to work, then. ; <> ; <> 23(c): Niiice. Лоуренс Чжан(c): Well done, Jason! -> Wayne's selfie. Эдит Е: Selfie? I don't think he has a selfie there? ; <> Эдит Е: Who puts selfies on their desks? That's like, ego trophies. ; <> Эдит Е: ... Эдит Е: You're not trying to delete files from his computer, are you? ; <> Внутренний голос: Huh? Эдит Е: Don't bother to pretend. You can be honest with me. It happens. Эдит Е: Sometimes we are caught by Silencio for breaking rules. The system sends notices to Wayne. ; <> Эдит Е: Some of us would try to delete these notices before Wayne could see them. Внутренний голос: Well, I didn't know that... ; <> Эдит Е: These notices are kept in the cloud, mind you. Deleting local copies is useless. ; <> //if茶水間 <<#If($PantryYenTsuMeet=true)>> Эдит Е: Heeey, the breaker box, don't tell me it's really you? <<#Simple(6)>> -> It's not me. Swear. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Эдит Е: Anyhow, Wayne will find out eventually. ; <> Эдит Е: Don't worry if it's really not you. <<#EndIf>> //if沒有茶水間 <<#If($PantryYenTsuMeet=false)>> Эдит Е: I don't know what you're trying to do, and I won't ask, Jason. ; <> Эдит Е: If it's something not important, Wayne will find out. <<#EndIf>> Эдит Е: Don't let me catch you next time. ; <> Эдит Е: *Sigh* Эдит Е: Okay. Get going before someone else catches you. ; <> <> Лоуренс Чжан(c): Man, you're in a ton of trouble. ; <> //if操作 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> 23(c): Doesn't matter. He belongs to Ops now. <<#EndIf>> //if茶水間 <<#If($PantryYenTsuMeet=true)>> Внутренний голос: The priority now is the break room surveillance... <<#Simple(6)>> -> The surveillance footage, 23. 23(c): Wiped clean, just like that. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <> <<#EndSimple>> -> Wayne asked me to fetch some files. //if操作組 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Эдит Е: But you work for Ops now. Why would Wayne ask you? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Hey, Screening, Ops, we're the same big family. -> What's wrong with helping a buddy out? <<@慈恩反對啊緯隨便讓人進辦公室>> Эдит Е: Wayne's problem is that he's too busy trying to be nice. Эдит Е: There are rules and procedures. Confidentiality! He can't ignore them like that. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Sorry, my oversight. Эдит Е: It's not your fault. -> But he has decided to make this office permanently open house, no? Эдит Е: ...He told you? Эдит Е: I don't think it's a good idea, but he went forward with it anyway... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Эдит Е: ... ; <> Эдит Е: You do what Wayne asked you to. I'll talk to him later. ; <> //葉慈恩走掉 <> 23(c): She wants to be the boss but doesn't want to admit it. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан(c): Edith isn't the ambitious type. I guess they just have disagreement on this specific issue? 23(c): No. Normally she should feel her opinion is unappreciated, or ignored. 23(c): But the way she put it, she thinks Wayne is wrong. In other words, she believes she should be the one giving orders. Лоуренс Чжан(c): Aren't you reading too much out of a short conversation? 23(c): She's like an empress dowager, getting mad when the young emperor starts to make his own decisions. ; <> -> What's your problem? Эдит Е: ... Внутренний голос: I'm too mean... Эдит Е: *Sigh* <<#GoTo(@慈恩反對啊緯隨便讓人進辦公室)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if篩選組 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> Эдит Е: But... Эдит Е: Alright. You're one of us now. It makes sense. ; <> <> 23(c): Niiice. Лоуренс Чжан(c): Well done, Jason! <<#If($BallHelpOpenDoor<0)>> 23(c): Hey, I've deleted the breaker room surveillance footage. Relax. <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if 有支開 <<#If($LieToYehTsuFongNotThere=true)>> <<#Simple(6)>> -> The beacon is on, 23. 23(c): Great! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> 23(c): Yeah, establishing connection... 23(c): Let me see... Surveillance... Access control... Rating system... ; <> 23(c): Ah, feels great to be in control again. Лоуренс Чжан(c): Control freak. 23(c): Don't stand there, Jason. You're attracting attention. 23(c): Go back to your seat. //if操作 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> Лоуренс Чжан(c): Jason works for Ops now. Is that still his seat? 23(c): Didn't they say something about open house, blah blah? 23(c): Feel free to take a seat! <<#EndIf>> 23(c): Quick. We need to discuss next steps. <> Внутренний голос: Bossy... ; <> <<#End>>

title: 遇到小峰跟泰銘
body:

Тайлер Цао: Hey, Jason!

-> Hello.

-> Hi!
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>

//if操作
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    Джефф Ву: That reminds me. I saw Justin Wu just now. ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站抓頭)>>
    Тайлер Цао: Yeah, coming out of a contract room.
    Джефф Ву: Wayne said you will be assigned today. Then you and Justin came out of the same room...
    Тайлер Цао: Don't tell me you've chosen Ops, Jason? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站看內返回)>> ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站抓頭返回)>>

    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Yeah.
        Тайлер Цао: Ugh... ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰)>>
        Джефф Ву: Wow. ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭)>>
    -> Sorry, but I think Ops is a better fit.
        Тайлер Цао: Don't apologize. Your career, your choice. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰)>>
        Джефф Ву: Right. We're just...
        Тайлер Цао: Surprised. Yeah. Surprised.
        Джефф Ву: I see. ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭)>>
    -> I flunked the field practice for Screening.($SelectGroupScore)
        Джефф Ву: Seriously?
        Тайлер Цао: No can do, then... ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰)>> ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Джефф Ву: It's a shame.
    Джефф Ву: QQ will be sad. ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭返回)>>
    Тайлер Цао: Sad, or mad? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內)>>
    Джефф Ву: Haha, right, he could totally be mad. ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Mad at me?
        Тайлер Цао: No, not you. ; <<PlayUntil(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內返回)>>
        <<#GoTo(@球球會不爽操作組搶走主角嗎？)>>
    -> Then what for?
        <<PlayUntil(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內返回)>>
        <<@球球會不爽操作組搶走主角嗎？>>
        Тайлер Цао: He'll probably blame Ops for baiting you away.
        Внутренний голос: That does sound like QQ.
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>

//if篩選
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>
    Уэйн Чжэн: Don't try to change the subject, you guys. The work I talked about...
    Джефф Ву: Oi! Hold on! ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_正站左看轉右)>> ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰)>>

<<#EndSimple>>
Джефф Ву: Hey, it's about time. ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站看手機)>> ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰抬頭返回)>>
Джефф Ву: I have contract sessions. Edith asked me to cover for someone else. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內)>>
Тайлер Цао: I've got files to prepare, too.
Джефф Ву: Talk to you later. ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站看手機返回)>> ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰看內返回)>>
Тайлер Цао: Bye. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站插腰返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
-> We can still hang out in the future.($MCBelongControlDepartment)
    Джефф Ву: Sure thing! Another day, then! ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站抓頭)>>
    Тайлер Цао: When you say that, it often means there's no next time. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站看內)>>
    Джефф Ву: I mean it! ; <<Play(吳晉峰,MBU_吳晉峰_側站抓頭返回)>>
    Тайлер Цао: It's settled then. Let's hang out another day. ; <<PlayUntil(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_側站看內返回)>>
-> Bye.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
//吳晉峰走進簽約室，曹泰銘走到椅子旁淡入淡出做下看螢幕。
<<#End>>

title: 遇到球球
body:
//站在飲料機前，主動跟她互動
<<Set($TalkToBallFirstPlace,true)>>

<<@現在才第三日第一次跟球球對話欸啊>>

Квентин Цю: ...
Квентин Цю: Oh, hey! ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
Квентин Цю: It's the big day, yes? You're about to choose between Screening and Ops.
//if篩選有入選
<<#If($SelectGroupScore>-1)>>
    Квентин Цю: Wayno's pretty nervous. Keeps saying you'll probably go to Ops.
<<#EndIf>>
Квентин Цю: How did it go? Which side did you choose? ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手)>>
//if篩選
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Screening, of course.
        Квентин Цю: Ha! I knew it! ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手返回)>>
        Квентин Цю: I told Wayno that you'd never choose Ops!
    -> What if I told you that I chose Ops?
        Квентин Цю: Huh? Do you think I'd be mad? ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手返回)>>
        Квентин Цю: No! I'm a bigger man than you thought!
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> I thought you hated Ops.
        -> Just curious, haha.
            Квентин Цю: I hate Ops, but not you! ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭)>>
            Внутренний голос: He's a good buddy.
            Квентин Цю: But if you work there for too long, I may end up hating you, too. ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭返回)>>
            Квентин Цю: Let's not worry that far ahead, haha!
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Квентин Цю: So, you did choose Screening, right?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> Of course.
            Квентин Цю: You're the man!
        -> I had to. For you.
            Квентин Цю: Say that again in front of Tyler. Haha!
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>


//if操作
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> I chose Ops in the end.
        <<@主角選操作組球球震驚>>
        Квентин Цю: Ugh... ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手返回)>>
        Квентин Цю: I'm surprised.
        Квентин Цю: Why?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> For the money.
        -> I don't like talking to people.
            Квентин Цю: Understandable. ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Квентин Цю: Your job, your choice! Wish you all the best!
        Квентин Цю: Wayno said he's making the Screening office permanently open house. Come over when you have time. ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
        Квентин Цю: We can hang out later.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        -> Tyler and Jeff said that, too.
            Квентин Цю: Then all of us together!
            Квентин Цю: And you can be our mole within Ops. ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭)>>
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            -> I'm not a mole!
                Квентин Цю: See? Your heart belongs to them already!
            -> What's my mission, commander?
                Квентин Цю: Collect gossips and keep a record of their dirty deals!
            -> ...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Квентин Цю: Haha, I was kidding. ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭返回)>>
        -> Sure!
            Квентин Цю: That settles it, then!
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    -> What if I told you that I chose Ops?
        Квентин Цю: Huh? Do you think I'd be mad? ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手返回)>>
        Квентин Цю: No! I'm a bigger man than you thought!
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> I thought you hated Ops.
        -> Just curious, haha.
            Квентин Цю: I hate Ops, but not you! ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭)>>
            Внутренний голос: He's a good buddy.
            Квентин Цю: But if you work there for too long, I may end up hating you, too. ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬頭返回)>>
            Квентин Цю: Let's not worry that far ahead, haha!
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Квентин Цю: So, you did choose Screening, right? ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看抬手)>>
        Внутренний голос: Hmm...
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> Sorry, I chose Ops.
        -> You guessed wrong.
            <<#GoTo(@主角選操作組球球震驚)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>

Квентин Цю: Now, enough about you! ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右返回)>>
Квентин Цю: Now I must make the big decision. The soda today!
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Take your time.
    Квентин Цю: Of course I'll take my time...
    Квентин Цю: Choose carefully...
    Квентин Цю: Or shall I buy both...? ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> Decide already.
        Квентин Цю: Quiet. I didn't ask for your opinion.
    -> Just get both. Give yourself a treat.
        Квентин Цю: You're a bad influence.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Invest in health, not soda!
    Квентин Цю: Get out! ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
    //if操作組。
    <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
        Квентин Цю: Don't try to trick me, minion of Ops!
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        -> Oi!
            Квентин Цю: Hahaha.
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
-> ...
    <<PlayUntil(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Квентин Цю: ...
Квентин Цю: Hey, for real... If there's anything you need help with... ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看插腰)>>
Квентин Цю: Just come find me. You can always trust me, sweetie.
//if操作
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    Квентин Цю: Even when you choose to go with Ops.
<<#EndIf>>

//if篩選
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>
    Квентин Цю: We're on the same team now!
<<#EndIf>>

<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Thank you.
    Квентин Цю: Heh.
-> I'm not your sweetie!
    Квентин Цю: I'm giving a generous offer, haha!
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Квентин Цю: OK. Now I have a big decision to make... ; <<PlayUntil(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站右看插腰返回)>> ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右返回)>>
//IF需要幫忙後才來找球球
<<#If($TalkToBallFirstPlace=false)>>
    <<#Simple(10)>>
    -> Actually, I do need your help with something now.($HelpYehOfficeDoor)
        Квентин Цю: What is it? ; <<Play(邱奕宏,MBU_邱奕宏_背站轉頭右)>>
        <<#GoTo(@第一次沒搭話後來直接找球球幫忙)>>
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>

<<#Simple(6)>>
-> Bye.
    Квентин Цю: Bye.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>



<<#End>>
//球球雖然留下了，但之後要記得把它關掉，或是直接讓他走掉

title: 等地窖電梯時
body:
<<@下地窖前23最後聊天對話>>
23(c): Ah, a reminder before you go down. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭)>>
23(c): We will be out of touch while you're in that elevator.
23(c): The walls are radio-proof. Let's establish comms again when you come out of it.
Лоуренс Чжан(c): I need to cut comms too. Talk to you later.
23(c): Hurry the heck up, Lawrence. Don't count on Jason for everything! ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭返回)>>
23(c): Oops, he's already out...
23(c): That boy needs to learn his manners. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Because you've been mean to him.
    <<@23解釋自己鬧隆生有意義>>
    23(c): The problem with Lawrence is that he thinks in a linear way.
    23(c): I have to nudge him every once in a while to change his course.
    23(c): It's hard to be me.
    Внутренний голос: I can't tell if she means it...
-> I'd hang up on you, too, if I were him.
    23(c): Oi!
    <<#GoTo(@23解釋自己鬧隆生有意義)>>
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Say... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭返回)>>
23(c): It's just you and me on the line now.
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站歪頭)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
-> So?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Never mind. You're boring.
23(c): Hey, your ride is here. ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站歪頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 離開地窖電梯
body:
//搭地窖電梯的過程中，中空空間燈光閃爍無人機維修

//出電梯以後，通話有一點雜訊？

23(c): Hello? Jason, do you copy? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Copy.
    23(c): Good...
-> No.
    23(c): Damn you're funny, haha!
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Got bad news for you.
23(c): They have shut down most things in the Cellar for maintenance.
23(c): That includes the surveillance network. I don't have a camera to hack into.
23(c): Hmm, looks like they simply cut the power...
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Does that affect my mission?
    23(c): It shouldn't.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> Shouldn't?
        23(c): OK! It won't!
    -> Good to know.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> What do we do now?
    23(c): We don't have any other option. Have to push on.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): I don't have visual on your position. Can't tell if there's anyone coming.
23(c): You're on your own. Improvise.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Are they after me?
    23(c): No. But you don't have a legit reason to be here. Don't get caught.
-> Roger that.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Go to the garage. I'll start a car for you.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Will this leave any record?
    23(c): No.
    23(c): Don't be a baby like Lawrence. I thought you're the cool one.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> What does this have to do with being cool?
        23(c): Do you mind?
        Внутренний голос: She's being a pest...
    -> I'm just trying to follow Situ's orders.
        23(c): Beep beep. I. Am. A. Robot. I. Follow. Orders.
        Внутренний голос: She's being a pest...
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Do I need a car?
    23(c): Huh? Haven't you been to the Ops office already?
    23(c): Aren't supposed to be shuttled around in the Cellar?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Seriously, get moving. Quick.
23(c): Anyone coming down to the Cellar would catch you there.
23(c): I'll try to help where I can. 23 out.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Внутренний голос: I don't know if I can trust her... ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 躲車子
body: //走進停車場有一台車子突然啟動。 //玩家走道車子旁邊的時候，突然停車場大門打開一點點，車燈從外面照進來。這時進入緩速。 //反應成功 <<#If($CellarHideCar=true)>> Внутренний голос: Damn... Гарольд Чжу: Huh? I thought I saw someone. ; <> Стелла Хуанг: You must be seeing things. Гарольд Чжу: Probably. ; <> <> Внутренний голос: Phew. I don't think they saw me... 23(c): Is there someone coming? Don't answer if yes. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Yeah. 23(c): Shhh! I said don't answer! 23(c): Stay low. Wait for them to leave. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //反應失敗 <<#If($CellarHideCar=false)>> Внутренний голос: Shit. They saw me... Внутренний голос: Trying to hide only makes me even more suspicious. <> Гарольд Чжу: Huh? I thought I saw someone. ; <> Гарольд Чжу: Hey! Who's there? What are you doing here? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Can I be here? -> I'm a member of the Ops team. Can't I be here? Гарольд Чжу: We're having a break today. Don't you know? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I know. -> It's just that I have unfinished work. Гарольд Чжу: What work would that be? Стелла Хуанг: What do you care? Let's go. ; <> Гарольд Чжу: A lot of systems are offline today. I don't want him to have this run for nothing! Стелла Хуанг: He said he knows. ; <> Гарольд Чжу: Really? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I'm not born yesterday. Leave me be. Гарольд Чжу: Hey! What kind of attitude is that? Стелла Хуанг: Come on, just leave him be. ; <> -> Thank you. I know what I'm doing. Гарольд Чжу: Oh, good. Стелла Хуанг: Come on, stop bugging him. ; <> <<#EndSimple>> Стелла Хуанг: Let's go. ; <> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //等兩人走掉 <<#End>>

title: 下車以後
body:
Внутренний голос: It's dark in here.
23(c): I checked the access log. The Ops office should be completely deserted now.
23(c): Go right in.
<<#End>>

title: 升降梯搭下去以後
body:
//主角在黑暗中下升降梯，往前走兩步突然開燈，兩個特勤拿槍指著主角，徐媛站在他們身後。
Юна Хсу: It's you again.
Внутренний голос: Crap...
Юна Хсу: I will take over from here. You are dismissed. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站揮手)>>
Юна Хсу: Open that door for me. ; <<Set($DLState,徐媛保鑣們去操作機器)>>
//徐媛揮揮手，他的手下退開從右離開畫面
//徐媛同時坐下，面朝攝影機翹二郎腿

<<PlayUntil(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站揮手返回)>>
<<Set($DLState,徐媛在操作組走向主角對話)>>
23(c): Calm, Jason. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
23(c): I know that voice. Yuna Hsu, of the IIB?
23(c): Let's find out what she wants first. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<CloseCommunicator()>>


Юна Хсу: Got to say, you're a special man.
Юна Хсу: Always appearing in the wrong place at the wrong time.
Юна Хсу: How did you pull it off? You don't have the security clearance to come down here.

//IF有加入操作組
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,0)>>
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    -> I'm a member of the Ops team now.($DLStateFloat)
        Юна Хсу: Ops is taking a day off. Haven't you heard?
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    23(c): Listen, Jason. The only rule you're breaking is entering your office on an off day.
<<#EndIf>>
//IF有加入篩選組
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=-1)>>
    23(c): Listen, Jason. The only rule you're breaking is entering an office that is not yours.
<<#EndIf>>
23(c): Otherwise she's got nothing on you. She can't touch you.
23(c): Don't take her bait.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Юна Хсу: I didn't know the army is training agents to infiltrate civilian corporations now. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站抬手)>>
Внутренний голос: She knows my background...
<<PlayUntil(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站抬手返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> I'm an employee of Vision.
    Юна Хсу: For now.
-> You ran a background check on me?
    Юна Хсу: Of course. It's part of my job.
    Юна Хсу: After yesterday, I think you, a seemingly harmless nobody, deserve more attention.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Юна Хсу: Let me guess. You're here to find out who is trying to kill your girlfriend. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰)>>
Внутренний голос: ...Huh?
Юна Хсу: I'm sorry for what happened to Frances. I respect her as a woman. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬手)>>
Юна Хсу: Capable, independent.
Внутренний голос: How much does she know? Is she part of it? ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬手返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> You can save the sarcasm.
    Юна Хсу: No, I mean it.
-> Yet you hurt her.
    Юна Хсу: Believe me or not, I'm not part of this.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>


Юна Хсу: Tell me. What did you find up there?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> What do you mean?
    Юна Хсу: *Sigh* ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰低頭)>>
    Юна Хсу: Please. Let's skip the playing dumb part.
-> I found nothing.
    Юна Хсу: I'm not convinced. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰低頭)>>
-> None of your business.
    Юна Хсу: I don't think so. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰低頭)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Юна Хсу: You know, my job is to catch and investigate rule breakers.
Юна Хсу: I can ask those gentlemen to search you, if that's what it takes. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰低頭返回)>>
23(c): Give her the decryption device if they choose to use brute force.
23(c): Your safety is the top concern.
23(c): Even if you manage to take them down, you can't get out of the farm.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Внутренний голос: No, I can't just...
Юна Хсу: Don't want to?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> OK, here it is.
-> Over my dead body.
-> I have no idea what you're talking about.
<<#EndSimple>>
Юна Хсу: ...
Юна Хсу: On second thought, never mind. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰返回)>>
Юна Хсу: Forget that I asked.
Внутренний голос: ...Huh?
Юна Хсу: Consider this an offer of friendship. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站抬手)>>
Юна Хсу: Whatever you found, keep it.
Юна Хсу: Hopefully you will trust me more in our alliance. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站抬手返回)>>
Внутренний голос: ...What alliance?

Юна Хсу: We are here for the same reason. I'm trying to figure out what's happening behind the scenes, too. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰)>>
Юна Хсу: It's a shame to admit, but they used me. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬頭)>>
Внутренний голос: She's lying. She can't possibly know nothing...
Юна Хсу: Vision is trying to hide something. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬頭返回)>>
Юна Хсу: The hiding part is not a problem. Corporations have secrets.
Юна Хсу: But when they try to hide things from the IIB, that's a real problem.
Внутренний голос: She doesn't know what's on the hard drive, however... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
Юна Хсу: See? Our interests are aligned. We should form an alliance. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> How do I know I can trust you?
    Юна Хсу: Trust or not, does it matter?
-> Sounds reasonable.
    Юна Хсу: It is reasonable.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Юна Хсу: I don't want, or need, you to agree. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬手)>>
Юна Хсу: You know you don't have any other option.
Юна Хсу: From here on, I will conduct my own investigation. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰抬手返回)>>
Юна Хсу: I'll let you know when I need you.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> And when you don't need me?
    Юна Хсу: Feel free to do your own little investigation.
-> I'm not cooperating with you.
    Юна Хсу: Don't rush to conclusions. You don't know what you're talking about.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Юна Хсу: I can't stay on this farm all the time. There must be an insider to run errands for me.
Юна Хсу: I'll be in touch.
Юна Хсу: Now, show yourself out. I have work to do.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> What kind of work?
    Юна Хсу: Do you think I'd tell you?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> I thought we're an alliance.
        Юна Хсу: We are an alliance only when I need you.
        Юна Хсу: And I don't need you now.
    -> You don't have a reason to refuse.
        Юна Хсу: I refuse, for no reason.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Юна Хсу: Now, show yourself out.
-> You're letting me go, just like that?
    Юна Хсу: What should I keep you here for?
    Юна Хсу: You're more useful to me elsewhere. Now leave.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<PlayUntil(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側站插腰返回)>>
<<Set($DLState,徐媛進操作組長辦公室)>>

23(c): You did well, Jason.
23(c): Don't dwell on it.
23(c): Bring the decryption device back and we're done.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
<<#End>>
//玩家走到停車場時車子一樣自動啟動

title: 走過去找蕭勇明對話
body:
//從貨車上下來後，到電梯時會看到蕭勇明剛好走過來，然後盯著貨車。可以走過去跟她對話

Майкл Сяо: Hi, Mr. Dai. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Hi.
    //
-> What are you doing here?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>

Майкл Сяо: That van is weird. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_抬手)>>
Майкл Сяо: You just came out of it, right?
Внутренний голос: And 23 promised this van will blend in perfectly... ; <<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_抬手返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Yeah.
    //
-> You saw me?
    Майкл Сяо: I did.
<<#EndSimple>>
Майкл Сяо: Did you see anyone else in the van?
Майкл Сяо: I suspect it contains unauthorized personnel or shipments.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> No, there's nothing inside.
    Майкл Сяо: Really?
-> What made you think that?
    //
<<#EndSimple>>
Майкл Сяо: Its load seems...off.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> What do you mean?
    Майкл Сяо: Let me explain. ; <<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站點頭)>>
-> Come on, you're worrying too much.
    Майкл Сяо: No, it's not that simple.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Майкл Сяо: Its suspension is visibly weighed down, meaning it's carrying heavy cargo. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_思考)>>
Внутренний голос: Come on! Why is a regular security officer so perceptive...? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
Майкл Сяо: But the driver told me it's empty, saying there are here to pick up cargo.
Майкл Сяо: What do you think, Mr. Dai? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> I did load some cargo into the van.
    Майкл Сяо: Ah, I see.
-> You're really worrying too much.
<<#EndSimple>>
Майкл Сяо: ...
Майкл Сяо: You're right. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_思考返回)>>
Майкл Сяо: I've checked their security pass anyway. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_測站點頭)>>
Майкл Сяо: ID verified. Urgent Toilet Paper Roll Inspectors sent by HQ.
Внутренний голос: ...Urgent Toilet Paper Roll Inspectors??? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站後傾)>>
Майкл Сяо: Yeah, maybe I am worrying too much. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭)>>
Майкл Сяо: Thank you. Now I feel much at ease.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Uh, you're welcome?
-> Uh-huh.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Майкл Сяо: I'm back to work then. See you. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站後傾返回)>> ; <<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
-> Bye.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 鄭緯打電話
body:
//可以調查貨車，顯示他是某家公司的快遞貨車
//玩家搭電梯到月台，靠近貨車後
//說要找主角，但如果主角有其它是可以先處理，有空再過來就好。

Уэйн Чжэн(c): Hey, Jason? Have you left the farm? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> I'm still here.
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): Great!
-> Can I help you?
<<#EndSimple>>

Уэйн Чжэн(c): Since you're formally a member of Screening now, there's some work for you.
Уэйн Чжэн(c): Remember the assault the day before yesterday?
Уэйн Чжэн(c): On top of that, our security system hasn't been very reliable.
Уэйн Чжэн(c): Now I want Screening staff to work in pairs in the contract rooms, just in case.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Not reliable? How?
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): Like doors refusing to open, or opening for no apparent reason.
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): The Logistics team is working on it, although their priority is the Cellar.
-> So, you need me to pair up with someone?
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): Correct.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн(c): Mr. Liao needs to sign on a few contributors, but can't find a partner.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> No one wants to go with him?
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): Ugh...
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): ...That is correct.
    Внутренний голос: I can feel how frustrated he is. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭)>>
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): Working with Mr. Liao could stress people out, you know, haha...
    Внутренний голос: Very true. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭返回)>>
-> You need me to go with him?
    Уэйн Чжэн(c): Yes.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн(c): I just realized you're part of the team now.
Уэйн Чжэн(c): And you could take this opportunity to gain some field experience.
Уэйн Чжэн(c): This counts towards your work hours. Find me at my desk if you'd like to.
Уэйн Чжэн(c): Mr. Liao's time is flexible. So, no hurry.
Уэйн Чжэн(c): If you have other things to take care of, go do it first.
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Внутренний голос: Hmm... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
Внутренний голос: That makes a legit excuse for me to stay at the farm.
Внутренний голос: Anyway, I should hand this decryption device to Situ and the gang.
23(c): Enough phone calls, Jason! ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
23(c): The van is unlocked. Hop on in.
23(c): There's your surprise inside!
<<CloseCommunicator()>>
Внутренний голос: This better be the good kind of surprise... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 跟鄭緯說可跟廖哥
body: Уэйн Чжэн: You've decided to pair up with Mr. Liao? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Not a problem at all. Уэйн Чжэн: Great! ; <> -> Let me think again. Уэйн Чжэн: Sure thing. ; <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Today you will do something different, not signing on new contributors. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: The objective is to explain how we handle premature termination to some signed contributors. Внутренний голос: But I've never seen any manual about that... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Premature termination? Уэйн Чжэн: Rejection response during flop generation. They are not fit anymore. Уэйн Чжэн: We must terminate their contracts ahead of time, and pay them accordingly. -> But I have no idea what to do? Уэйн Чжэн: That is not a problem. I know everything. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Mr. Liao will navigate the session today. You just sit there and watch. Уэйн Чжэн: Edith? Where's Mr. Liao? ; <> Эдит Е: He went downstairs. ; <> ; <> Эдит Е: He said he can handle it himself. No need to waste time. Уэйн Чжэн: *Sigh* ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Catch up with him, Jason. I think he hasn't started yet. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I'll leave the rest to you. Эдит Е: Ahem! Wayne. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: ... ; <> Внутренний голос: ...What's up? ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Aaand one more thing. I told Mr. Liao already... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Don't give any benefit that is not listed in the contract. He tends to do that. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I know he means well, but that will eat into our overall budget. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Do we have a budget problem? Уэйн Чжэн: Not yet, but we must prepare proactively. -> I thought you wanted to help contributors as much as possible? Уэйн Чжэн: Within a reasonable range. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Внутренний голос: I can tell he's struggling against himself. Уэйн Чжэн: ... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Everything considered, just use discretion. Уэйн Чжэн: If Mr. Liao is being overly generous, give him a nudge. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Will do. Уэйн Чжэн: Thank you. -> Do I, like, stop him right there? Уэйн Чжэн: No, persuade him. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: If he doesn't listen, I'll have a talk with him. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Now go. Mr. Liao should be in one of the contract rooms. <> <<#End>>
