title: 跟廖吉興一起簽約
body: //一進房間，主角跟廖哥都站著停住，有一男一女都坐著了。 Джордж Ляо: Hello. I'm George Liao. Nice to meet you. <<#Simple(6)>> -> I'm Jason Dai. <<#GoTo(@有自我介紹嗨喲欸哎)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джордж Ляо: Where are your manners? Introduce yourself. ; <> Внутренний голос: You told me to sit tight and shut up... <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I'm Jason Dai. <> -> I'm a damn newbie. Nice to meet you. Внутренний голос: Liao stabbed me with his ice-cold stare. <> -> I said shut up, I shut up. ; <> Джордж Ляо: Use your brain! Джордж Ляо: He's our new employee. Jason Dai. ; <> ; <> <<#EndSimple>> <<@有自我介紹嗨喲欸哎>> Джордж Ляо: ... Внутренний голос: Why aren't they talking...? Внутренний голос: Especially the guy. Weird vibes. <> //廖哥往前走坐上椅子，等主角也靠近坐上椅子 Джордж Ляо: As you know, Ms. Chen, your husband's contract has been terminated, because of rejection response. Руби Чэнь: ...much. Джордж Ляо: Excuse me? ; <> Руби Чэнь: ...how much? ; <> Джордж Ляо: I beg your pardon? ; <> Руби Чэнь: How much money do we get? Джордж Ляо: You can find the payout figure in the notice letter we sent earlier. ; <> Руби Чэнь: ... ; <> Руби Чэнь: Nine years! He was tortured for NINE YEARS! ; <> Руби Чэнь: Now you're terminating the contract one year early, and cutting the pay by half...? ; <> ; <> Тимоти Йен: Urk aaahh... ; <> Внутренний голос: Is he brain-damaged? ; <> Руби Чэнь: How are we supposed to live? How can he WORK!? ; <> Джордж Ляо: I'm sorry, Ms. Chen, but we must proceed in accordance with the contract. ; <> Руби Чэнь: The contract? According to the contract, he has one more year! ; <> ; <> Джордж Ляо: The contract does contain a premature termination clause. We are following— ; <> Руби Чэнь: ENOUGH LIES! ; <> Тимоти Йен: Urrgh oe oo urrgh urrgh... ; <> ; <> Руби Чэнь: Hey, hey, are you okay, honey? ; <> Тимоти Йен: *Cough* ; <> Джордж Ляо: We can't— ; <> Руби Чэнь: Now I have one more mouth to feed and less money to do it with. ; <> Джордж Ляо: Ms. Chen... ; <> Руби Чэнь: Stop! I don't want to listen! Руби Чэнь: You can't do anything! I know it! We are leaving! ; <> ; <> Джордж Ляо: No, I mean... ; <> ; <> Джордж Ляо: ...Have you checked out our subsidy programs? Руби Чэнь: Subsidy? ; <> ; <> Джордж Ляо: Yes, we can offer additional subsidies. ; <> Внутренний голос: Wayne warned me of this... Внутренний голос: Shall I stop him? ; <> Джордж Ляо: You simply need to sign here... <<#Simple(8)>> -> Wait. We can't provide subsidy. ; <> Руби Чэнь: What does he mean? Джордж Ляо: No, he's a newbie. He knows nothing. Just sign here. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Wayne doesn't allow this, Mr. Liao. Джордж Ляо: Wayne is not here. I'm the boss in this room. ; <> Джордж Ляо: And I take all consequences. -> Sorry, my fault. <> -> ... <> <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джордж Ляо: Please sign here. ; <> //碰一下屏幕 << PlayUntil (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_開啟) >>;<< Play (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_點擊) >>;<> Руби Чэнь: Here, signed... Джордж Ляо: Good. I will arrange for additional payment as soon as possible. ; <> Руби Чэнь: R-really? ; <> Джордж Ляо: Yes, I promise. ; <> Руби Чэнь: Thank you! Thank you! ; <> Джордж Ляо: If there is no objection, you're free to go now. ; <> Руби Чэнь: Let's go, honey. ; <> //兩人離開 <<#End>>

title: 廖哥被抓後回去找阿緯
body:
Тайлер Цао: Who do they think they are, those minions of HQ?
Тайлер Цао: They can't just walk into the office and take our people away!
Уэйн Чжэн: I know, but... ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Jason, you're back. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站抱胸左看)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐起身)>>
Внутренний голос: Tyler's angry? That's a rare sight. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: What did they say?
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Huh?
-> Which they?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Those agents. What did they say before they took Mr. Liao away?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> They said Mr. Liao knew what he had done.
-> They said he made someone unhappy.
<<#EndSimple>>
Тайлер Цао: ...What? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看抱胸返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: That's it? No mention of Ms. Yeh?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> As far as I heard, no.
-> Should they have mentioned her?
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн: ... ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站低頭)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: The IIB told us they are taking Mr. Liao away. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: They said he may have be an accomplice of Ms. Yeh in a theft of corporate secrets.
Внутренний голос: Huh? These incidents are related?
Внутренний голос: So, George Liao and Eva Yeh were conspiring together?
Внутренний голос: But Situ never mentioned him...
Тайлер Цао: They've been terrorizing the whole farm for two days. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站微慌)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>>
Тайлер Цао: And now they're making arrests...
Уэйн Чжэн: ... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: I said I know. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站微慌返回)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站低頭返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: We must find out what this is all about. ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站右看)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: HQ obviously wants Mr. Liao. The accomplice thing is only an excuse. Or so I believe.
Тайлер Цао: Considering what Jason heard, there must be more to the story... ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站右看返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> I think so, too.
    Уэйн Чжэн: Care to explain?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Mr. Liao isn't the conspiring type.
        Тайлер Цао: You're right.
    -> The agent didn't even mention Ms. Yeh when they took him away.
        Тайлер Цао: Right. That doesn't make sense.
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> What made you think so?
    Тайлер Цао: They took him without a proper explanation. Didn't ask any of us for testimonies, either.
    Тайлер Цао: I think they're just using Ms. Yeh as an excuse.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>

Тайлер Цао: What shall we do, Wayne? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>
Тайлер Цао: What now? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭)>>

Уэйн Чжэн: ... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站抱胸)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Jason. Did Mr. Liao offer overly generous subsidies in the contract room?
Тайлер Цао: Is that important? We have way more urgent matters! ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Did he? Did he do it again? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Yeah, he did.
    <<@跟啊緯緯坦承廖哥有亂給錢>>
    Уэйн Чжэн: I see...
-> No, he didn't.
    Уэйн Чжэн: This is of critical importance, Jason. Be honest. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>
    Внутренний голос: I've never seen him so serious...
    Уэйн Чжэн: You may think you're helping him, but you really are not.
    Уэйн Чжэн: Let me ask again. Are you sure that he didn't offer contributors overly generous subsidies? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> OK, he did.
        <<#GoTo(@跟啊緯緯坦承廖哥有亂給錢)>>
    -> He didn't, really.
        Уэйн Чжэн: Is that so...?
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Тайлер Цао: Wayne...? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Did he do anything unusual in the contract room?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Not that I'm aware of.
    Уэйн Чжэн: I see. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>
-> He made a phone call.
    Уэйн Чжэн: What? To whom? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> I have no idea.
    -> Probably someone higher up in the hierarchy.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Уэйн Чжэн: Did he call whoever it is by their name?
    Внутренний голос: He called them Mister something, although I forgot exactly what...
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> I can't quite remember. It's Mister something.
        Уэйн Чжэн: At least we know it's a man.
    -> Mister Luo.
    -> Mister Chen.
        //
    -> Mister Li. ; <<Set($ChuNameRemember,$-1)>>
        Уэйн Чжэн: I see.
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Did you notice anything else unusual?
<<#Simple(6)>>
-> Yes. Edith came to check on us in the middle of the session.
    Уэйн Чжэн: Edith? What for?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> She asked if we needed anything.
    -> I thought you asked her to?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Уэйн Чжэн: I didn't...
    Уэйн Чжэн: Anyway, I will talk to her about it later.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>

Тайлер Цао: Why are you asking Jason these random questions? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: I'm trying to gain a better look of the whole picture... ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背站抱胸返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Got any idea?
-> But these questions... How could they help?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн: I need to think, and check a few more things.
//通知音效，電腦有個通知動畫？
Уэйн Чжэн: Wait...
<<PlayUntil(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐起身返回)>>
Внутренний голос: Why is he staring at the computer?
Уэйн Чжэн: ...

Уэйн Чжэн: Jason. You saw the man who took Mr. Liao, right?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Why?
-> Yeah, kind of like a beanpole.
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн: I need you to find out who he is.
Внутренний голос: ...But why?
<<#Simple(10)>>
-> How am I supposed to do that?
    Уэйн Чжэн: Ask those IIB agents. They are all over the place. Some of them must know something.
-> Why?
    Тайлер Цао: Does his identity matter? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站插腰)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看)>>
    <<#GoTo(@啊緯說明特勤身分為啥重要欸)>>
-> Leave that to me.
    Уэйн Чжэн: Thank you.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Тайлер Цао: Wait, Wayne. Is the agent's identity really that important? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站插腰)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看)>>
<<@啊緯說明特勤身分為啥重要欸>>
Уэйн Чжэн: When they took Mr. Liao, I made a call to the IIB officer in charge of Ms. Yeh's case.
Внутренний голос: Officer in charge? Yuna Hsu?
Уэйн Чжэн: She just responded, saying she didn't give the order.
Тайлер Цао: WHAT? Who could it be, then? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站插腰返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: She has no idea, or so she says. Maybe she just doesn't want me to know.
Уэйн Чжэн: The bottom line is, she said that agent is not one of her men.
Уэйн Чжэн: Whoever sent him, they outrank her.
Тайлер Цао: That is... ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: That means our theory is plausible. Someone at HQ wants Mr. Liao. ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: We must find out who this someone is.
Уэйн Чжэн: So, Jason, I need you to find out the identity of that agent.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> I know his name.
    Уэйн Чжэн: Huh? What's his name?
    Внутренний голос: Wait... Do I really know...?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Golan Chu.
    -> Logan Chu.
    -> Roland Chu. ; <<Set($ChuNameRemember,$-2)>>
    -> Loran Chu.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Уэйн Чжэн: ...Never heard of that name. ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭)>>
    Тайлер Цао: Me, neither. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考返回)>>
    Уэйн Чжэн: How did you know? ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭返回)>>
    Внутренний голос: Good question... How did I know? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> I don't know how I know but I just know.
        Тайлер Цао: Are we doing tongue twisters now?
        Уэйн Чжэн: This is not the best time for jokes, Jason. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手)>>
        Внутренний голос: I...
        Уэйн Чжэн: We really need to find out who he is. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手返回)>>
    -> He wore a name tag. I saw it.
        Внутренний голос: That's not true! Why did I say that?
        Тайлер Цао: Ha!
        Уэйн Чжэн: Let's see if I can find anything... ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站左看返回)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐炒菜)>>
        Уэйн Чжэн: ...
        Уэйн Чжэн: Nope, no result. ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐待機)>>
        Уэйн Чжэн: We must find out more about this guy. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Can you do it?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> How am I supposed to do that?
-> Leave that to me.
<<#EndSimple>>
//鄭緯: 特勤隊長有提到那個男的找了一個她的手下幫忙帶路。
//鄭緯: 也許可以從這個人下手。
Уэйн Чжэн: Go around the farm, ask IIB agents you run into.
Уэйн Чжэн: There must be at least one agent per floor. ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Maybe we will find something.
Тайлер Цао: The thug on this floor is particularly mean. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站思考返回)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐抬手返回)>>
Тайлер Цао: The one in the entrance lobby is a lot nicer. ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Or just too lazy to do his job. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>>
Тайлер Цао: Ugh, you're right. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭)>>
Тайлер Цао: But Wayne, having Jason asking around is totally random... ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: We are running out of ideas.
Тайлер Цао: I'll give Jason a hand, then. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站抬手)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: No, I have other tasks for you.
Тайлер Цао: Hm? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站抬手返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: I'll give you Mr. Liao's work account. Go examine all his documents.
Тайлер Цао: Huh? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Especially financial forms and receipts.
Тайлер Цао: But why? That would be a mountain of files. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站微慌)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Focus on this year's. No...
Уэйн Чжэн: Just check those from this April on. Go! ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭返回)>>
Тайлер Цао: I will. But... ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站微慌返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: But what?
Тайлер Цао: You don't think Mr. Liao has done anything wrong, do you? ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: ... ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: I'm not sure.
Тайлер Цао: ...OK. I'll go check his files. ; <<Play(曹泰銘,MBU_曹泰銘_正站低頭返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Thank you. ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭返回)>>
<<Set($DLState,穩哥去翻廖哥資料囉)>>

Уэйн Чжэн: While you look for leads, Jason, I'll be looking for clues, too. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看返回)>> ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Will keep you updated.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Alright.
    //
-> What if I still can't identify the agent by then?
    Уэйн Чжэн: In that case, we have to improvise.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Уэйн Чжэн: I simply don't believe this is related to Ms. Yeh. ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Something big is about to happen, right here at Silencio...
Уэйн Чжэн: HQ is about to make up their mind about farm closure, too.
Уэйн Чжэн: I won't allow Screening to be sucked into this vortex without any preparation.
Уэйн Чжэн: First things first. Find out what's happening to Mr. Liao. ; <<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭返回)>>
Уэйн Чжэн: Jason, find out who that agent is. Tyler and I will comb through his documents for clues.
Уэйн Чжэн: Go, Jason.
Внутренний голос: The identity of that agent...?
Внутренний голос: 23 might know something, but I can't get in touch with her now...
<<#End>>

title: 找特勤時去貨車
body: //玩家去貨車時看見一個穿著送貨員衣服的女生，從畫面外走過來 //靠近時自動進對話 Нин Ситу: Jason? What's up? ; <> Внутренний голос: What uniform is that...? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Situ? Нин Ситу: It's me. -> Is that some sort of disguise? Нин Ситу: Yes. <<#EndSimple>> Внутренний голос: A sly grin. Нин Ситу: I do have a pass, but a little disguise can't hurt. <<#Simple(8)>> -> The cup of coffee is part of your disguise, too? Нин Ситу: Huh? That is not. -> You look good in it. Нин Ситу: I'll take it as a compliment. Thanks. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: Frances said I can find 23's favorite coffee blend nearby. So I went to get her some. Нин Ситу: She's busy, though. I'll wait till she's freed up. <<#Simple(8)>> -> She asked you to run errands? Нин Ситу: No. I just thought she deserves a treat. <<#Simple(6)>> -> You're awfully nice to her. Нин Ситу: She's nicer to me. ; <> Внутренний голос: Her sweet smile is so out of character. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> You're awfully nice to her. Нин Ситу: She's nicer to me. ; <> Внутренний голос: Her sweet smile is so out of character. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: What's up? Do you need something? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I need 23 to look someone up for me. Нин Ситу: I'm afraid she can't. ; <> Нин Ситу: All computers onboard are busy crunching the data you retrieved. <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Just a quick check on surveillance log files. Внутренний голос: The way she looks at me seems to say "no", I guess... -> Okay. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: Sorry. But you can come back later. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> It's OK. -> Maybe I will. <<#EndSimple>> -> Nothing. I'm running out of things to do. Нин Ситу: Uh-huh. <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: See you later, then. Keep in touch. <> <> <<#End>>

title: 看到廖哥被抓
body: //離開房間後看到廖哥面前站著兩個特勤，一個是莊詩妍，一個室朱祿一個修長的男生，也是穿西裝的特勤感覺逼格要比其他特勤都高 Внутренний голос: ...Agent from HQ? Внутренний голос: What is this about? Джордж Ляо: How many times do I have to repeat myself! ; <> Джордж Ляо: I have work to do! Джордж Ляо: Whatever investigation it is, I have nothing to do with it! Логан Чжу: You know what you have done, Georgie. Джордж Ляо: I... ; <> Логан Чжу: He is very unhappy about it. Джордж Ляо: I-I thought... I just... Логан Чжу: Come with me. He wants to talk. Шеа Чжуан: Sir, you can't take employees away without— ; <> ; <> Логан Чжу: Did I ask for your opinion? ; <> Шеа Чжуан: N-no, sir... Логан Чжу: Don't let me repeat myself. ; <> Логан Чжу: Come with me, Georgie. ; <> Джордж Ляо: ... ; <> Джордж Ляо: OK. ; <> Логан Чжу: You, back to your work. Шеа Чжуан: Yessir. //廖吉興、朱祿、莊詩妍:走掉 <> Внутренний голос: ...And Mr. Liao is going with him like that? Внутренний голос: What's this about...? Уэйн Чжэн(c): Jason, come back to the office, now. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> What's up? // -> The IIB just took Mr. Liao. Уэйн Чжэн(c): I know. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн(c): Just come back right now. <> Внутренний голос: What now...? ; <> <<#End>> //吳晉峰: 欸，士傑…… //呃，剛剛那是廖哥嗎？為什麼他跟著特勤走了？ //->我也不清楚。 // //->廖哥好像做錯什麼事了。 // 蛤？他怎麼可能會搞到總公司特勤要抓他？ //這一定有什麼誤會，我、我去跟他們說……！ //小峰跑去找廖哥

title: 特勤很煩攔查
body:
//玩家靠近就自動進對話

Шеа Чжуан: Stop. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站看外)>>
Внутренний голос: Her again. Exactly the same thing happened yesterday... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
Шеа Чжуан: Come over here, please.
Внутренний голос: Does she know about the alliance between me and Yuna Hsu...?
<<Set($DLState,被詩妍二度攔查該瞬移了)>>
Внутренний голос: I'm carrying the decryption device with me. Hopefully it doesn't trigger the scanner. ; <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站看外返回)>> ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬頭)>>
Внутренний голос: Is 23 watching? Come on! Say something if you are! ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
Шеа Чжуан: Excuse me, but I must perform a full scan on you.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Hey, nice to see you again!
    Шеа Чжуан: Uh...
    Внутренний голос: Huh? Did she hesitate for a moment? ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬頭返回)>>
    Шеа Чжуан: Please stand still. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬頭)>>
    Внутренний голос: No no no no no don't beep...!
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Sure thing. ; <<Set($SheYanImpressionToMC,0)>>
        Шеа Чжуан: Thank you for your cooperation.
        Внутренний голос: That went rather well.
        <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站掃描)>>
        Шеа Чжуан: All clear.
        Внутренний голос: Phew...
        Шеа Чжуан: You're free to go.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        -> Have a nice day.
            Шеа Чжуан: Th-thank you... ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站掃描結束抬頭)>>
            Шеа Чжуан: You have a nice day, too.
            Внутренний голос: She's pretty nice, actually...
            <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站掃描結束抬頭返回)>>
        -> Stop wasting my time. ; <<Set($SheYanImpressionToMC,-2)>>
            Шеа Чжуан: You're free to go now.
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#End>>
    -> Why? You scanned me yesterday! ; <<Set($SheYanImpressionToMC,-2)>>
        Шеа Чжуан: Stand still.
        <<#GoTo(@跟攔查特勤關係不太好了)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Not you again?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Set($SheYanImpressionToMC,-2)>>
Шеа Чжуан: Please stand still.
<<@跟攔查特勤關係不太好了>>
Внутренний голос: No no no no no don't beep...!
<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站掃描)>>
Шеа Чжуан: All clear. You're free to go.
Внутренний голос: Phew. For a moment I thought I was done for... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 飲料特勤
body:
//玩家遇到的第一個特勤，如果玩家走道預定生成點就生成她，生成完成就不會改位置了

//買回來
<<#If($BoughtDrinkForDrinkGuy>0)>>
    //if買錯
    <<#If($BoughtDrinkForDrinkGuy=2)>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Eh? That's not what I asked for. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Heh. But I don't have a problem with free soda.
    <<#EndIf>>
    //if買對
    <<#If($BoughtDrinkForDrinkGuy=1)>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Thank you. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    <<Set($BePlayedSoBoughtDrink,0)>>
    Кейтлин Чжу: ... ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
    Кейтлин Чжу: ...
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> So, who is that guy?
        <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
        <<@追問高先生到底是誰>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Which guy?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> That agent from HQ.
            Кейтлин Чжу: You know what? I don't know, haha! ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站插腰)>>
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            -> You lied?
                Кейтлин Чжу: Ahem! ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一放下)>>
            -> The fuck??
                Кейтлин Чжу: Calm! Calm down! ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一放下)>>
            -> ...
            <<#EndSimple>>
        -> Do I look like an idiot?
            Кейтлин Чжу: N-no... ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站插腰)>>
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            -> Who is that guy? Spill.
            -> Don't fucking play dumb with me.
                Кейтлин Чжу: Calm! Calm down! ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一放下)>>
            -> ...
            <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: It depends on your perspective!
        Кейтлин Чжу: I, personally, see it as a harmless joke! ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看比一放下返回)>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Between you guys and the IIB, we need to break the ice. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看手指)>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Right...?
        Кейтлин Чжу: Haha?
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        -> Good. I remember you now.
        -> Ha! You're SO funny!
            Кейтлин Чжу: Um...
        -> *Sigh*
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: So... That's it! ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看手指返回)>>
        Внутренний голос: What a waste of time... ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站插腰返回)>>
        <<Set($DLState,朱啟妤買飲料事件結束)>>
        <<#End>>
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Кейтлин Чжу: Why are you still here? I said thank you. You're free to go now. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> You haven't told me who that guy is yet.
        <<#GoTo(@追問高先生到底是誰)>>
    -> Ah, right. Bye then.
        Внутренний голос: I can't leave yet! ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>








//不信
<<#If($SaidDontTrustDrinkguy=-1)>>
    Кейтлин Чжу: What? You don't believe me? ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> I believe you now. Come on, tell me.
        <<#GoTo(@請教你買飲料仔告訴你他是誰)>>
    -> I don't.
        Кейтлин Чжу: Don't bother me then.
        <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>


//知道要幫買飲料過了。
<<#If($DrinkguyToldNeedDrink=true)>>
    Кейтлин Чжу: Changed your mind? ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Nope.
        Кейтлин Чжу: Whatever.
    -> OK, you win. What soda do you want?
        Кейтлин Чжу: Hee hee. That's a good boy. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看歪頭)>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: I want Pogari Sweet.
        Кейтлин Чжу: Go get it! Thank you! ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看歪頭返回)>>
        <<Set($DLState,答應幫朱啟妤買飲料了)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
    <<#End>>
<<#EndIf>>


Кейтлин Чжу: Hey? Can I help you? ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Do you know that agent sent by HQ?
    Кейтлин Чжу: Hm? ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看歪頭)>>
    Внутренний голос: That clueless look.
    Кейтлин Чжу: Oooh! I know him. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看歪頭返回)>>
    Кейтлин Чжу: You want to know who he is?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Yes. Could you tell me?
        <<@請教你買飲料仔告訴你他是誰>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Sure.
        Внутренний голос: Huh? That simple?
        Кейтлин Чжу: But... ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看低頭)>>
        Внутренний голос: I knew there has to be a but...
        Кейтлин Чжу: Go get me a soda. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看低頭返回)>> ; <<Set($DrinkguyToldNeedDrink,true)>>
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        -> Just a soda? Are you sure?
            Кейтлин Чжу: Yeah.
        -> Why don't you get it yourself?
            Кейтлин Чжу: My boss is watching us. Buying soda during work is a big no. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看低頭)>>
            Кейтлин Чжу: If you get me a bottle of soda, though, I may steal a sip every once in a while. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看低頭返回)>>
            Внутренний голос: ...
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Deal?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> Deal. What do you want?
            Кейтлин Чжу: Pogari Sweet.
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            -> Don't forget our deal! Tell me who that guy is!
                Кейтлин Чжу: OK good sure!
            -> Alright.
            -> ...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Кейтлин Чжу: Just go already. ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看快去)>>
            Кейтлин Чжу: I'll wait here. ; <<Set($DLState,答應幫朱啟妤買飲料了)>>
        -> Okay, I see that you don't really know.($SaidDontTrustDrinkguy) ; <<Set($SaidDontTrustDrinkguy,-1)>>
            Кейтлин Чжу: Whatever you think.
            <<#Simple(6)>>
            -> Okay. What do you want?
            -> ...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Кейтлин Чжу: You help me out, I help you out. ; <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    -> You really know?
        Кейтлин Чжу: I said I do! ; <<Play(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看手指)>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Don't believe me if you don't want to!
        <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看手指返回)>>
        <<#Simple(8)>>        
        -> Okay. Could you tell me?
            <<#GoTo(@請教你買飲料仔告訴你他是誰)>>
        -> Nah, I don't believe you. ; <<Set($SaidDontTrustDrinkguy,-1)>>
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Кейтлин Чжу: Don't waste any more of my time. ; <<PlayUntil(朱啟妤,MBU_朱啟妤_正站螢幕右看返回)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Never mind.
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 請徐媛開地窖電梯權限
body:
//到行政大廳後看到徐媛正在跟一個穿著跟她一樣的人在喝咖啡

//靠近後徐媛後那人離開，玩家可以跟徐媛主動說話




Юна Хсу: Jason Dai. Looking for me? ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看外)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Yes.
-> We need to talk.
    //
-> Don't play dumb.
    Юна Хсу: Don't be so mean.
<<#EndSimple>>
Юна Хсу: Have a seat.
<<Set($DLState,徐媛請來求權限的主角坐下)>>;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看外返回)>>
//主角淡入淡出
//if有告訴徐媛
<<#If($ToldYuanIntel=2)>>
    Юна Хсу: Let me guess. You want me to return the favor.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Correct.
        //
    -> And you don't want to?
        Юна Хсу: Depends.
    -> How do you know?
        Юна Хсу: What else could it be? Just a friendly chat?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Юна Хсу: What do you want?
    <<@跟徐媛說自己要去運算核心>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> I need security clearance for the Flop Core.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Внутренний голос: She's frowning.
    Юна Хсу: ...That, I can do.
    Юна Хсу: However, why would you want to go there?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> It's classified.
        Юна Хсу: ... ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
        Юна Хсу: Okay, I don't really care, anyway.
        Внутренний голос: That's it? She's not gonna press me any further? ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
    -> I need to retrieve some data.
        <<@也是呢，去那裡也只有這種可能了。>>
        Юна Хсу: Right. Data. The only thing you can find there.
    -> I need to blow it up.
        Юна Хсу: In that case, I refuse. Too much risk for me. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾)>>
        Внутренний голос: For her? She doesn't care about the company...?
        Нин Ситу(c): What the hell are you doing? Take it back!
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        -> I was joking. Wanted to see your shocked face.
            Юна Хсу: Stop wasting my time.
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            -> Sorry. I just need to retrieve some data. Really.
                <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾返回)>>
                <<#GoTo(@也是呢，去那裡也只有這種可能了。)>>
            -> Hey, don't be so serious, eh?
                Внутренний голос: I sound like a dumbass...
            -> ...
            <<#EndSimple>>
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Нин Ситу(c): ...Jason Dai.
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        Юна Хсу: Go away. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾返回)>>
        //淡入淡出主角
        <<Set($DLState,來求權限的主角離座位)>>
        Нин Ситу(c): What the hell are you doing? One minute into the conversation and you blew it??
        23(c): I guess we have to go with the original plan, then? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
        Нин Ситу(c): Yeah. Jason, meet Lawrence at the elevator to the Cellar.
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        Внутренний голос: Situ sounds furious. Well, she has a good reason to be mad...
        Внутренний голос: Even I am mad at myself... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
        <<#End>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Юна Хсу: Just yourself?
    Внутренний голос: She figured I have partners?
    Нин Ситу(c): Don't mention any of us.
    <<CloseCommunicator()>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Just myself.
    -> I'm a lone wolf.
        Юна Хсу: Good. There will be trouble if you bring someone else along. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐點頭)>>
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        -> What kind of trouble?
            Юна Хсу: Why ask? Didn't you say just yourself?
            Внутренний голос: Crap... I stepped right into her trap. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭)>>
            <<#Simple(99999)>>
            -> I'm curious.
                Юна Хсу: In that case, I don't want to explain.
                Внутренний голос: Judging by her look... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
                Внутренний голос: She's fairly certain that I'm working with someone else...
            -> Yeah, nothing escapes you, huh?
                Юна Хсу: You are like an open book. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
                <<#Simple(6)>>
                -> So, what kind of trouble should I expect?
                    Юна Хсу: Oh, nothing at all. That was a trick question.
                    Внутренний голос: And she's gloating...
                -> ...
                <<#EndSimple>>
            <<#EndSimple>>
        -> I don't need to worry about that.
            Юна Хсу: Indeed.
            Внутренний голос: She seems convinced...
            Нин Ситу(c): Well done. It's a trick question.
            <<CloseCommunicator()>>
            Внутренний голос: If I asked about it, she'd know I have partners...
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    -> No, I have partners.
        23(c): Jason Dai, Mister Honesty.
        Нин Ситу(c): You...
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        Юна Хсу: I knew you have partners.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Юна Хсу: Hmmm... ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看內)>>
    Юна Хсу: I can grant you access, but it's only for this one time.
    Внутренний голос: One time is enough.
    Юна Хсу: But it's not me. A colleague of mine will grant you access. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看內返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> What do you mean?
    -> Who?
        Юна Хсу: Let's just say that someone in the IIB owes me a favor. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐抬手)>>
        Юна Хсу: This is the perfect time for him to pay his debt.
        23(c): I think she's talking about Irvin Lin. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐抬手返回)>>
        23(c): Another senior IIB officer. Hsu sees him as a competitor.
        23(c): My guess is that she wants to have him do the job, then use it to blackmail him. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭)>>
        23(c): It's none of our concern.
        Внутренний голос: 23 knows everything, huh...
        23(c): You're thinking, "23 knows everything, huh".
        23(c): Yep! I do know everything!
        Нин Ситу(c): Sorry, let's cut 23 off. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回)>>
        <<CloseCommunicator()>>
        Юна Хсу: What? Cat got your tongue?
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        -> Nothing. I was distracted for a moment.
            Внутренний голос: Distracted by 23...
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Юна Хсу: I can't trust you, if you keep having focus issues. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾)>>
        Юна Хсу: OK. You don't need to know who exactly grants you access.
        <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾返回)>>
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Юна Хсу: The result is the same—you have what you need.
    Юна Хсу: ... ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看機)>>
    Юна Хсу: It's done. Now you can go to the Flop Core.
    Юна Хсу: Remember, though. Only once.
    <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看機返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> Thank you.
        Юна Хсу: You're welcome.
    -> Bye.
        Юна Хсу: Not even a thank you?
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    //主角淡入淡出
    <<Set($DLState,來求權限的主角離座位)>>;<<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐看機)>>
    23(c): Security clearance verified. You do have access to the Flop Core.
    Нин Ситу(c): Well done. Now meet Lawrence at the elevator to the Cellar.
    <<Set($LetYuanHeipOpenAccesses,true)>>
    <<#End>>;//因為其他路線都會接到(跟徐媛說自己要去運算核心)，所以要在這裡end，不然會循環
<<#EndIf>>

//if還沒跟徐媛說
<<#If($ToldYuanIntel<2)>>
    Юна Хсу: Let me guess. You're willing to tell me who's working for the board? ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Correct.
        //
    -> How do you know?
        Юна Хсу: What else could it be? Just a friendly chat?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Юна Хсу: Who is it? ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐前傾返回)>>
    //IF有解開操作組支線
    <<#If($KnowTruthControlDepartment=0)>>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> Kevin Hu is working for directors in favor of farm closure.
            Юна Хсу: The division lead of Ops? ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
            Юна Хсу: A man like him...
            Юна Хсу: Huh, it does make sense. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
        -> Liam Hsu is working for directors in favor of farm closure.
            Юна Хсу: ... ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
            Юна Хсу: He is not on my list.
            Юна Хсу: I will investigate him soon enough. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
        -> Kevin Hu and Liam Hsu are working for directors in favor of farm closure.
            Юна Хсу: The division lead of Ops?
            Юна Хсу: A man like him... ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
            Юна Хсу: ...
            Юна Хсу: Liam Hsu is not on my list.
            Юна Хсу: I will investigate him soon enough. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    //IF有解開篩選組支線
    <<#If($KnowTruthSelectDepartment=0)>>
        Внутренний голос: It's George Liao...
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> George Liao of Screening is working for directors against farm closure.
            Юна Хсу: I remember him. Shea did background research on him.
            Юна Хсу: If it's him... ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭)>>
            Внутренний голос: Did I give her new ideas...?
            Юна Хсу: Good. I see. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐低頭返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    Юна Хсу: ...
    Юна Хсу: Jason Dai, I don't think you're stupid enough to deceive me. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐抬頭)>>
    Юна Хсу: Still, a friendly reminder is due. If you lied, you will pay.
    Юна Хсу: But for now, I owe you one. ; <<Play(徐媛,MBU_徐媛_側坐抬頭返回)>>
    Юна Хсу: If you need any favor, say it now.
    <<#GoTo(@跟徐媛說自己要去運算核心)>>
<<#EndIf>>

title: 認真引導特勤
body: //可能之前可以幫過這個人？站在篩選走廊盡頭 //if當下沒接受 <<#If($LuWantBallLineNotAccept=-6)>> Сэань Лу: Changed your mind? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Yeah. You can count on me. Сэань Лу: Thank you. ; <> ; <> <> <<#End>> -> Nope. Сэань Лу: Okay. <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Сэань Лу: You again, huh. What's your business? //if今天第二次碰到 <<#If($GoYehOfficeFirst=0)>> Внутренний голос: We met once earlier today. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Do you know that agent sent by HQ? Сэань Лу: Which one are we talking about? Сэань Лу: All IIB agents are from HQ. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I mean the special one, just came here today. -> This one doesn't look like IIB. <<#EndSimple>> -> I need the name of the agent who took George Liao. Сэань Лу: George Liao? <<#EndSimple>> Сэань Лу: Hmm... ; <> Сэань Лу: I've never heard about this. Сэань Лу: However, I know where you can find the answer. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Where? Сэань Лу: Uh, hold on for a second... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Сэань Лу: You must do me a favor first. ; <> //IF剛剛幫過料事件 <<#If($BePlayedSoBoughtDrink=0)>> Внутренний голос: Not this favor thing again...? <<#Simple(8)>> -> Another favor? You'd better not be shitting me. -> Do you think I'd fall for the same trick twice? <> Сэань Лу: Huh? Someone from the IIB tricked you? Сэань Лу: Don't tell me it's Kaitlyn Zhu? The agent on the consultation floor? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Yeah. Сэань Лу: I'm sorry. ; <> Сэань Лу: We have a very strict code of conduct. I'll report that to my boss. Внутренний голос: He's surprisingly reasonable. -> No. Сэань Лу: Sorry, I must have misunderstood. ; <> <<#EndSimple>> Сэань Лу: I promise. You can trust me. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Сэань Лу: I need, um, hmm... ; <> Внутренний голос: He's...shy? Сэань Лу: I need you to get the phone number of someone in the Screening division. Could you? Внутренний голос: Picking up girls, huh? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Gimme the name. Сэань Лу: Quentin Qiu. ; <> -> Sure. Сэань Лу: Please get his phone number for me. ; <> <<#EndSimple>> Сэань Лу: He just went into the office. Внутренний голос: ...QQ? <<#Simple(8)>> -> Sure thing. Piece of cake. Сэань Лу: We have a deal then. ; <> -> You're interested in him? Сэань Лу: Of course. That's why I'm asking for his phone number. ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Сэань Лу: It's OK if he says no. Just let me know. ; <> Сэань Лу: Success or not, I'll tell you what I know. Сэань Лу: How about that? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Deal. Remember your promise. ; <> Сэань Лу: I will. ; <> <<#End>> -> I need to think about it. ; <> Сэань Лу: No problem. Come find me if you change your mind. ; <> <<#End>> -> Why don't you just go inside and ask him? Сэань Лу: I'm a bit, uh, nervous... Сэань Лу: So... ; <> Внутренний голос: I can't imagine he's the shy type... Сэань Лу: What do you say? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Deal. Remember your promise. ; <> Сэань Лу: I will. ; <> <<#End>> -> I need to think about it. ; <> Сэань Лу: No problem. Come find me if you change your mind. ; <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>>

title: 去莊詩妍位置遇到孫茹
body:
//剛好看到孫茹掃描完一個人放她走
//第二日電梯一定要介紹到孫如
//

Роуз Сан: Oh, hi! ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>>
Роуз Сан: How's it going?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> I need to talk to the IIB agent on this floor.
-> Where's the IIB agent? She's usually here.
   Роуз Сан: She's on a restroom break. I'm covering for her.
-> What are you doing?
    Роуз Сан: I'm covering for Shea.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    -> Shea?
        Роуз Сан: The IIB agent in charge of this floor. She's usually here, checking people going to and from the Cellar.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Роуз Сан: She's taking a restroom break.
<<#EndSimple>>


<<#Simple(8)>>
-> You're pretty nice to her.
    Роуз Сан: She's a pretty nice person. One of a kind in the IIB.
-> I see you've got time to kill?
    Роуз Сан: That's rude. ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭)>>
    Роуз Сан: I'm off work, OK? ; <<PlayUntil(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭返回)>>
    
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>

Роуз Сан: She was here, looking kind of edgy. So I asked her what's wrong. ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬手)>>
Роуз Сан: She said she needed to go to the restroom but couldn't leave unless there's someone covering for her.
<<PlayUntil(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬手返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Just a few minutes. Does it matter?
    Роуз Сан: That's what I said, hahaha! ; <<PlayUntil(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭返回)>>
    
-> Then you offered to cover for her?
    Роуз Сан: Yeah, I'm just that nice. ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭)>>
    Роуз Сан: Haha! ; <<PlayUntil(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭返回)>>
    
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Роуз Сан: She's meticulous. And a big fan of her boss, too. ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身比一)>>
Внутренний голос: ...A big fan of Yuna Hsu?
Роуз Сан: But she's not mean to us. Not your typical IIB snob. ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身比一返回)>>
Роуз Сан: So I thought she deserves a break.

Роуз Сан: You're looking for her?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Yes. I need to ask her something.
    Роуз Сан: About what?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> About someone.
        Роуз Сан: Who?
    -> Never mind.
        Роуз Сан: Don't keep me hanging!
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Sort of.
    Роуз Сан: Uh-huh.
<<#EndSimple>>
//if篩選組走孫茹路線
<<#If($IntoCellarByHelpSun>-1)>>
    //if有幫她修燈
    <<#If($IntoCellarByHelpSun=1)>>
        Роуз Сан: Hey.
        Роуз Сан: I haven't got a chance to thank you for fixing the elevator light.
        Роуз Сан: That helped me a lot.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        -> Don't mention it.
            //
        -> Well, you owe me one.
            Роуз Сан: Put it on my tab.
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
<<#EndIf>>









//莊詩妍走過來對話椅後主角從側站改程正站，未來的阿凡妳動畫做到這裡跟我說一下我跟妳說銘
Роуз Сан: Yeah! ; <<Set($DLState,莊詩妍上完廁所來找孫如)>>
Роуз Сан: She's coming.
Роуз Сан: Hey, Shea! ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭)>> ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側轉正)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看)>>
Роуз Сан: That took you a while.
Роуз Сан: Stomach bug or something?
Шеа Чжуан: Shhh! ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞)>>
Роуз Сан: Ah, sorry, haha... ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬頭返回)>>
//if是解支線過來
<<#If($LuWantBallLineNotAccept=10)>>
    Внутренний голос: She was with the guy who took George Liao.
<<#EndIf>>

Роуз Сан: Oh, this one here is Mr. Dai. ; <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Nice to meet you.
    Шеа Чжуан: Nice to meet you, too.
-> You searched me. Remember?
    Шеа Чжуан: I do. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站點頭)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Шеа Чжуан: I searched you twice, if my memory serves.


//if好
<<#If($SheYanImpressionToMC=0)>>
    Внутренний голос: She showed me a friendly smile.
<<#EndIf>>

//if不好
<<#If($SheYanImpressionToMC=-2)>>
    Внутренний голос: She doesn't want to look me in the eye.
<<#EndIf>>


Роуз Сан: Say... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看轉右)>>
Роуз Сан: He's looking for someone, and you probably know who this someone is? ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬手)>>

Шеа Чжуан: Yes? Who is it that you're looking for? ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身抬手返回)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看轉左)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> The agent who was with you earlier today.
-> The agent who was really mean to you.
<<#EndSimple>>
Шеа Чжуан: ...You mean? ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>>
Внутренний голос: Her guard is up.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> The guy with you outside the contract rooms.
-> The guy who took my colleague.
<<#EndSimple>>
Шеа Чжуан: That one, huh...
Шеа Чжуан: Sorry... ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>> ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> What for?
    Шеа Чжуан: For your colleague.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Don't be. You have a job to do.
    -> I don't blame you. It's him.
        Шеа Чжуан: Hmm...
    -> Just tell me who he is if you feel sorry.
        Роуз Сан: Hey! Mind your attitude!
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Just tell me who he is already.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Шеа Чжуан: ...
Шеа Чжуан: Why do you want to know? ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> That is irrelevant.
    Роуз Сан: If you want answers, give answers first, alright?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> What do you care?
        Роуз Сан: Huh!?
    -> Sorry, I'm not very inclined to tell.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Шеа Чжуан: It's alright. I'm just curious. ; <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站否認)>>
    <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站否認返回)>>
-> I need to find out why he took my colleague.
    Шеа Чжуан: That I can tell you right away. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬手)>>
    Внутренний голос: Oh?
    Шеа Чжуан: Your colleague may have played a part in Eva Yeh's espionage activities. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬手返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> No. That is not the real reason.
        Шеа Чжуан: It's the official reason. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭)>>
        Внутренний голос: ...Official reason?
        Внутренний голос: That means she doesn't buy it, either. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭返回)>>
    -> You believe that? Seriously?
        Шеа Чжуан: I... ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭)>>
        Внутренний голос: That means she doesn't buy it, either.
        <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭返回)>>
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Шеа Чжуан: ...
Шеа Чжуан: What would you do if I told you his identity? ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> I'll pass the information to the Screening lead.
    Шеа Чжуан: Why?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Because he asked me to find out.
    -> We are trying to get to the bottom of this.
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Run some more investigations on him, maybe?
-> I'm not sure yet.
<<#EndSimple>>
Шеа Чжуан: I see... ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站思考)>>
Внутренний голос: I can't tell what's going on in her head...
Внутренний голос: One thing I'm sure of is that she does know something.

Шеа Чжуан: ...
Шеа Чжуан: I guess I shouldn't talk about this with you. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站思考返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Why? He told you not to?
    Шеа Чжуан: Not specifically. I just feel this should be classified information.
-> You think I could rat you out?
    Шеа Чжуан: N-no! ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站否認)>>
    Шеа Чжуан: You don't have a reason to. Right...?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Of course not.
    -> What do you think?
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Шеа Чжуан: I see. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站否認返回)>>
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>

Шеа Чжуан: ...
Роуз Сан: Don't tell him if you think it's a bad idea. ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>>
Шеа Чжуан: It's OK.
Шеа Чжуан: Hmm... ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭)>>
Шеа Чжуан: First of all, I'm not sure who exactly he is.
Шеа Чжуан: All I know is that he works directly for the board, not the IIB. ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>>
Шеа Чжуан: That's all I know. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> The board?
    Шеа Чжуан: The board of directors, of Vision Corp.
    Внутренний голос: I can tell she feels weird that I don't know which board she's referring to.
-> How do you know he works for the board?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Шеа Чжуан: He showed me a pass issued by the board. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬雙手)>>
Внутренний голос: Yes, this is a major lead.
Роуз Сан: The board sending their own henchmen to our farm? I'm flattered! ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看轉右)>> ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬雙手返回)>>
Шеа Чжуан: I was surprised too. He approached me without going through my superior.
Шеа Чжуан: Something is going on... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站右看轉左)>>
Шеа Чжуан: ...
Шеа Чжуан: Mr. Dai. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門)>>
Внутренний голос: Huh? What now?
Шеа Чжуан: I told you who he is. In exchange, I want something from you, too.
Шеа Чжуан: Let's make a deal.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Isn't it too late? I already have what I need.
    Шеа Чжуан: Oh...
    Шеа Чжуан: Y-you're right... ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門低頭)>>
    Роуз Сан: Hahaha! Well played, Jason Dai!
    Шеа Чжуан: Anyway...! ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門低頭返回)>>
-> Sure. How can I help you?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>


Шеа Чжуан: Whatever you find out about this man, could you keep me in the loop?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Why do you want to know?
    Шеа Чжуан: My boss is interested, although she didn't explicitly say so.
    Шеа Чжуан: I want to help her. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門返回)>>
    Внутренний голос: Maybe Yuna Hsu is somehow involved, too... ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>>
    Роуз Сан: Want to impress your boss, huh?
    Шеа Чжуан: No, it's not like that. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞)>>
    Шеа Чжуан: I'm just trying to contribute more to the IIB...
    Роуз Сан: So? What do you say? Help this poor girl to impress her boss?
    Шеа Чжуан: I'm not trying to impress!
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Why not? ; <<Set($ToldYenIWillShareInfo,0)>>
        Шеа Чжуан: Thank you! ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>> ; <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞返回)>>
    -> I'll be the judge of that. ; <<Set($ToldYenIWillJudgeByMySelf,0)>>
        Шеа Чжуан: I see... ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機)>> ; <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站害羞返回)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Why not? ; <<Set($ToldYenIWillShareInfo,0)>>
    Шеа Чжуан: Thank you! ; <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門返回)>>
-> I'll be the judge of that. ; <<Set($ToldYenIWillJudgeByMySelf,0)>>
    Шеа Чжуан: I see... ; <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站守門返回)>>
<<#EndSimple>>

Шеа Чжуан: I'll stay here for a while.
Шеа Чжуан: If you need me, come find me any time.
Шеа Чжуан: Don't forget to keep me in the loop, will you? ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身看機返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Sure thing.
    Шеа Чжуан: Thank you. ; <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站點頭)>>
-> I can't promise anything.
    Шеа Чжуан: I know. ; <<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站點頭)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Роуз Сан: Now that you're all settled, I'm going home. ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身收機)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看轉右)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> You didn't have to stay to begin with.
    Роуз Сан: Nonsense!
    Роуз Сан: Who's to protect poor Shea if I were not here?
    Шеа Чжуан: I can protect myself!
    Роуз Сан: Sure you can, haha!
-> Thank you.
    Роуз Сан: Don't mention it!
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Роуз Сан: Bye, you two. ; <<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側身招呼)>>
<<#Simple(6)>>
-> Bye.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>

title: 最後回去跟阿緯討論廖哥事件
body: //時間到或成功跟詩妍說到話後讓穩哥跟阿偉準備好自動進對話 Уэйн Чжэн: How's it going? Got any leads? ; <> ; <> Внутренний голос: Judging by the sound of it, he's not expecting much. //if有茶道。 <<#If($InspectWhoTakeLiau=0)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> The agent works for the board of directors. -> Mr. Liao probably offended someone on the board. <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Hmm... Уэйн Чжэн: This is way worse than we expected... ; <> ; <> Тайлер Цао: But it fits right into your theory, Wayne. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I'd rather be wrong... Уэйн Чжэн: This is invaluable information. Well done, Jason. ; <> ; <> ; <> //if解支線 <<#If($LuWantBallLineNotAccept=10)>> <<#Simple(8)>> -> It took me a while. Уэйн Чжэн: Great work. -> Piece of cake. Уэйн Чжэн: I knew I can depend on you. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@跳過直接自己找詩妍路線對話)>> <<#EndIf>> //如果直接去找，不做if <<#Simple(8)>> -> I think I knew one of the agents who took Mr. Liao. Тайлер Цао: Yeah? You had a lead in the beginning? ; <> Тайлер Цао: Nice. Beats Wayne's "try everything" strategy by miles. ; <> Тайлер Цао: Sorry Wayne, I didn't mean to— ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: No offense taken. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Well done, Jason. That saved us a ton of time. ; <> ; <> -> Actually, it's easier than you may have thought. Тайлер Цао: I knew we could depend on you! ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@跳過直接自己找詩妍路線對話)>> <<#EndIf>> //如果沒查到，不做if <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Sorry, I haven't found anything yet. -> No. // -> I'm working on it. Уэйн Чжэн: Good. Thank you. ; <> ; <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: It's alright. Let's put that aside for now. <<@跳過直接自己找詩妍路線對話>> Уэйн Чжэн: While you were working on that, Tyler and I found out something. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: ... ; <> Внутренний голос: Judging by their faces, this something can't be good... Уэйн Чжэн: Mr. Liao used funds that shouldn't be touched. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Embezzlement? -> He really is guilty? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: It's complicated. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I've noticed that our divisional budget has been increasing for months. Уэйн Чжэн: Back then I thought it must be some sort of incentive from HQ, for our outstanding performance... Тайлер Цао: I just ran an itemized check. Turns out a large part of the increased budget doesn't make sense at all. ; <> ; <> Тайлер Цао: And there are two sets of budget sheets in Mr. Liao's computer. One looks normal, while the other... ; <> Тайлер Цао: We suspect some unknown party is secretly funding us. Тайлер Цао: Someone at HQ is sending us additional funds in the name of budget allocation. Уэйн Чжэн: Mr. Liao was aware of it, and actively helped this someone to cover it up. Уэйн Чжэн: He is in charge of accounting, but I should have done proper supervision. This is my fault, too. ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> Wait. What you're trying to say is...? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Simply put, someone has been channeling money into our budget. Уэйн Чжэн: And Mr. Liao is helping them to cover up. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why did he do that? -> I know. What I don't get is who gives out free money? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: My first thought was money laundering. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Did Mr. Liao send these additional funds somewhere? -> In that case, we should have lots of unexplained expenditures, too? Уэйн Чжэн: That is where things start to get weird. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: All our expenditures are well justified. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> So what? We have a secret Santa who keeps giving us money? Уэйн Чжэн: Not exactly. Уэйн Чжэн: This secret Santa is somehow going out of his or her way to stay secret. -> Why did Mr. Liao bother to hide anything if all expenditures are justified? Уэйн Чжэн: It's not up to Mr. Liao... Уэйн Чжэн: This secret funder of ours seriously wants to stay anonymous. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Everything considered, I'm confident that it's not money laundering. Уэйн Чжэн: This secret funder doesn't want to be seen, not even by us. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Mr. Liao is his or her mole, to keep their tracks covered. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: ...Anyway, this is way more complicated than we expected. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: ... Тайлер Цао: But your theory still stands, Wayne. ; <> ; <> //if 有茶道 <<#If($InspectWhoTakeLiau=0)>> <> Уэйн Чжэн: You're right... <<#Simple(8)>> -> What theory? Тайлер Цао: Wayne came up with a legit possibility. ; <> <> -> Why do they want to take their mole away? Тайлер Цао: Because Mr. Liao failed to spend the money as instructed. ; <> <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: I suppose this might have to do with the farm closure thing. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: The board is discussing whether or not to shut down Silencio in the next few years. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Isn't it up to the CEO? Внутренний голос: His reaction says I asked a silly question. Уэйн Чжэн: The CEO does manage all flop businesses under Vision. Уэйн Чжэн: But critical decisions like the addition or removal of farms are made by the board. -> Are they really shutting this farm down? Уэйн Чжэн: Yes, but not right away. Уэйн Чжэн: From the decision to the actual shutdown, the process should take 5 to 10 years. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: As far as I know, many board members are against this idea. <<#Simple(8)>> -> What is our position? Уэйн Чжэн: We are definitely against farm closure. <<#Simple(6)>> -> We, or just you? Уэйн Чжэн: Um... Тайлер Цао: Maybe not everyone, but I'm pretty sure the overwhelming majority of Screening is with Wayne. ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Thank you, Tyler. ; <> <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Silencio is a lifeline for the impoverished around here. I'm talking about hundreds of thousands. Уэйн Чжэн: I thought we had covered this before? -> Does that really change the fate of this farm? Уэйн Чжэн: I'm not sure. It might. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Тайлер Цао: Keep going, Wayne. What does that have to do with Mr. Liao? ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Ah, sorry. Уэйн Чжэн: My theory is that some board members are doing this to thwart the farm closure plan. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Like, paying us to fight harder? Уэйн Чжэн: No, it can't be that simple. Уэйн Чжэн: If they wanted to motivate us, they should have let us know about the incentive, right? Уэйн Чжэн: The fact is, they're trying hard to cover it up. -> For example, by channeling funds into Silencio to boost our balance sheets? Уэйн Чжэн: Yes. You're sharp. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: ... Уэйн Чжэн: Those directors against farm closure, I suppose, plan to spruce up Silencio's numbers to win over those still on the fence. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Giving us free money is the most effective way. Тайлер Цао: We are taking in a record number of contributors these days... ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> I thought having more contributors doesn't necessarily mean making more money? Тайлер Цао: I had the same question. Wayne came up with a plausible explanation. -> Not much of a plan, but it simply works. Тайлер Цао: Correct. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Taking in more contributors means we are providing for more of the unemployed population. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> For politicians, it means more votes. Уэйн Чжэн: Spot on! -> But that doesn't increase profit. Уэйн Чжэн: Profit is not their goal. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: For these directors, old farms like Silencio are not considered money makers anymore. Уэйн Чжэн: They want us to patch up the unemployment issue, in order to gain political leverage. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Do you understand what I'm talking about, Jason? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Sorry, you're starting to lose me. Уэйн Чжэн: Simply put, for every contributor we take in, there's one less unemployed person out there. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: This means a lot to politicians. For exchange, they may make policies in favor of Vision. <> -> That makes perfect sense. <<#EndSimple>> //if之前有說出朱力的名字 <<#If($ChuNameRemember=-3||$ChuNameRemember=-4)>> Уэйн Чжэн: Talking about the board, I managed to find something based on the name you provided. Уэйн Чжэн: Logan Chu, background, none. There's hardly anything about him in Vision's database. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: However, we found out that he used to work for the government. Уэйн Чжэн: His boss back then was Jordan Li. ; <> Тайлер Цао: Do you mean that Jordan Li...? ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Exactly. After retiring from the government, he joined Vision as a board director. <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Now we know which director is against farm closure. -> He had plenty of reasons to bring Logan Zhu over. //if有記得李姓 <<#If($ChuNameRemember=-2||$ChuNameRemember=-4)>> Уэйн Чжэн: And you said the person on the other end of the call was "Mr. Li". <<#EndIf>> Уэйн Чжэн: We have enough pieces to build a plausible case. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndIf>> Уэйн Чжэн: Now there's only one question. If Mr. Liao has been secretly working for a director... Уэйн Чжэн: Why did they take him away? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Because he exposed their secret plans? Уэйн Чжэн: No way. We didn't suspect a thing until that special agent showed up. ; <> Тайлер Цао: Maybe he told it to someone else? Уэйн Чжэн: That is a possibility, however... ; <> -> He failed to follow orders? Уэйн Чжэн: I agree with you. Уэйн Чжэн: This is the most likely reason. -> I can't think of any reason. <<#EndSimple>> Тайлер Цао: Because of those subsidies he gave out, maybe? ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Yeah. Members of the board gave us extra funding, hoping to take in more contributors. Тайлер Цао: However, Mr. Liao used the money to subsidize those in need. ; <> ; <> Тайлер Цао: Now they're angry and want answers. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Correct. Уэйн Чжэн: I thought it's just me overthinking. Now that Jason has confirmed the involvement of the board... ; <> ; <> Тайлер Цао: Our theory is basically confirmed. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> What should we do now? // -> Are you sure? Have we ruled out all other possibilities? Уэйн Чжэн: We don't know. The only way to find out is forward. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Based on what we know, I think it's time to contact those directors. Тайлер Цао: Direct contact? Is it even possible? ; <> ; <> Тайлер Цао: Plus, we don't know exactly which directors are against farm closure... Уэйн Чжэн: I have my network. ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Suppose we do make contact. What then? Уэйн Чжэн: I have a few ideas. -> I don't think this is a sound approach. Уэйн Чжэн: It's our only approach. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Once I manage to establish contact, I will offer to work for them in Mr. Liao's stead. ; <> Тайлер Цао: What? ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Their interest is aligned with ours. We are essentially on the same side. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Mr. Liao lacks flexibility. I would make a much better mole. Тайлер Цао: But— ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I will try to make a deal—they leave Mr. Liao alone, and I take over whatever he used to do. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> This could work. Тайлер Цао: Not you too, Jason... ; <> <> -> This is too risky. Тайлер Цао: Right, so many things could go wrong... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: I have made up my mind. Уэйн Чжэн: Just leave the rest to me. Тайлер Цао: Wayne... ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Hey, come on! It's a good thing! ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Weren't we worried sick about farm closure? Уэйн Чжэн: If this works out, it's not an issue anymore. Тайлер Цао: You're right. Уэйн Чжэн: All good, then. Уэйн Чжэн: Back to work, Tyler. Remember, don't tell anyone about this. Тайлер Цао: Alright. Тайлер Цао: ... ; <> Тайлер Цао: Just be careful, Wayne. Уэйн Чжэн: I will. //泰銘走調 <> Уэйн Чжэн: ... ; <> ; <> <> //啊偉坐下，垂頭喪氣 <<#Simple(8)>> -> Are you alright? <<@讓阿偉開始說他之前整個大搞啦>> Уэйн Чжэн: I... Уэйн Чжэн: No. ; <> <<#Simple(12)>> -> Because of Mr. Liao? -> Because of farm closure? -> Are you blaming yourself for what happened? Уэйн Чжэн: No. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: I, I'm just— Уэйн Чжэн: It's just that I was so sure that I did make this farm better. Уэйн Чжэн: I believed in helping contributors. Happy contributors generate more flops. We make more money and help even more contributors. Уэйн Чжэн: I thought I built a self-sustaining cycle. Уэйн Чжэн: Turns out we didn't make more money after all. Without this secret funding, we're nothing. Уэйн Чжэн: Today I realized we don't have what it takes to help anyone. Уэйн Чжэн: I'm such a failure. ; <> Внутренний голос: A heavy blow to his confidence... Уэйн Чжэн: ... <<#Simple(12)>> -> What's your plan going forward? -> Don't blame yourself. You have done your best. <<@阿偉開始說他雖然之前搞錯但他不會放棄得啦>> Уэйн Чжэн: ... Уэйн Чжэн: I'm not giving up. I don't think my goal is impractical. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: With today's lesson, I can see how far away that goal really is. Уэйн Чжэн: We can do so much going forward, starting with establishing contact with members of the board. ; <> -> You didn't fail. The real game is just beginning. Уэйн Чжэн: Jason... Уэйн Чжэн: You're right. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Thank you. I guess that's exactly what I need to hear. <> <<#GoTo(@阿偉開始說他雖然之前搞錯但他不會放棄得啦)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Sorry for tarnishing the morale. Уэйн Чжэн: And thank you again. I couldn't have proven my theory if not for you. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Your theory is not 100% proven yet, no? Уэйн Чжэн: Haha, yeah, right. -> No big deal. You're doing all the hard work. Уэйн Чжэн: Haha. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: You're free to go now. See you later. <> //if何歆翊好結局。 <<#If($ConvinceHeShinYeeWeiLove=3)>> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Bye. // -> Brighten up! Don't forget you have a date!($DLStateFloat) -> Happy dating.($DLStateFloat3) Уэйн Чжэн: Huh? How did you know? ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Did Cynthia tell you!? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Not important. Just take your chance. -> Yeah, I gave her a push. <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Cynthia did mention that she didn't make up her mind until she had a talk with you. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: And all this time I thought I was gonna take the initiative, haha... Уэйн Чжэн: I can't thank you enough, Jason. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Nah, don't mention it. Уэйн Чжэн: Ha, has anyone ever told you that you're cool? Внутренний голос: Yeah, 23 keeps telling me that... -> Thank me with a raise. Уэйн Чжэн: Haha, I'm afraid I can't. Уэйн Чжэн: But I'll buy you one heck of big dinner! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Bye, Jason. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Bye. // -> Let me know if you need anything. Уэйн Чжэн: ... Уэйн Чжэн: Yeah, thanks! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> // <<#GoTo(@啊委跟主角說廖哥事件結束可離開)>> -> I'll be going then? Уэйн Чжэн: Uh... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Sure. Thank you for helping me out. Уэйн Чжэн: ... <<#Simple(8)>> -> Bye. Уэйн Чжэн: Bye. -> Are you alright? <> <<#GoTo(@讓阿偉開始說他之前整個大搞啦)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: Bye, Jason. ; <> <<@啊委跟主角說廖哥事件結束可離開>> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Bye. // -> Let me know if you need anything. Уэйн Чжэн: ... Уэйн Чжэн: Yeah, thanks! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if沒查到，不做if Уэйн Чжэн: No. That's not enough. Уэйн Чжэн: All theories are baseless until we find out who took Mr. Liao. Тайлер Цао: What do we do, then? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> What's you guys' theory? Тайлер Цао: Not mine. Wayne came up with this theory... ; <> ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: It's nothing. Irrelevant. Уэйн Чжэн: It's no more than an assumption unless we find out who we are dealing with. ; <> ; <> -> So, we can't do anything? Уэйн Чжэн: Yes, for now. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: The issues you found in Mr. Liao's files, Tyler, they are worth pursuing. Тайлер Цао: Ah, yeah... ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: I will take over from here. Thank you both for your help. ; <> Тайлер Цао: So...that's it? ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: You have more ideas? ; <> Тайлер Цао: Nope... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Sorry, it's my fault. I didn't find anything useful. Уэйн Чжэн: Don't blame yourself. It was a desperate push. I didn't expect much. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: You tried your best. Уэйн Чжэн: If anything, I should apologize for wasting your time. ; <> -> I'm out of ideas, too. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Уэйн Чжэн: That's it, then. You both are dismissed. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Remember, don't tell anyone about this. If people ask, play dumb. Тайлер Цао: Yeah. Bye. ; <> Уэйн Чжэн: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> <<#End>>

title: 下車走進去
body:
//看到兩人再爭執，z軸前後吵架
<<Set($DidGetOffTheCar,true)>>
Йейл Янг: I don't get it! What are you doing this for!?
Внутренний голос: Liam Hsu!?
Лиам Хсу: You don't need to know. I...
Лиам Хсу: ...Jason Dai!? ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動返回)>>
Внутренний голос: He's holding a disruptor...
//小楊轉身
<<Set($DLState,小羊被抓包轉身)>>
Йейл Янг: Jason... ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外)>>
<<#Simple(12)>>
-> Mr. Hsu! Are you helping Yale take those things off?
    Йейл Янг: R-right! He's helping—
    Лиам Хсу: I'm helping myself, not him.
-> I see you're in this together.
    Лиам Хсу: Leave Yale out of it.
-> You're the saboteur, Liam Hsu.
    Лиам Хсу: ...
    Внутренний голос: He's not denying.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Йейл Янг: Don't jump to conclusions, Jason. Mr. Hsu is just—
Лиам Хсу: Yes, I installed these disruptors. I admit. ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動)>> ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外返回)>>
<<#Simple(10)>>
-> You're a good actor.
-> Why?
    Лиам Хсу: ...
    Внутренний голос: He doesn't want to answer?
-> Do you have any idea how many people you're hurting?
    Лиам Хсу: I do.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Йейл Янг: Why can't you just wait for me outside, Jason? ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> You were acting weird. I have to check on you.
-> I was worried about you.
-> Then what? Let you cover up for him?
<<#EndSimple>>
Йейл Янг: I—
Лиам Хсу: You heard me. ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動返回)>>
Лиам Хсу: Yale doesn't know a thing about it. It's me all along. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Doesn't know a thing? He told me to wait outside.
    Лиам Хсу: ...You did that? ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動)>>
    Йейл Янг: I did...
    Лиам Хсу: ...
    Лиам Хсу: How did you know I'm here? ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置激動返回)>>
    <<#GoTo(@小楊說明他怎麼知道許大哥再地窖電梯搞事)>>
-> Doesn't know a thing? How did he know you're here?
    <<@小楊說明他怎麼知道許大哥再地窖電梯搞事>>
    Йейл Янг: I didn't know for sure, although... ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動說明)>>
    Йейл Янг: Hearing it from Packs, I had this hunch.
    Йейл Янг: Mr. Hsu said he had errands to run. So he called me over to cover for him.
    Йейл Янг: I've hardly ever seen him in such a hurry. Plus, he looked very nervous. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動說明返回)>>
    Йейл Янг: So I followed him out, trying to make sure he's OK. But he was already in a car, driving towards the elevator.
    Йейл Янг: I didn't suspect anything back then... ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動低頭)>>
    Йейл Янг: Until they located a disruptor here.
    Йейл Янг: ...
    Йейл Янг: I was hoping it's not Mr. Hsu when we arrived. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動低頭返回)>>
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Лиам Хсу: ...
Лиам Хсу: Enough talk. Take me to Justin. ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置低頭)>>
Лиам Хсу: He sent you to disarm these disruptors, right?
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> You're willing to go with us, just like that?
    Лиам Хсу: I should have turned myself in, a long time ago.
    Лиам Хсу: Now it's too late.
-> What made you think it's him?
    Лиам Хсу: Only he knows the Cella this well.
    Лиам Хсу: ...
    Лиам Хсу: And he's the only one who cares so much about the Cellar.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Йейл Янг: Mr. Hsu...
Лиам Хсу: I figure they're all waiting in the office? ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置低頭返回)>>
Йейл Янг: ...Yeah. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動低頭)>>
Лиам Хсу: Then I should confess while everyone is present.
Йейл Янг: ...
Йейл Янг: Wait... ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動低頭返回)>>
Йейл Янг: Before we go, let's make up a story. Please.
Лиам Хсу: Yale...
Йейл Янг: Please, Jason! ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外)>>
Йейл Янг: Mr. Hsu must have his reasons. Please help me keep this a secret for now.
Йейл Янг: I beg you.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> OK. I agree that he must have his reasons. ; <<Set($DLState,答應小楊幫許世良掩護)>>
    Йейл Янг: Thank you.
    Йейл Янг: ...
-> No. Think about all those people he hurt!
    Йейл Янг: I know, but...
-> Sorry, no can do.
    Йейл Янг: But...
<<#EndSimple>>
Йейл Янг: If they know about this, Ms. Hsu is done for!
Лиам Хсу: Yale Yang! ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動看外返回)>>
Лиам Хсу: Enough.
Лиам Хсу: What I did was wrong. Plain and simple. ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置低頭)>>
Лиам Хсу: Don't try to make excuses for me.
//if答應幫忙
<<#If($DLState=答應小楊幫許世良掩護)>>
    Лиам Хсу: Jason Dai. Thank you for your good intentions, however...
<<#EndIf>>
Лиам Хсу: I screwed up. ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置低頭返回)>>
Лиам Хсу: I failed you, all of you.
Лиам Хсу: It's only a matter of time that I get caught. ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置說話)>>
Лиам Хсу: Now is the time to face consequences that are long overdue.
Лиам Хсу: I can't take this guilt anymore.
Лиам Хсу: Let me explain everything to Justin. Please. ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_裝置說話返回)>>
Йейл Янг: ... ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手)>>
Йейл Янг: I see.
Лиам Хсу: Yeah.
Лиам Хсу: Let's go. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手低頭)>>
//許大哥走調
<<Set($DLState,許大哥被抓包後走回車上)>>
<<#Wait(2)>>
Йейл Янг: ...
Йейл Янг: ... ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Are you alright?
    Йейл Янг: No... ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手看外)>>
    Йейл Янг: But thank you nonetheless.
    Внутренний голос: That was the saddest smile I've seen. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手看外返回)>>
-> Why didn't you just tell me you thought it's Mr. Hsu?
    Йейл Янг: I was hoping against hope that it's not him... ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手看外)>>
    Йейл Янг: Even if it was him, I was still hoping...
    <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手看外返回)>>
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Йейл Янг: ...
Йейл Янг: Let's go. ; <<PlayUntil(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_激動放手低頭)>>
Йейл Янг: Time to see Justin.
<<#End>>

title: 等到最後車上談話
body:

Йейл Янг: Sorry for keeping you waiting. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外)>>

-> ...

    Джастин Ву(c): Jason, Yale, come back to the office, right now. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>> ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> But we just disarmed one disruptor.
    -> Why such hurry?
        Джастин Ву(c): Just come back now and you will know.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<CloseCommunicator()>>
