    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Maybe they had some really big discovery.
        Йейл Янг: Could be.
    -> Someone got hurt?
        Йейл Янг: Huh? What made you think so?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> No idea. Just a random guess.
        -> When people are this urgent, there's usually bleeding involved.
        <<#EndSimple>>
    -> I have no idea.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Йейл Янг: Hmm...
    Йейл Янг: Whatever it is, let's just hurry up. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內返回)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>>
    <<#End>>    
<<#EndIf>>


//if沒留采欣
<<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false)>>
    Джастин Ву(c): ... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>>
    Джастин Ву(c): Yale, Jason? ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> What's up?
    -> Yeah, we're both here.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Джастин Ву(c): Hmm...
    Джесси Лай(c): Tell them already!
    Джастин Ву(c): Did you find any disruptor?
    Йейл Янг: Um, we did...? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外)>>
    Джастин Ву(c): OK. Now come back to the office.
    Йейл Янг: Why? We just disarmed one. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車低頭)>>
    Джастин Ву(c): It doesn't matter anymore. Jesse and Packs have found a way to disarm them all from here. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> Shouldn't we take them down, as well?
        Джастин Ву(c): That is true, but we can take our time.
    -> Can they do that?
        Джастин Ву(c): I have the same question, but Jesse is absolutely confident.
        Джесси Лай(c): Trust me, I'm the professional!
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Йейл Янг: Didn't they say we need to find more disruptors to backtrace the remote control signal?
    Джастин Ву(c): It's complicated. Will explain later.
    Джастин Ву(c): Come back now. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車低頭返回)>>
    <<CloseCommunicator()>>
    Йейл Янг: He hung up.
    Йейл Янг: What's happening? ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> I'm feeling like a fool, running around for nothing.
    -> Less work is always good.
        Йейл Янг: Haha, can't argue with that...
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Йейл Янг: Let's go. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內返回)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看外返回)>>
    <<#End>>
<<#EndIf>>

title: 有下車走廊遇到大夥
body:
//if 有讓采欣待著
<<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true)>>
    //走道安裝發送走廊，發現采欣胖胖賴潔都坐在外面
    Пакстон Ло: You're back! Do you know that Cathy— ; <<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站插腰左看)>>
    Джесси Лай: Don't bother, Packs. ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站看內)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
    Джесси Лай: They already know. ; <<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯捧臉轉左看)>>
    Пакстон Ло: Mr. Hsu... ; <<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站插腰左看返回正站左看)>>
    Джесси Лай: Liam Hsu, why the fuck are you doing this?
    Внутренний голос: They know it, too? How come? ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看內返回)>>
    Лиам Хсу: Let's talk inside. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回)>> ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站看內返回)>>
    Джесси Лай: You broke his heart. Do you know that?
    Лиам Хсу: ... ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站低頭)>>
    Лиам Хсу: I know.
    Джесси Лай: You don't know shit. What the hell are you thinking? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>> ; <<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯左看激動)>> ; <<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站左看低頭)>>
    Джесси Лай: I thought I've finally found a team of good people. Turns out there are trash like you everywhere! ; <<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_側站手後看內)>> ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭)>>
    Кэти Се: Jesse!
    Кэти Се: That's enough. ; <<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯左看激動返回)>>
    Джесси Лай: ... ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站低頭返回)>>
    Джесси Лай: Justin is waiting inside. ; <<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_側站手後看內返回)>> ; <<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯左看返回)>> ; <<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站左看低頭返回)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回)>>;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>


//if 沒讓采欣待著
<<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false)>>
    //走道安裝發送走廊，發現胖胖賴潔都坐在外面
    Пакстон Ло: Why are you guys back? We only called Cathy. ; <<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯捧臉轉左看)>> ; <<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站插腰左看)>>
    <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> What are you doing outside?
        //if第一次選過作這裡幹嘛
        <<#If($AskWhyLaiJeDrinkCoffee=true)>>
            Джесси Лай: Can't I have a cup of coffee and chill?
            Джесси Лай: It's a free country, dude! Haha.
        <<#EndIf>>
        Пакстон Ло: We found a way to have the predictive AI model do the job. Now we can take a break.
    -> We found something.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Пакстон Ло: Eh? Mr. Hsu? What are you doing here? ; <<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站插腰左看返回正站左看)>> ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站看內)>>
    Лиам Хсу: ... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回)>> ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看內返回)>>
    Джесси Лай: What is it?
    Внутренний голос: Jesse sounds hostile. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
    Пакстон Ло: Yeah, and what's with the crappy faces?
    Лиам Хсу: Is Justin in the office? ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭)>> ; <<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站看內返回)>>
    Джесси Лай: ...He is.
    Внутренний голос: I can tell that Jesse is starting to figure it out...
    //許大哥走進操作組辦公室
    <<Set($DLState,許大哥跟小楊走進操作組辦公室)>>
    Джесси Лай: ... ; <<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_看內返回)>> ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭返回)>> ; <<Play(賴潔,MBU_賴潔_階梯左看返回)>> ; <<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_正站左看返回)>>
    Пакстон Ло: Eh...? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回)>>
    Джесси Лай: Let's go, Packs.
    Пакстон Ло: S-sure?
    //其他人都走回辦公室
<<#EndIf>>

title: 最後進到操作辦公室
body: //if沒下車+沒讓采欣留下 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false&&$DidGetOffTheCar=false)>> //吳俊恩斜坐側站、賴潔回座位斜坐 Джастин Ву: Sorry for sending you on a wild-goose chase. <<#Simple(8)>> -> What's the situation now? -> Not a problem at all. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джесси Лай: Your genius Jesse has found out that these disruptors' remote control network is based on triangulation location. ; <> Джесси Лай: We can grab control by erasing the ID flag and backtracing the coordinates. Внутренний голос: Huh? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Huh? -> Speak English, please. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Пакстон Ло: That's not how you explain things to the average layperson... Кэйли Чен: In other words, we can control all disruptors as long as we have three of them. ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: Then shut down them all with one button! ; <> Кэти Се: How about finding their controller? ; <> Джесси Лай: That, hmm... Пакстон Ло: She can't. Джесси Лай: Can't yet. All I need is a bit more time... ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: That means we won't find out who's the culprit, right...? ; <> ; <> Кэйли Чен: Correct. ; <> Джесси Лай: Hey! I said I need a bit more ti— ; <> Джастин Ву: About the identity of the culprit, Packs has something to say. ; <> <> Пакстон Ло: Ah, yes. Uh... ; <> ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: Basically, we can narrow down the list of suspects to employees of this farm. ; <> Пакстон Ло: Or more specifically, the Cellar staff. Пакстон Ло: I'll spare you of the technical specifics. Пакстон Ло: These disruptors are connected to Silencio's intranet. Пакстон Ло: You know what a pain in the ass Vision can be when it comes to data security. Whoever has access to the intranet has to be an insider. Пакстон Ло: I'm trying to narrow the list down even further. It's tough, but doable. ; <> Йейл Янг: ... ; <> Кэти Се: That's it? ; <> ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Yeah, we have done everything that can be done. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: The bottom line is, we don't have any imminent threat anymore, not that Jesse can shut down all disruptors. ; <> Джастин Ву: I will take care of the rest. You're all free to go. Джастин Ву: Thank you again, and sorry for that wild-goose chase. ; <> Кэти Се: I don't mind! ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> I can go now? Джастин Ву: Yes. ; <> Джастин Ву: Not go home. Jason, Cathy, Yale, return to your original posts. -> Can I help you with anything else? Джастин Ву: Not now, but maybe soon. Джастин Ву: I will let you know. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: Meeting adjourned. Stand by for further instructions. Пакстон Ло: Bye. ; <> Джесси Лай: Bye. ; <> Кэти Се: Bye. ; <> Кэйли Чен: Bye. ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> <> //三人離開 Джастин Ву: Oh, right. ; <> Джастин Ву: Come here for a moment, Jason. <<#Simple(6)>> -> What is it? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: ... Джастин Ву: I'm glad that you chose Ops. ; <> Джастин Ву: You have seen a lot of ugly things since yesterday. For that I'm sorry. Джастин Ву: But this is the norm in the Cellar. Джастин Ву: This farm is a sick place. Naturally, your job includes inhumane tasks. ; <> Джастин Ву: ... ; <> Джастин Ву: What I'm trying to say is, if you think it's unacceptable... Джастин Ву: Don't hesitate to let me know. ; <> Джастин Ву: You're not obliged to force yourself. I wouldn't want you to. Джастин Ву: Do you understand? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Yes. -> I'm OK. I know what I'm getting into. <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: Right. Внутренний голос: A sad smile... Джастин Ву: That's all I wanted to say. ; <> Джастин Ву: Now you're dismissed for sure. See you later. <<#Simple(6)>> -> See you later. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if沒下車+有讓采欣留下 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true&&$DidGetOffTheCar=false)>> //吳俊恩斜坐抱頭 Внутренний голос: What's the situation now...? ; <> Джастин Ву: Where is he? ; <> Джесси Лай: He said he'll be here soon. ; <> Джастин Ву: ... Йейл Янг: What do we do now? Джастин Ву: Yale, you— ; <> ; <> ; <> Лиам Хсу: Here I am. ; <> ; <> ; <> ; <> ; <> //攝影機tag許大哥 Йейл Янг: Mr. Hsu!? Why did you— ; <> ; <> Лиам Хсу: Quiet, Yale. ; <> ; <> Лиам Хсу: ... Джастин Ву: ... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> What's going on now? -> Mr. Hsu? What is he doing here? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: Liam Hsu is the one who controls these disruptors. Внутренний голос: What? But he...? ; <> Йейл Янг: It can't be true! How could he— ; <> Лиам Хсу: Enough, Yale. Don't bother to cover it up. ; <> Йейл Янг: But... ; <> Джастин Ву: Cover it up? Yale knows all along? Внутренний голос: Justin's shocked. ; <> Лиам Хсу: He doesn't. He just saw me taking a disruptor off near the elevator. ; <> Внутренний голос: He told me to wait in the car. So that was for...? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> You didn't tell me. Are you trying to cover up for him? Лиам Хсу: You did that? I told you not to. ; <> Лиам Хсу: I'm responsible for what I did. You have nothing to do with it. <> -> No. Yale knew about it, and told me to stay in the car. Лиам Хсу: Yale was not sure. He just saw me going to the elevator earlier. ; <> Лиам Хсу: He didn't suspect anything until you brought up the disruptor. Лиам Хсу: He's a smart boy. ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Йейл Янг: I did... Джастин Ву: I have no doubt about Yale. You did it on your own. ; <> ; <> Лиам Хсу: Correct. ; <> ; <> <<#GoTo(@俊恩一個苦惱許大哥到底在銃三小)>> <<#EndIf>> //if有下車+有讓采欣留下 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true&&$DidGetOffTheCar=true)>> //吳俊恩斜坐抱頭 <> <<@俊恩一個苦惱許大哥到底在銃三小>> Джастин Ву: ... ; <> Джастин Ву: ... ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Why? Лиам Хсу: Because I must accelerate the process of farm closure. Джастин Ву: ...What? ; <> ; <> Лиам Хсу: I thought a malfunctioning Cellar would urge the board to make up their mind. Джастин Ву: ... ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: I thought about all possibilities. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: You could be doing it for the money... Джастин Ву: Or you could be trying to take revenge on somebody... Джастин Ву: I could deal with these scenarios. They make sense. ; <> Джастин Ву: But now you're telling me you hurt so many people, to shut down the farm?? Джастин Ву: Are you nuts? We want this farm shut down to avoid hurting people! ; <> <>;<> <<#EndIf>> //if有下車+沒讓采欣留下 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false&&$DidGetOffTheCar=true)>> //吳俊恩斜坐抱頭 Джастин Ву: Hm? Why are you coming back? ; <> Джастин Ву: The simulation is still runnin— Джастин Ву: Mr. Hsu? Лиам Хсу: Justin... ; <> Лиам Хсу: I installed those disruptors. Джастин Ву: You... ; <> ; <> <>;<> Джастин Ву: ... Джастин Ву: ... ; <> Джастин Ву: Why? Лиам Хсу: Because I must accelerate the process of farm closure. ; <> Джастин Ву: ...What? ; <> Лиам Хсу: I thought a malfunctioning Cellar would urge the board to make up their mind. Джастин Ву: ... ; <> <<#EndIf>> Джастин Ву: You want to save people...by hurting them? Джастин Ву: Listen to yourself! Are you making any sense? ; <> Джастин Ву: Do you really believe you're doing good!? ; <> Лиам Хсу: No, this is not what I intended... Джастин Ву: What happened, happened! Your intention doesn't matter! ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: I don't know what you are thinking, what are you excuses. Джастин Ву: But whatever reason you had, you should have talked to me! ; <> Джастин Ву: The last thing you should do is to screw around on your own! Лиам Хсу: ... ; <> Лиам Хсу: I'm sorry. Лиам Хсу: I failed you all. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: ... ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: How did this happen...? ; <> Джастин Ву: Where did you get these disruptors? ; <> Лиам Хсу: Kevin Hu. He gave them to me. ; <> ; <> ; <> Кэти Се: The Ops lead? Пакстон Ло: That asshole!? ; <> Джастин Ву: Go on. Talk. ; <> Лиам Хсу: Last year he called me to his office and bombarded me with questions. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Questions, like what? Лиам Хсу: About farm closure. He wanted to know what I thought. ; <> Лиам Хсу: ... Лиам Хсу: He said if I could cause malfunctions every once in a while, the board will eventually make up their mind. Лиам Хсу: Then he gave me these disruptors. ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> And you did as he said? Лиам Хсу: I thought it's a good idea. We both wanted to shut this terrible place down. -> And where did he get disruptors from? Лиам Хсу: What? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> How could a farm executive possess these things? -> They are military grade. You can't just buy them in the market. Джастин Ву: Good point. Лиам Хсу: I don't know. But I'm sure he's backed by someone higher up. Лиам Хсу: This backer of his wants to shut down this farm. He was transferred here as part of the plan. ; <> Лиам Хсу: That's why no one could oust him from the office, not even the farm manager. Джесси Лай: And I thought he was just a harmless asshole... <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: You agreed to work with him like that? By putting so many people at risk? ; <> Лиам Хсу: I didn't intend to. My plan was to cause small troubles here and there. ; <> Лиам Хсу: I never tampered with any critical system. I swear. Джесси Лай: How do you explain yesterday? ; <> ; <> Лиам Хсу: ... Джастин Ву: He did it? ; <> ; <> Лиам Хсу: Yes. He set all disruptors to maximum power and activated them all at once, without telling me. Лиам Хсу: I never thought anyone could have done that, not even him. ; <> Джастин Ву: The board is about to call for a meeting regarding farm closure. He must be desperate to make a point. ; <> Йейл Янг: That's why you punched him? ; <> Джастин Ву: What do you mean? ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: I've been thinking, ever since I found out it's you... ; <> Йейл Янг: About your rage yesterday, about that punch. Йейл Янг: How can you live with yourself? Лиам Хсу: ... Йейл Янг: At least now I know you're a bad man, Mr. Hsu. ; <> Лиам Хсу: No, I am a bad man. I'm rotten. ; <> ; <> Лиам Хсу: I deserve punishment. Джастин Ву: Your feelings don't matter, Mr. Hsu. ; <> Джастин Ву: Our priority is to minimize the damage you caused, and prevent the situation from getting worse. ; <> Пакстон Ло: But we don't have the whole truth yet? ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: Who is Kevin Hu's backer? Джесси Лай: And we won't find out any time soon. The asshole is hospitalized thanks to Mr. Hsu here. ; <> ; <> ; <> Лиам Хсу: ... ; <> Джастин Ву: ... ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: It's someone on the board. ; <> Пакстон Ло: Hm? Джастин Ву: I heard some directors of the board want to have Silencio shut down. Джастин Ву: Not all of them. After all, Silencio is still a source of profit. ; <> Джастин Ву: I guess one or more pro-closure directors planned this mess. ; <> Джастин Ву: To convince the others that we are in no operating condition. Пакстон Ло: Directors of the board plotting against us? Джастин Ву: Did Hu ever mention anything about the board or specific directors, Mr. Hsu? Лиам Хсу: ... ; <> Лиам Хсу: No. Лиам Хсу: But there was a special agent from HQ, telling him to "speed it up". ; <> Лиам Хсу: I remember that guy, because he showed a board-issued pass. Джастин Ву: That confirms the involvement of directors. ; <> Джастин Ву: ... Джастин Ву: I'm going. Пакстон Ло: What? Where? ; <> ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: To HQ. Джесси Лай: Are you sure about this, Justin? ; <> Джастин Ву: I am. Джастин Ву: I convince pro-closure directors to let me replace Hu. ; <> Джастин Ву: I'm a better fit, as either their agent or the division lead. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> You want to take over everything from Hu? Джастин Ву: Yes. Джастин Ву: But not in his stupid style. -> You want a promotion out of it? Джастин Ву: I want a chance to right all the wrongs out of it. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэйли Чен: ...I will contact HQ for an appointment. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Thank you, Kaylee. ; <> Джастин Ву: And... ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Mr. Hsu. Джастин Ву: I won't advise you on what to do next. ; <> Джастин Ву: Think about how to clean up after yourself. Лиам Хсу: ... ; <> Лиам Хсу: I'll remove all disruptors first. ; <> Джастин Ву: That is a good start. <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true)>> Джастин Ву: And you, Cathy. Кэти Се: Ah, yes? ; <> Кэти Се: What do you want me to do? Джастин Ву: You did well today. Кэти Се: Oh. ; <> <<#EndIf>> Джастин Ву: I must be on my way. ; <> Лиам Хсу: Me, too. I have disruptors to take care of. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: So much for today, everyone. Джастин Ву: I'll leave the office to you, Jesse. Джесси Лай: ...You can count on me. Джастин Ву: Let's go, Mr. Hsu. //俊恩走調。 <> <<#Wait(3)>> Джесси Лай: ... ; <> Пакстон Ло: ... ; <> Пакстон Ло: So...what do we do now? ; <> Джесси Лай: Now that Mr. Hsu is removing all disruptors, we don't have much to do here. ; <> Джесси Лай: Feel free to go home if you want to. Йейл Янг: I'm going home, then. ; <> ; <> <>;<>;<>;<> <<#Wait(3)>> Джесси Лай: ... Кэти Се: Yale is... ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: He needs some quiet time. ; <> Кэти Се: ...Yeah. ; <> Джесси Лай: Go back to Screening, Cathy. You have work to do there. ; <> Кэти Се: ... Кэти Се: Sure. Bye. ; <> Кэти Се: Good work today, everyone. <>;<> Джесси Лай: What about you, Packs? Пакстон Ло: Me...? ; <> Пакстон Ло: I want to stay for a while. Пакстон Ло: I have this feeling that we must have forgotten something... ; <> Джесси Лай: Packs. Пакстон Ло: Just a quick double check! ; <> Джесси Лай: ... ; <> Джесси Лай: Okay. Джесси Лай: As to you, Kaylee... Кэйли Чен: I'm contacting HQ for Justin's appointment. Then I'll make a report of today's events. ; <> Джесси Лай: Meticulous as ever. ; <> Джесси Лай: Now, you, Jason... ; <> Джесси Лай: Just go home. title: 核心事件後回到建修組
body: //晉電梯裡一段時間不講話(兩人喘氣？)隆生全程摸傷口 Лоуренс Чжан: Ouch! ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> What was that? // -> Are you OK? Лоуренс Чжан: Sure, just feeling a bit numb, haha... Внутренний голос: He looks pale... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Did Vision send those mercenaries, or...? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why would they need mercenaries? Лоуренс Чжан: I'm confused, too... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: But if they did hire mercenaries, there has to be some big secret to keep. <> -> I don't think Vision sent them. Лоуренс Чжан: Then how did they get into the Flop Core? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> How did we get into the Flop Core? Лоуренс Чжан: Um... Лоуренс Чжан: You have a point. -> Right. In that case, they must be working for Vision. <<#EndSimple>> <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Hopefully Nin knows something. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Not counting on it. She has no idea who we're dealing with. Лоуренс Чжан: Don't be so sure. Nin and 23 know all sorts of people. Лоуренс Чжан: Just a description might ring a bell. -> Say, why did you insist on going into the Flop Core alone? Лоуренс Чжан: Will explain later. Promise. ; <> Внутренний голос: Looks like I can't get an answer now... Лоуренс Чжан: ... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Um, Jason... <<#GoTo(@拜託別跟寧姊說我堅持一人進去)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Um, Jason... <<@拜託別跟寧姊說我堅持一人進去>> Лоуренс Чжан: Please don't tell Nin that I went into the Flop Core alone. Would you? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Why? Лоуренс Чжан: I, uh, I have reasons. So, please...? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> OK. ; <> -> Depends. I'll be the judge of that. Лоуренс Чжан: Oh... ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> But you must tell me what this is all about later. Лоуренс Чжан: ...I promise. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> No. I have to tell her. Лоуренс Чжан: ... Лоуренс Чжан: OK, I see. <> <<#EndSimple>> -> No. I have to tell her. Лоуренс Чжан: ... Лоуренс Чжан: OK, I see. <> <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Ah! The data! ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Phew. I thought I dropped it. Лоуренс Чжан: Once up there, we call Nin pronto, and immediately go to the van for rendezvous. ; <> ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: ...After that encounter, Vision could be on high alert now. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Maybe there's an all-out war waiting for us up there. Лоуренс Чжан: I still think we're wasting time. Should have busted Shane Yan last night. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Can't let trash like him walk around. The footage Frances recorded is enough to justify an arrest. Внутренний голос: Can't argue with that... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Yeah, maybe we should have caught their leader first. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I know, right? -> But Situ said we must do a thorough investigation first. Лоуренс Чжан: She did say that. What do you think, Jason? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I'd say we should arrest Shane Yan first, too. ; <> -> Acting before we see the whole picture could screw it up. -> I don't want to think. Just do whatever she says. Лоуренс Чжан: ... <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: If we still can't find any clue in this data we retrieved... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: ... Лоуренс Чжан: Then I'll try to convince Nin to go after Shane Yan. Лоуренс Чжан: Will you support me, Jason? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Of course. We should have done that yesterday. Лоуренс Чжан: Great. With what just happened, plus your support... Лоуренс Чжан: I'm positive that she will change her mind. -> I still think we should follow through with the investigation. Лоуренс Чжан: Follow through? <<@到隆生覺得主角說話像司徒寧理性>> Лоуренс Чжан: You sound exactly like Nin... <<#Simple(8)>> -> Is that a bad thing? -> You don't approve? Лоуренс Чжан: No, it's just that... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //if剛剛說也同意先逮捕嚴勝和 <<#If($AgreedShouldTakeYenFirst=true)>> Лоуренс Чжан: Didn't you just agree that we should arrest him first...? Лоуренс Чжан: How come... <<#EndIf>> Лоуренс Чжан: You and Nin, you're like robots, always talking about the big picture, thinking it over, so on and so forth. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I don't mean it's wrong. But... Лоуренс Чжан: How could you be so detached when bad people like that remain at large? ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: You... <<#Simple(8)>> -> You mean, we're heartless? Лоуренс Чжан: ...A little, maybe. -> I'm forcing myself to put personal feelings aside. Лоуренс Чжан: ... Лоуренс Чжан: Oh. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: ...We can leave that discussion for later. -> What we need is an open discussion, not taking sides. <<#GoTo(@到隆生覺得主角說話像司徒寧理性)>> <<#EndSimple>> //這裡切鋼骨區 <> Лоуренс Чжан: Hey, we're almost there. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: We might need to evacuate immediately, Jason. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Evacuate from Silencio? Лоуренс Чжан: Yes. It's not safe here. -> We're not gonna find a battalion of cops waiting for us when this door opens, are we? Лоуренс Чжан: ... ; <> Внутренний голос: He's seriously considering this possibility... Лоуренс Чжан: N-no! That's not possible...right? Haha... ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Radio doesn't work down there. It will take Vision a while to find out. <<#Simple(8)>> -> But we must act fast. Лоуренс Чжан: Agreed. -> Don't we look suspicious if we leave the farm now? Лоуренс Чжан: You're right... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I'll leave the decision to Nin. Лоуренс Чжан: But 23 will definitely wipe us from the surveillance records. ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Now, time to move. ; <> <<#End>>

You didn't do anything. ; <> Квентин Цю: If you did your thing, we wouldn't be caught in the first place. Квентин Цю: We told you to keep Auntie occupied. <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> I'm sorry! -> Hey! I tried! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Квентин Цю: Alright! I'm not accusing. Haha! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Квентин Цю: But seriously, I can't afford to risk it again. <<#Simple(10)>> -> Okay. Квентин Цю: Ah, just like Jeff. ; <> Квентин Цю: ... Квентин Цю: But if Auntie catches me again... <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> She won't be back any time soon. Квентин Цю: Right! Квентин Цю: Hmm... ; <> <<#GoTo(@球球心軟答應偷開門囉)>> -> You won't get caught! Квентин Цю: You don't know that. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Квентин Цю: I'd better not. <<#GoTo(@球球說不能幫進阿姨辦公室)>> -> Personal stuff. Квентин Цю: What personal stuff? Now I'm interested. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I don't want to tell. <<@跟球球說不能說調啥在辦公室>> Квентин Цю: Huh? Then I don't want to help. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Important personal stuff. Квентин Цю: Important, huh... ; <> <<#GoTo(@球球心軟答應偷開門囉)>> -> Does it even matter? Квентин Цю: Hmm... ; <> Квентин Цю: You're right. It's all the same to me. Внутренний голос: Phew. That was easy. <<#GoTo(@球球心軟答應偷開門囉)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Квентин Цю: I'd better not. <<#GoTo(@球球說不能幫進阿姨辦公室)>> -> My apartment key. Квентин Цю: Damn. You could have told me it's just a key. Would you help me? -> Slipped out of my pocket. <<#EndSimple>> <<@球球心軟答應偷開門囉>> Квентин Цю: Sure, sure! ; <> Квентин Цю: Just this once! Because I promised you. Квентин Цю: Let's go! <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> -> That is classified. <<#GoTo(@跟球球說不能說調啥在辦公室)>> <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<@球球說不能幫進阿姨辦公室>> Квентин Цю: We have IIB agents everywhere. body:

    <<#EndSimple>>

    <<#EndSimple>>

<<#EndIf>>

<<#End>>

title: 插錯孔
body:
//差錯，發出一聲警報
23(c): Hey! What the heck did you do? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Nothing. I plug the decryption device in.
    23(c): It's the wrong port!
-> I probably picked a wrong port.
<<#EndSimple>>
//if有問插孔是哪個
<<#If($DLStateFloat=1)>>
    23(c): Didn't I explain everything??
<<#EndIf>>
//if沒問插孔是哪個
<<#If($DLStateFloat=-1)>>
    23(c): Why didn't you ask if you're not sure?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Why didn't you explain if you knew there are multiple of them?
        23(c): Okay, alright.
    -> Sorry, I thought there's just one port.
        23(c): Gah!
    -> So, which port should it be?
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>
23(c): A square one, with light dots around it.
23(c): Look around for it! ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 閃許大哥成功
body:

<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Liam Hsu, a racker.
    <<@跟23說自己遇到許世良囉啦>>
    23(c): Oh? My intel says he's a senior racker.
    23(c): What is he doing here? Racking is suspended.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> To repair stuff, maybe?
        23(c): Just himself? Touch and go?
        23(c): Unlikely.
    -> Maybe he left something at work?
        23(c): Probably.
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Just a worker.

        <<#GoTo(@跟23說自己遇到許世良囉啦)>>

    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): As long as you're not caught. Go on.
23(c): Turn on the elevator. The control panel is in the far back.
<<#End>>

title: 跟升降梯控制面板互動
body:
Терминал С-2: Welcome to the office control system.
Терминал С-2: Verifying user identity...
//if篩選組
<<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>>
    Терминал С-2: Not a member of Operations Division. Access denied.
    Терминал С-2: Ddddd denied security check dddd...
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    -> Something's not right. ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭)>>
    -> 23, this damn thing is acting up. ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭)>>
    -> ... ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Терминал С-2: Identity verified. Welcome, Jason Dai Cool Guy 666.
    Внутренний голос: Cool Guy 666...?
    23(c): The elevator is on. You're welcome. ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> What's with that name?
        23(c): Hee hee.
    -> Thank you.
        23(c): You're welcome, Cool Guy 666.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#End>>
<<#EndIf>>
//if操作組
<<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>>
    Терминал С-2: Member of Operations Division. Jason Dai. Verified.
    Терминал С-2: Caution. External power supply failure. Certain functions are down.
    <<@回去好好操作操作組辦公室介面>>
    Терминал С-2: Please select action.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Activate: Elevator.
        Терминал С-2: Action complete.
    -> Activate: Indoor lighting.
        Терминал С-2: Lighting is on. ; <<Set($DLState,偷開燈讓23阻止開燈)>>
        23(c): Oi! Idiot! ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭)>>
        23(c): Are you trying to alert everybody?
        Терминал С-2: Lighting is off. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭返回)>> ; <<Set($DLState,偷開燈讓23阻止關燈)>>
        23(c): I've turned off the lights. Also called the elevator down for you.
        23(c): Get into the control room. Now.
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        -> You can control this panel from there?
            23(c): Need you to turn the terminal on first.
            23(c): OK, get moving.
        -> Sorry, I thought it's too dark in here.
            23(c): Use your brain, dude.
            23(c): OK, get moving.
        -> ...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        <<#End>>
    -> Activate: Cellar surveillance.
        Терминал С-2: Failure establishing connection. Action failed.
        <<#GoTo(@回去好好操作操作組辦公室介面)>>
    -> Activate: Communication system.
        Терминал С-2: Failure establishing connection. Action failed.
        <<#GoTo(@回去好好操作操作組辦公室介面)>>
    23(c): That was easy. I'm glad you chose Ops.
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#End>>;//升降梯降下來
<<#EndIf>>

title: 進入控制室準備插破解器
body:
//進入控制室以後
23(c): Are you inside? ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Yeah, I'm in.
    23(c): Good.
-> How did you know? You have no visual.
    23(c): Radio interference from the system inside.
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): There should be a big ass console right in front of you. Look for a port. ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭)>>
<<Set($DLStateFloat,0)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Looking.
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,-1)>>
-> What does it look like?
    <<Set($DLStateFloat,1)>>
    23(c): A square one, with light dots around it.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Find it and plug the decryption device in.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> That's it?
    23(c): Neat, huh? Designed by yours truly.
    23(c): I always say, user experience is a thing.
    Внутренний голос: I can't tell if she's serious...
-> Roger.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
23(c): Hurry up, Jason. I saw a bunch of people coming down to the Cellar. ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話抬頭返回)>>
23(c): Shuttle destination, this office.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Who are they?
    23(c): Don't have visual. But the access log says they are HQ staff.
-> OK. I'm trying.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 跟何歆翊搭電梯過程
body: Синтия Хо: *Sigh* ; <> Синтия Хо: *Sigh* Внутренний голос: ...? ; <> ; <> Синтия Хо: Don't you think they should put a chair or bench in this elevator? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why? Синтия Хо: Because the ride is super long, on top of the super long wait up there. -> Sounds like a great idea. Синтия Хо: Right? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Синтия Хо: I should weld a bench onto this elevator myself... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Can you do that? Синтия Хо: One welding machine and some steel bars. Of course I can! ; <> Внутренний голос: I mean, is it allowed...? <> -> Why don't you just bring a foldable stool? Синтия Хо: It's cumbersome, and a stool sits just one. ; <> Синтия Хо: I'm advocating for everyone's sore feet! <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Синтия Хо: But the additional weight could reduce the elevator's effective load... Внутренний голос: She's seriously considering it... Синтия Хо: Oh, are you a formal employee now? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Yes. -> I formally start next week, I guess. <<#EndSimple>> Синтия Хо: Huh... Синтия Хо: Ops? //IF 操作 <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=1)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Bingo. Синтия Хо: Ha! I knew it. ; <> -> How do you know? Синтия Хо: A feeling, kind of. <<#EndSimple>> Синтия Хо: You are a lot like Justin. Ops will be a natural fit. <<#EndIf>> //IF 篩選 <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=1)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I chose Screening. -> Wrong. <<#EndSimple>> Синтия Хо: Huh? Really? ; <> Синтия Хо: You're a lot like Justin. I thought you'd choose Ops. <> //IF 根本沒錄取操作 <<#If($UpShelfWrongCount>3)>> <<#Simple(6)>> -> He didn't want to hire me. Синтия Хо: It's not a bad thing. <<#Simple(6)>> -> How so? Синтия Хо: Justin has an eye for talents. ; <> Синтия Хо: If he doesn't want to hire you, it means you're not the right type. ; <> Синтия Хо: You won't enjoy it even if he gives the green light. ; <> Внутренний голос: She's probably right... ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> Синтия Хо: Hey, I thought you went to Ops for field practice yesterday? ; <> Синтия Хо: Did you witness the critical system failure? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Yeah, it happened when I was there. -> I was in the middle of racking. <<#EndSimple>> Синтия Хо: Geez, I can't imagine... ; <> Синтия Хо: We are doing all we can to fix things. But so far we can't even locate the cause... Синтия Хо: The current plan is to take systems offline one by one, to rule out possibilities. Синтия Хо: HQ isn't helping, either. We tried to convince them to shut down survelliance for just one hour, but they refused. ; <> Синтия Хо: I don't know what their problem is. Синтия Хо: What's the big deal? It's not like some super spy will hear the news and infiltrate the Cella within one hour! ; <> Внутренний голос: Well... ; <> Синтия Хо: This system failure is really something. Senior employees told me they've never seen anything like it. ; <> ; <> Синтия Хо: Simultaneous malfunction across the whole Cellar. This can't be natural... <<#Simple(8)>> -> You suspect sabotage? Синтия Хо: It's a possibility, although I can't imagine how it's done. ; <> Синтия Хо: And frankly, what's the point? Only takes a couple of days for us to fix it. -> I thought it's just the Ops office. Синтия Хо: No. It affected the entire Cellar. -> Well... <<#EndSimple>> Синтия Хо: Sorry, poor choice of subject. <<#Simple(6)>> -> It's alright. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> ////這一段還沒加動畫////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// //1找到硬碟沒說林靜慧搞丟2.找到硬碟說她搞丟，且獨攬功勞害她被懲罰3.找到硬碟說她搞丟，不過幫她說話3.5月台發現，但沒拿到，不過有跟廖哥說 //4.沒找到但是有幫忙說話5.沒找到又沒幫忙說話 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=0)>> <<#GoTo(@何歆翊開始提及戀愛約人話題)>> <<#EndIf>> Синтия Хо: Hey, did you hear about Jade? Внутренний голос: ...? Внутренний голос: Ah, she's talking about Jade and her lost hard drive... //if=1,3 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=1||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=3||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=3.5)>> Синтия Хо: I must thank you. <<#Simple(8)>> -> What for? // -> You're welcome. Синтия Хо: Haha, you're funny. Синтия Хо: Do you know what I'm thanking you for? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //if 1找到硬碟沒說林靜慧搞丟 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=1)>> Синтия Хо: Jade received a message from Mr. Liao, saying he got the drive. Синтия Хо: He didn't even suspect the drive was lost. You saved the day. Синтия Хо: The only complaint he had was that she didn't bring it over herself. <<#EndIf>> //if 3找到硬碟有說林靜慧搞丟 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=3||$LinGinHueDiskEnding=3.5)>> Синтия Хо: Jade received a message from Mr. Liao, saying he got the drive. Синтия Хо: He gave Jade a ton of warnings, but no actual punishment. <<#EndIf>> Синтия Хо: Jade is super grateful! <<#If($LieYouDontFindLin=-1)>> Синтия Хо: You refused to cooperate back then, I thought you were selfish. Синтия Хо: Turns out I was wrong. Синтия Хо: I apologize, haha... <<#EndIf>> Синтия Хо: Say, how did you find the drive? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I know a security officer. Синтия Хо: Ah. You're full of surprises. <<#GoTo(@何歆翊說保安都跟機器人一樣)>> -> I went downstairs to the Security office. Синтия Хо: Did that work? <<@何歆翊說保安都跟機器人一樣>> Синтия Хо: I tried it a couple of times, but they were like robots. Синтия Хо: Meticulous, cold, following orders to a T... Внутренний голос: Michael Hsiao is like an alien among them. Синтия Хо: And you convinced them? A miracle! <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@何歆翊開始提及戀愛約人話題)>> <<#EndIf>> //if=4 <<#If($LinGinHueDiskEnding=4)>> Синтия Хо: I must thank you. <<#Simple(8)>> -> What for? // -> You're welcome. Синтия Хо: Haha, you're funny. Синтия Хо: Do you know what I'm thanking you for? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Синтия Хо: Mr. Liao defended Jade from HQ all because of you. title: 23評論攔查事件
body: //玩家離開特勤以後幾秒，或按電梯 23(c): Heart pounding, huh? <<#Simple(8)>> -> Not at all. 23(c): Heeeey! 23(c): Come on, show me some drama. 23(c): But yeah, you know you can always trust my work! -> Yeah. I thought I was done for. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): It's my work, man! They can't find it that easily! 23(c): Not with crappy scanners like that one! <<#Simple(8)>> -> You intended to keep me worrying? 23(c): Suspense makes great drama! Learn to appreciate the art. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Damn. 23(c): Heh heh. -> I think I know how Lawrence feels about you now. 23(c): Overwhelming worship. Say no more. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> Thank you. I know I could trust you. 23(c): Uh, that, um... 23(c): Of course! Внутренний голос: ...She's not used to direct compliments? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Now that Yuna Hsu agreed to let you go... 23(c): You didn't have to worry even if you were caught. Haha. Внутренний голос: Easier said than done... 23(c): Come to the shuttle platform for rendezvous. <<#End>>

title: 拿取采欣通行證
body:
//互動後(這裡任務要更新程潛入地窖後要記得還回來，或是現在就還)


23(c): What did you just pick up? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> How did you know I picked up something?
    23(c): I have access to all surveillance camera feeds.
    23(c): What's that?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> Access pass to the Cellar.
    -> Let's just say you don't need to tamper with elevator access now.
        <<#GoTo(@23反應拿通行證啊啊)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> Access pass to the Cellar.
-> Let's just say you don't need to tamper with elevator access now.
    <<@23反應拿通行證啊啊>>
    //if有孫茹路線了
    <<#If($IntoCellarByHelpSun=0)>>
        23(c): Huh? Didn't you already find a way to use the elevator?
        23(c): Do we still need this?
        <<#GoTo(@跳過23反應拿采欣通行證件)>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    23(c): Ha! You do have your ways!
    23(c): Not bad!
<<#EndSimple>> 
<<@跳過23反應拿采欣通行證件>>
Внутренний голос: Don't forget to put it back when I'm done.
<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站低頭返回)>>
<<Set($IntoCellarByStealID,0)>>;//當下放回去要改成1，用完才放回去就改為2
<<#End>>

title: 跟采欣一起搭地窖電梯中
body: //這次地窖電梯一堆無人機在附近維修噴火花 Кэти Се: ... Внутренний голос: ... ; <> Кэти Се: ...Jason. Кэти Се: Can we have a chat? ; <> Кэти Се: I need a distraction from this vibration... ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Sure, of course. Кэти Се: Thank you... ; <> -> You don't have to ask. Haha. Кэти Се: Because you work for Ops now... Кэти Се: It kinda feels like you're not "one of us"? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> No such thing! Кэти Се: Really? Good to know! -> You spent plenty of time at Ops, too. Кэти Се: Ah, you're right... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#Wait(2)>> Кэти Се: Hey. -> I'm not quite in the mood. ; <> Кэти Се: Oh... Кэти Се: ... Кэти Се: ... ; <> <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: Why are you going down to the Cellar? //if說不想聊天 <<#If($DLState=第一次跟采欣搭地窖電梯說不想聊天)>> Внутренний голос: There she is, starting a conversation anyway. ; <> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Justin asked me to. Didn't explain. Кэти Се: Oh? I was called down, too. ; <> Кэти Се: I mean, by Justin. <> -> Why ask? Кэти Се: Because Justin called me, told me to come down to the Cellar but didn't explain why. ; <> Кэти Се: I thought maybe he called you, too. Isn't Ops supposed to be having a break today? <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Oh, right. Justin called me, too. -> He didn't explain anything to you, either? <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: Hmm... ; <> Кэти Се: Calling out of the blue, wanting you and me both...? Кэти Се: That's weird... <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Yeah, a bit weird. -> Weird? How? Кэти Се: Because we have nothing in common. Like, I'm a programmer... Кэти Се: You're... I think you only operate machines, right? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Only operate machines? Кэти Се: Ah... ; <> Кэти Се: Sorry, I don't mean it that way! I was trying to say that... Кэти Се: That you're no help if they need programming support. ; <> Кэти Се: Uh, no, that came out even wrong-er. I mean that— Кэти Се: I'm sorry... ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> No offense taken! Haha. -> Ouch! That hurts. Кэти Се: I-I'm really sorry. ; <> -> Never mind. Кэти Се: Yeah... ; <> <<#EndSimple>> -> Correct. <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: Hmm... ; <> Кэти Се: I hope this is about something important! Внутренний голос: She's super excited all of a sudden. <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Important stuff means lots of work. Кэти Се: Right. But again, it's a great opportunity to prove ourselves to them! -> Why so excited? Кэти Се: Eh? Am I...? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Yeah. Doesn't take an expert to tell. -> Listen to yourself. <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: ... ; <> Кэти Се: If so, this would be the first time that Justin gives me any important task. Внутренний голос: I thought she visits Ops for training, not work...? ; <> Кэти Се: He never gave me anything important to do, ever since I first went there. ; <> Кэти Се: He's like, treating me as a visitor, a guest. ; <> <<#Simple(10)>> -> What do you usually do there? Кэти Се: Training and learning... ; <> Кэти Се: Plus listening to Jesse bragging about her work... Внутренний голос: I get it that she's not very happy about this latter part. <> <<#Simple(10)>> -> But the plan was all about learning and training, no? -> Sounds cozy to me. Кэти Се: Cozy, but I don't sense much recognition... ; <> -> You want to prove yourself? Кэти Се: Yes! ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> I know that feeling, being an outsider. Кэти Се: Right. ; <> -> So? <> -> ... <> <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: So I hope Justin will let me do something that matters this time. <<#Simple(8)>> -> I'd prefer less work any day. Кэти Се: Very practical attitude, haha... -> Given this urgency, it has to be something big. Кэти Се: Yes! -> Maybe just some random errands to run. Кэти Се: N-no way! Кэти Се: So much trouble, just for random errands? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: ... ; <> Кэти Се: I want Justin to trust me more... <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why do you care so much about what they think? <<@采欣說為何要讓啊俊認可>> Кэти Се: I can't help it, wanting to be recognized by outstanding people... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> What about Jesse? She's rather outstanding. Кэти Се: She doesn't count! ; <> Кэти Се: She's outstanding alright, but hardly ever serious. <> -> Why specifically Justin, though? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: He's straight forward, no courtesy nonsense. ; <> Кэти Се: A few encouraging words from him will mean a lot to me. <<#Simple(8)>> -> He never said anything encouraging to you before? Кэти Се: He did, but that was different... ; <> <<#GoTo(@給工作才是真的覺得有利害到)>> -> Assigning you work means approval? Кэти Се: Yeah. ; <> <<@給工作才是真的覺得有利害到>> Кэти Се: Assigning me important work means he trusts my capabilities. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Внутренний голос: This is a surprise, that she cares about it so much. -> I see that you really want to transfer to Ops. Кэти Се: Not you, too!? ; <> Кэти Се: QQ keeps saying, no, complaining about that! Кэти Се: What made you think so? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Because you care about Justin's opinions a lot? Кэти Се: That is right, but... ; <> Кэти Се: It's really not because I want to transfer to Ops. <<#GoTo(@采欣說為何要讓啊俊認可)>> -> Everything you said makes me think so. Кэти Се: Ah, really...? Кэти Се: But that's not what I want! ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Alright. // -> Why do you care so much about Justin's opinions, then? <<#GoTo(@采欣說為何要讓啊俊認可)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: ... ; <> ; <> Кэти Се: Um... Кэти Се: ...Is it just me, or this elevator is dropping faster than usual? ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> It's just you. -> It does seem faster...? -> Stop thinking about it. -> It's safe. Don't worry. <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: Hmm... ; <> //突然晃動跟燈光閃爍 <> Кэти Се: Ahhhhhh! ; <> ; <> Кэти Се: *Whimper* Внутренний голос: She's on the verge of tears. <<#Simple(8)>> -> It's OK, it's OK. -> We're almost there. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: *Whimper* //進入地窖區域以後 <<#End>>

Let's start anyway. ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: Yale's a smart boy. Doesn't need us to cover all the details. ; <> //{Narrator: Computer beeps.} <>;<>;<> Кэйли Чен: One more located, Justin. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Good. ; <> Внутренний голос: One more what...? ; <> Джастин Ву: Put everything on the screen, Kaylee. Кэйли Чен: On it. ; <> <>;<> <>;<>;<> //窗戶轉成螢幕，顯示出一個結構圖有幾處標出紅點 //{Narrator: The giant window darkens and turns into a screen.} //{Narrator: On the screen is a map, with multiple red marks.} Джастин Ву: Jason, Cathy, let's start from the conclusion. Джастин Ву: Yesterday's incident is in fact the result of sabotage operations. ; <> ; <> ; <> Кэти Се: What!? ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> And the reason being? -> Are you sure? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: Over to you, Packs. ; <> Джесси Лай: Are you sure? He's gonna waste hours on bragging. ; <> ; <> Кэйли Чен: Agreed. ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: Tsk. Leave it to the real professional. ; <> ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: First and foremost, who is the most professional hardware engineer in this office? 'Tis I, Packs the Great! ; <> Джесси Лай: ...See? ; <> ; <> Внутренний голос: Justin agrees with a weak smile. Пакстон Ло: Why the sneer? A good speech starts with establishing the authority. ; <> Джесси Лай: Get on with it! ; <> Пакстон Ло: A long time ago, I noticed an unusual surge of maintenance service tickets related to power supply. ; <> Пакстон Ло: Malfunctions with no apparent cause. If left unattended, these problems usually go away on their own. Пакстон Ло: We have been chalking it up to outdated hardware so far. Джастин Ву: However, such issues have been proliferating since this April. ; <> ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Moreover, a pattern is showing, one zone at a time. Random malfunction doesn't explain it anymore. Пакстон Ло: AHEM! ; <> ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Ah, sorry, it's your show... ; <> Пакстон Ло: Like Justin said. Every time, it starts with a cluster of issues in one specific zone. Пакстон Ло: Then they spread out, plaguing the systems one zone at a time. Пакстон Ло: They are mostly unremarkable issues, although the scale has been quietly escalating. ; <> Пакстон Ло: A wise one like me would ponder, and connect the dots. Пакстон Ло: Turns out there are patterns. Кэти Се: Can we identify the cause of these issues? ; <> ; <> ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: We can pretty rule out software glitches. As to hardware... Пакстон Ло: A team under my leadership examined the power supply system thoroughly. ; <> ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: However, the quest was fruitless. ; <> Пакстон Ло: As a result, we put the investigation aside. Nothing really happened. Пакстон Ло: Until yesterday, that is... ; <> <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Are you sure these malfunctions are connected? Джесси Лай: I don't trust a bragging fatso either, but I do agree with him in this case. ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: However... <<#GoTo(@老實說就算他把他觀察到的狀況跟我說，我在事情發生前)>> -> In other words, you kind of knew this will happen? Пакстон Ло: I... Джесси Лай: You want to ask why he didn't do anything in advance? ; <> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Yeah. // -> That's not what I'm trying to say. Джесси Лай: ... Джесси Лай: Anyway. <<#EndSimple>> Джесси Лай: Don't blame him. He couldn't do anything about it. <<#Simple(8)>> -> I wasn't accusing. Джесси Лай: Good to know. ; <> Джесси Лай: Sorry if I sounded offensive. -> If he did anything at all, maybe yesterday's episode could have been avoided. Джесси Лай: I know, but... Пакстон Ло: Don't defend me. It is my fault. ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: I apologize, Jason. ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: Even if you blame yourself, too, Paxton... ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: I still won't say it's your fault. ; <> Пакстон Ло: ...Thank you. Джесси Лай: I'm just making my own informed decisions. <>;<>;<> <<#GoTo(@主角不滿胖胖應該可以多做點什麼事情結束)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<@老實說就算他把他觀察到的狀況跟我說，我在事情發生前>> Джесси Лай: Honestly, I wouldn't believe him even if you threw all the evidence in my face, until yesterday. <>;<> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<@主角不滿胖胖應該可以多做點什麼事情結束>> Пакстон Ло: ... ; <> Пакстон Ло: I've been having this nagging suspicion since yesterday. So I'm coming in for another look. ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: We checked all generators last time. This time I decided to trace the cables. ; <> Пакстон Ло: And I found this. ; <> //胖胖拿出一個黃色的方型裝置 Кэти Се: What's this? ; <> Внутренний голос: I've seen something like this in the army... Пакстон Ло: I've never seen it before. Asked around, no result. Внутренний голос: It's a disruptor that damages electronic devices by creating power surges. ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> It's a disruptor, for electronic devices. <>;<>;<>;<> Пакстон Ло: How did you know? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> That is irrelevant. Пакстон Ло: Ugh, oh... ; <> Пакстон Ло: A-anyway... -> Seen it in the army. Пакстон Ло: Ha, I didn't know you served in the army. ; <> <<#EndSimple>> Пакстон Ло: ...You are correct. ; <> ; <> ; <> -> ... <> <<#EndSimple>> Пакстон Ло: I did a full analysis. This thing creates power surges to disrupt electronic devices. Пакстон Ло: We were focusing on key nodes of the power supply system, but overlooked the cables connecting everything together. Кэти Се: That proves the theory of sabotage... ; <> ; <> <>;<> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Do we have any suspect? Пакстон Ло: ...Not yet. <<@說不知道到底誰要這樣亂搞地窖哩>> Джастин Ву: It doesn't make sense. Why would anyone bother? Джастин Ву: Vision's competitors have better targets than outdated wrecks like Silencio. -> Can we find a possible motive? Джастин Ву: No clue. <<#GoTo(@說不知道到底誰要這樣亂搞地窖哩)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: Packs informed me, then I summoned you guys immediately. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: We must take care of these disruptors before something happens again. <> //楊冶平走過來，一邊看著螢幕 Йейл Янг: ...The hell? ; <> ; <> ; <> Кэти Се: Yale? ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: So you're saying... Йейл Янг: The incident yesterday was in fact the result of sabotage? Джастин Ву: That's the theory for now. ; <> Йейл Янг: Mr. Hsu had some kind of emergency, so he called me in to cover... ; <> Йейл Янг: Who could have thought... ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: As we know, yesterday's malfunction was Cellar-wide. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: That means we have these disruptors all over the place. ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: Installing them all over the Cellar...? Джастин Ву: We may be dealing with not just one person, but a group. ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> It does seem so. // -> Or one person, doing it over a long time. Пакстон Ло: Um... ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Any reason you'd suspect that, Jason? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> You said it started a long time ago. -> It happens one zone at a time, doesn't it? Джастин Ву: ... ; <> Джесси Лай: ... ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: I think he's got a good point. ; <> Джастин Ву: Agreed. Джастин Ву: It would indeed take a long time to install disruptors one zone at a time... ; <> Пакстон Ло: Are we really dealing with one single person? ; <> -> They'd be caught by now if there's a whole group of them. Джастин Ву: Yes. But on the other hand, covering the entire Cellar with one person is unrealistic. ; <> ; <> <<#EndSimple>> <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Йейл Янг: I understand all that. Now, what did you call us here for? ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: We need people for some legwork, literally. Кэти Се: Legwork? ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Right. We have disruptors all over the place, right? ; <> Джастин Ву: They are armed with remote control modules. However, probably to prevent backtracing... ; <> Джастин Ву: ...They're interconnected with multinodal cellular networks encrypted end to end. ; <> Внутренний голос: Multi what...? ; <> Йейл Янг: Makes sense. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Um, English, please? -> I'm not making any sense out of it. Джесси Лай: Oh, right, we have a layperson among us. //大家看向主角 <>;<>;<>;<> <<#Simple(10)>> -> Got a problem? -> Stop office bullying. -> Well, sorry for disappointing. Джесси Лай: Haha! ; <> Пакстон Ло: Heh. ; <> ; <> ; <> Кэти Се: Hey, Jason has his own unique skill set! ; <> Внутренний голос: These people... ; <> ; <> ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: Ahem! Джастин Ву: Simply put, it's impossible to backtrace the control signal with this sample we have. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: However, if we collect at least three of them, we may locate the signal source by cross reference and inference. ; <> Пакстон Ло: Meaning solving the "who did it" part! ; <> Кэти Се: Wait. You mean, we only need three samples? ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Correct. Is something wrong? Кэти Се: Do we...really need all of us running around to retrieve them? ; <> Джастин Ву: We do, and there's a good reason. ; <> ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: The culprit might be alerted when Packs disarmed this one here. <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> "Might be"? Джастин Ву: Right. Depends on whether they're monitoring the disruptor network. ; <> Пакстон Ло: Or they might have already made a run for it, leaving these disruptors behind. ; <> ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: But I admit, that is unlikely. ; <> <>;<>;<> -> How could they be alerted? Джастин Ву: If they can remote control disruptors, naturally, they can see their working status. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: It doesn't take a genius to connect the dots. Maybe they're already busy taking down disruptors to cover their trace. Кэти Се: That means... ; <> Йейл Янг: Means we must race against them before all disruptors are gone. ; <> Джастин Ву: Correct. Джастин Ву: That is why we need as many people as possible. Sorry for ruining your day off. ; <> Йейл Янг: I'm not having a day off, though. I've been servicing the racking system on Station 4. ; <> ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: Is there any reason why you need me here? Джастин Ву: ... ; <> ; <> ; <> Внутренний голос: Jesse cast Justin a nervous glance. What's the deal? ; <> Джастин Ву: Having a racker on the team would be very helpful. Джастин Ву: If our locating model works correctly, many disruptors are deployed in places accessible only to rackers. ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: Are you indicating... ; <> Джастин Ву: Yes. We believe there's a high chance that the culprit is a racker. ; <> Йейл Янг: No way! ; <> ; <> ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: We are working our asses off to keep the Cellar running. Why would we want to shoot ourselves in the foot? ; <> Йейл Янг: ... ; <> Джастин Ву: It's only a possibility. ; <> ; <> Внутренний голос: Yale is visibly shaken by the mere idea... ; <> Джастин Ву: Cathy. You're from Screening. With special permits from Ops, you'll have better reach and coverage than any of us. ; <> ; <> Кэти Се: That's the only reason you called me...? ; <> Джастин Ву: Yes. Why? Кэти Се: N-nothing... ; <> Внутренний голос: Cathy looks hurt. Йейл Янг: One question. How did you locate these disruptors, if they're backtracing-proof? ; <> Джесси Лай: Good question! ; <> ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: All thanks to my genius prediction model! Джесси Лай: I built an inference and prediction model based on what we know. ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: First, provide it with all malfunction logs from before... ; <> Пакстон Ло: Collected and compiled by me. ; <> Джесси Лай: Then we have a list of potential disruptor locations! ; <> Внутренний голос: Ah, that's what they meant by "one more". ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Potential location? You mean, we may find nothing there? Джастин Ву: No. We are prioritizing sites with 100% probability. Пакстон Ло: Considering it's Jesse's model, 100% probability probably doesn't mean much. ; <> Джесси Лай: Shut up. <> -> How many locations do we have now? Джастин Ву: 13 so far. Out of these, only two are 100% hits. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: 100% means there is definitely a disruptor at the location. Пакстон Ло: The model is faulty. It just made a mistake not too long ago. ; <> ; <> ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: Didn't it say there's an active disruptor right in this office? Well, do you see any? ; <> Джесси Лай: Be realistic. All predictive models have exceptions. ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: Shall we start now, Yale? ; <> Внутренний голос: Yale looks like he's ready to kill somebody. ; <> Йейл Янг: Can't wait to catch that bastard. ; <> Джастин Ву: Patience. I intend to keep you for racker-only locations. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Now we have two targets, both accessible to Jason and Cathy. Джастин Ву: Packs is busy finding a proper destination for you. ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: ...Hurry up, Packs. ; <> ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: I'm working on it! ; <> ; <> ; <> Кэти Се: Maybe I can stay here and help you guys? ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Huh? Why? ; <> ; <> Кэти Се: Uh, because... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> We need more people in the field. Джастин Ву: Indeed. -> Cathy will do more good in the office than the field. ; <> Джастин Ву: Now that you've mentioned it... Джастин Ву: Hmm... ; <> ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: I could use some help here. Джастин Ву: Good. Cathy, please help Jesse out. ; <> Кэти Се: Y-yessir! ; <> ; <> <<#GoTo(@跳過說還是要讓采欣去找干擾器)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джастин Ву: Retrieving disruptors is the top priority. Please work with Jason and Yale. Кэти Се: You're right... ; <> Кэти Се: OK, forget what I just said. Haha... <<@跳過說還是要讓采欣去找干擾器>> Джастин Ву: Good. Let's begin. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Kaylee, what's Jason's destination? ; <> ; <> ; <> Кэйли Чен: Cellar entrance, right by the elevator going up. ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> I just came from there. Пакстон Ло: He's right. Damn, I hate backtracking... -> That's like, in plain sight? Пакстон Ло: In plain sight, but least expected. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> Йейл Янг: Wait. You said the elevator!? ; <> ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: Are you sure? ; <> Внутренний голос: What's with the urgency? Кэйли Чен: Yes, if Jesse's predictive model is working as it's supposed to. ; <> Джесси Лай: It's working fabulously! ; <> ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: That settles it. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Jason, check the entrance elevator and retrieve any disruptor there. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: Call in when it's done. We will send you the next location. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Roger. // -> Hold on. How am I supposed to take it down? Джастин Ву: It's straightforward enough. Call me when you find it. I'll talk you through it. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> Пакстон Ло: The taking down part could take some time. ; <> ; <> ; <> Пакстон Ло: I spent like a quarter hour on the first one. ; <> Йейл Янг: ...I'll go with Jason. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: But you're reserved for racker-only locations. ; <> Йейл Янг: I can make a quick trip while Packs works on it. Джастин Ву: Yes, although... Йейл Янг: I can help Jason take it off. I know what I'm doing. ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: A live demonstration will be good for him, too. Джесси Лай: That's not like you, Yale. ; <> ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: What? ; <> Джесси Лай: Actually thinking things through before diving into action. Very un-Yale. ; <> ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: Hey, this is not the best time for that... ; <> ; <> Джесси Лай: I was only trying to say you're weird today. ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: Do you agree, Justin? I'll go with Jason if yes. ; <> ; <> Джастин Ву: ... ; <> Джастин Ву: Yes, please go with him. ; <> //if沒讓采欣留下來。 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false)>> Джастин Ву: Cathy, I don't have a location for you yet. Джастин Ву: Please wait here for a bit. Кэти Се: OK. <<#EndIf>> <> Джастин Ву: You two, get moving now. The next location will come soon. ; <> Йейл Янг: Yessir. Let's go, Jason. ; <> ; <> ; <> Внутренний голос: Why is he in such a hurry? ; <> <> //兩人離開 //如果是采欣留下路線，她會做到一台電腦前 <<#End>>

title: 車子到站以後
body:
Йейл Янг: Wait for me here.
Внутренний голос: Huh?
Йейл Янг: I'm taking down the disruptor. Be right back. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看外)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
-> Sure.
    Йейл Янг: Yeah.
    <<#End>>
-> Why?
-> No.
    Йейл Янг: Come on. Just a disruptor. Doesn't take both of us to take it down.
    Йейл Янг: I work faster by myself.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> Okay.
        Йейл Янг: Yeah.
        <<#End>>
    -> Didn't you say I need a live demonstration?
        Йейл Янг: Maybe next time. I can handle this one.
        Йейл Янг: It's faster that way. Trust me.
        <<#GoTo(@小楊要衝下車不管主角)>>
    -> Let me help. I won't get in your way.
        Йейл Янг: No.
        <<@小楊要衝下車不管主角>>
        Внутренний голос: ...Why is he trying so hard to keep me here?
        Йейл Янг: I'll handle it alone.
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> Okay.
            Йейл Янг: Thank you. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看外返回)>>
            <<#End>>
        -> What's wrong with you?
        -> Something wrong, Yale?
            Йейл Янг: ...
            Йейл Янг: Please just wait here, Jason.
            Йейл Янг: I will take care of this myself.
            Йейл Янг: Please. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站看外返回)>>
            Внутренний голос: What's wrong with him...?
            <<#End>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Йейл Янг: Be right back.
    <<#End>>
<<#EndSimple>>
//可以按e下車

<<#End>>

title: 下車剛好采欣也到
body:

Кэти Се: You're back.
<<#If($DidGetOffTheCar=false)>>
    Кэти Се: That was a lot of legwork for nothing... ; <<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_側站喊嗨返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> Likewise.
    -> Less work than expected. Won't complain.
        Кэти Се: Haha...
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>
<<#If($DidGetOffTheCar=true)>>
    Кэти Се: Eh? Mr. Hsu is here, too? ; <<Play(謝采欣,MBU_謝采欣_側站喊嗨返回)>>
    Лиам Хсу: ...Let's talk inside. ; <<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭)>>
    Кэти Се: Ah, right...
    Кэти Се: OK...? ; <<PlayUntil(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭返回)>>
<<#EndIf>>

<<#End>>

title: 跟采欣搭地窖電梯回去
body: Кэти Се: ... Кэти Се: ... ; <> Кэти Се: The elevator feels safer now that maintenance bots are gone. ; <> Кэти Се: I hope it won't shake now. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Don't set expectations too high. You're just too nervous. Кэти Се: I mean, really! -> It is faster. What happened could have destroyed his world. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why do you care so much? Кэти Се: ... ; <> Кэти Се: Maybe because we have too much in common. Кэти Се: We both idolize someone and strive to earn their approval... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> In your case, Justin? Кэти Се: ...Yeah. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why him? // -> Poor Wayne. Кэти Се: It's not like that! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: I'm not like Yale. I don't have personal feelings involved. ; <> Кэти Се: I just want to earn the recognition of an outstanding engineer.
