Кэти Се: But I can't live on self-recognition... ; <> Кэти Се: Or else I'd end up like QQ. <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Haha! Кэти Се: Haha! -> Have a little of both. Кэти Се: Right. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> Sometimes I feel like that, too. Кэти Се: Really!? ; <> Кэти Се: But you look like... <<#Simple(6)>> -> Like what? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: Like the composed type? ; <> Кэти Се: Someone not easily swayed. <<#Simple(8)>> -> I'll take that as a compliment. Thank you. Кэти Се: Haha! -> People do say that sometimes. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> Who is yours? Кэти Се: N-never mind. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> Well, life goes on. Кэти Се: Haha, it does... ; <> -> ... <> <<#EndSimple>> //if有幫助采欣留下來 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true)>> Кэти Се: Oh! Thank you for vouching for me back there. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Did I? Кэти Се: Yes. You convinced Justin to let me stay. -> Nah, don't mention it. Кэти Се: I owe you a big thank you! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Кэти Се: I guess Justin would have sent me on fetch quests if not for you. ; <> Кэти Се: I really don't want to be an errand girl... Кэти Се: My skills are more helpful in the office! Like, I found out who installed those disruptors. ; <> //if主角有下車 <<#If($DidGetOffTheCar=true)>> Кэти Се: But you did, too, in your own way. <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> Кэти Се: ... Кэти Се: It's quite an eventful day... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Lots of shuttle rides. Кэти Се: And elevator rides, too. <<#Simple(8)>> -> True. Haha. -> *Sigh* -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> I could use a break. Кэти Се: Same here... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#Wait(2)>> Кэти Се: Hey, we're almost there! ; <> Кэти Се: Told you the elevator's faster now! ; <> Кэти Се: So, see you later? ; <> Кэти Се: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>>

title: 跟莊詩妍搭電梯去找徐媛
body:
//兩人進入電梯後
Шеа Чжуан: ...
Шеа Чжуан: ... ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看)>>
//if篩選路線且有跟莊小姐對話過
<<#If($InspectWhoTakeLiau=0)>>
   Шеа Чжуан: Mr. Dai. About the information we talked about last time...? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看)>>
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    -> I said I'll be the judge of that.($ToldYenIWillJudgeByMySelf)
        Шеа Чжуан: ...And your judgment is?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        -> That agent probably serves Jordan Li.($ChuNameRemember)
            <<@告訴莊詩妍情報讓她歡喜>>
            Шеа Чжуан: Really!? ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看開心)>>
            Шеа Чжуан: That is...
            Шеа Чжуан: That could be extremely helpful to my boss!
            Внутренний голос: She's genuinely happy about it.
            <<#Simple(8)>>
            -> Great.
                Шеа Чжуан: Yes, great. Thank you!
            -> Not necessarily.
                Шеа Чжуан: Ah...
                Шеа Чжуан: I'll see what my boss makes of it.
            -> ...
            <<#EndSimple>>
            Шеа Чжуан: Anyway, that seals our deal! ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看開心返回)>>
            <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
        -> Not now.
            Шеа Чжуан: ...I see.
            <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
        <<#EndSimple>>
    -> That agent probably serves Jordan Li.($ChuNameRemember)
        <<#GoTo(@告訴莊詩妍情報讓她歡喜)>>
    -> Sorry, we haven't found out anything new yet.
    -> Not now.
        Шеа Чжуан: ...I see.
        <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndIf>>
Шеа Чжуан: ...
Шеа Чжуан: ... ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> What kind of person would you say your boss is? ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看)>>
    Шеа Чжуан: ...
    Внутренний голос: She doesn't want to answer?
    Шеа Чжуан: A good chess player. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看)>>
    Внутренний голос: That was unexpected.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> What do you mean?
        Шеа Чжуан: She always sees five steps into the future and prepares for everything.
        Шеа Чжуан: She's abnormally seasoned for her age.
    -> I thought you'd call her terrifying.
        Шеа Чжуан: She can be harsh sometimes, but never terrifying.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Внутренний голос: I see that she has her own cult of personality... ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看返回)>> ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
-> What do you think your boss wants me for? ; <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看)>>
    Шеа Чжуан: I should not make assumptions.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> Why? Just a harmless guess.
        Шеа Чжуан: She said we are paid to get things done, not to have speculative opinions. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看)>>
        Шеа Чжуан: I have no opinion unless she asks for it.
        Шеа Чжуан: Speculations undermine leadership.
        Шеа Чжуан: So she said. ; <<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_正站右看返回)>>
        Внутренний голос: ...I can visualize her saying that.
    -> Okay.
    -> ...
    <<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_正站左看返回)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Шеа Чжуан: We have arrived.
<<#End>>
//兩人出電梯
//莊詩妍走向徐媛。

title: 跟徐媛首次交換情報
body: //徐媛正翹著二郎腿看資料之類的 //看要不要加罵飲料騙人仔跟幫詩妍說話 Шеа Чжуан: He's here, ma'am. Юна Хсу: Good. You're dismissed. Шеа Чжуан: Yes, ma'am. ; <> <> Юна Хсу: ... Юна Хсу: Have a seat. //主角淡入淡出 <> Юна Хсу: ... Юна Хсу: Any progress? ; <> <<@回到徐媛問主角有沒有啥進展壓欸啊>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> First, something about your agents.($BePlayedSoBoughtDrink) <> Юна Хсу: Oh? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> One of them tricked me into buying her soda. -> One of them is drinking soda on duty. //if有完成陸石崇任務縣 <<#If($ToldLuYouGotPrank=true)>> Юна Хсу: I know about her. Sean told me. ; <> Юна Хсу: Punishment has been administered. <<#EndIf>> //if沒有完成陸石崇任務縣 <<#If($ToldLuYouGotPrank=false)>> Юна Хсу: Soda? I know who it is then. Юна Хсу: Punishment will be administered. ; <> <<#EndIf>> Внутренний голос: Yeah, she deserves it. Юна Хсу: Her behavior is very unprofessional. ; <> Юна Хсу: For that, I apologize. Внутренний голос: She's surprisingly reasonable. ; <> Юна Хсу: Now tell me what you know. <<#GoTo(@回到徐媛問主角有沒有啥進展壓欸啊)>> <<#EndSimple>> -> Why do you think I should have any progress? Юна Хсу: It's been a while since we last talked. ; <> Юна Хсу: Don't tell me you did nothing this whole time? Внутренний голос: ... ; <> Юна Хсу: What have you found? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> OK. I do have some progress.($KnowTruthControlDepartment) -> OK. I do have some progress.($KnowTruthSelectDepartment) Юна Хсу: Please share. ; <> <<#GoTo(@回答徐媛自己發現啥了耶呀)>> -> Sorry to disappoint. -> I don't have anything to share. <> <<#GoTo(@不得不說，這回答挺讓人失望的。)>> <<#EndSimple>> -> Sort of.($KnowTruthControlDepartment) -> Sort of.($KnowTruthSelectDepartment) Юна Хсу: Please share. <> <<@回答徐媛自己發現啥了耶呀>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Some directors of the board are pulling strings, trying to keep Silencio running.($MCBelongSelectDepartment) -> Some directors of the board are pulling strings, trying to shut Silencio down.($MCBelongControlDepartment) <<@有真的告訴徐媛情報>> <> Юна Хсу: Oh? Юна Хсу: Are you sure? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I am. -> Believe it or not. <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: ... ; <> Юна Хсу: I knew there are factions regarding the fate of Silencio, but directors shouldn't be personally involved. Юна Хсу: This is breaking the equilibrium. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Now your turn. Юна Хсу: OK. -> How does that information help you? Юна Хсу: To get the dirt on board directors? ; <> Юна Хсу: It's more helpful than you think. Юна Хсу: Of course, I could always use a little more intel. ; <> Внутренний голос: ... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: Now let's see what I can share with you. -> The board of directors will soon call a meeting to decide the fate of Silencio. Юна Хсу: ... Внутренний голос: Gah, that cold stare... Юна Хсу: Are you kidding me? ; <> Юна Хсу: It took you this long to find out what every single soul at this farm already knows? Внутренний голос: Busted... ; <> Юна Хсу: Consider this a warning. Stop wasting time, yours as well as mine. ; <> Юна Хсу: Do you have anything valuable or not? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Some directors are pulling strings to manipulate the fate of Silencio. <<#GoTo(@有真的告訴徐媛情報)>> -> OK. I don't. Юна Хсу: ... <<#GoTo(@不得不說，這回答挺讓人失望的。)>> <<#EndSimple>> -> You first. Tell me something I don't know.($DLStateFloat) <> Юна Хсу: Learned to bargain, huh. I see. Юна Хсу: I do have something for you, but not before I'm satisfied. <<#Simple(6)>> -> You first. I insist. Юна Хсу: Heh. ; <> Юна Хсу: Think before you insist. Юна Хсу: You don't have any leverage in this negotiation. ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Внутренний голос: ... <<#GoTo(@回答徐媛自己發現啥了耶呀)>> <<#EndSimple>> -> No progress. <<@不得不說，這回答挺讓人失望的。>> Юна Хсу: How disappointing. ; <> Юна Хсу: ... Юна Хсу: I will give you some clues, then. Юна Хсу: Hopefully that will make you more useful. ; <> <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: As far as I know, certain directors of the board care a lot about Silencio. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> I know that. Юна Хсу: You know nothing. -> So? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: Nobody ever cared so much about Silencio. Something is very wrong. ; <> Юна Хсу: I've considered every single possibility. Cash flow, business strategies, land value, patents, so on and so forth. Юна Хсу: Silencio is more of a liability than an asset in every sense. So, why such attention? Why now? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why? Внутренний голос: Did she just shrug? I can't quite tell... -> Because it's cranking up juicing power to a lethal level? Юна Хсу: What? ; <> Внутренний голос: I told her too much. She could have inferred the rest. ; <> Юна Хсу: You're saying they're trying to increase profit at the cost of lives? Юна Хсу: Oddly specific for a speculation... ; <> Внутренний голос: Damn... Юна Хсу: ... ; <> Юна Хсу: We are talking about a death toll potentially in hundreds of thousands. Юна Хсу: No profit could justify such risk. Внутренний голос: ... ; <> Юна Хсу: So, what is really going on? ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: I have no idea yet. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Is that supposed to be helpful? -> That's it? //if沒提供情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=-1)>> Юна Хсу: Surely better than nothing, no? Юна Хсу: Especially, better than you did. <<#EndIf>> //if有提供情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0)>> Юна Хсу: Patience. I'm coming to it. <<#EndIf>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: I believe the key is not with Silencio itself. Юна Хсу: We should examine external factors. <<#Simple(8)>> -> That's way too vague. -> Enough riddles. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: Let's just say, whether Silencio goes or stays, profitability is not a factor of consideration. ; <> Юна Хсу: All directors agree on one thing, that Silencio doesn't make any real profit. ; <> Юна Хсу: The reason to keep it is for political leverage. This farm addresses the unemployment issue for the government. Юна Хсу: As to why it should go, it's rather self-explanatory. High upkeep and zero profit. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Political leverage? Юна Хсу: The rise of AI has robbed many of their jobs. Flop farming addresses the issue of skyrocketing unemployment. ; <> Юна Хсу: You have seen what's going on in the Cellar. You know what I mean. Юна Хсу: In that sense, we are doing the government a huge favor. Vision could benefit from that. ; <> -> Zero profit? Юна Хсу: Let's face the fact. Silencio's revenue has been steadily sliding. ; <> Юна Хсу: This farm is so old that it's a joke. Updating it with modern hardware costs more than building a new farm. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: Things have been like this for a long time. ; <> Юна Хсу: The two factions were relatively at peace, until now. They must have been provoked by something. Юна Хсу: The only thing I can think of is that Vision must have discovered a new way to generate exponentially more flops. ; <> Внутренний голос: ...She's reaching the same conclusion as Fran and Situ did. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Are you sure about that? Юна Хсу: 90% positive. ; <> Внутренний голос: In other words, not quite sure. -> What does that have to do with Silencio? Юна Хсу: ...Can't you put two and two together? ; <> Юна Хсу: Silencio is completely redundant if they have a new way to massively increase flops output. Юна Хсу: With such peace of mind, one faction will take immediate action to shut it down. Then the other will fight back. ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: In a sense, the fight over Silencio represents the future of Vision Corp. Юна Хсу: Path One, befriend the government and wrestle Sunrise for more political power. ; <> Юна Хсу: Path Two, dominate the flop farming business with powerful technology. Юна Хсу: As the board, they do planning on a macro level. ; <> Юна Хсу: I don't expect you to understand. Just take it as a fact. Внутренний голос: This is far beyond me indeed... Юна Хсу: One thing I'm 100% sure of is that there will be a clash of factions very soon. //IF有提供操作組情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0&&$MCBelongControlDepartment=0)>> Юна Хсу: Based on what you found out, the pro-closure faction is already in motion. <<#EndIf>> //IF有提供篩選組情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0&&$MCBelongSelectDepartment=0)>> Юна Хсу: Based on what you found out, the against-closure faction is already in motion. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> -> But how is your information supposed to help me? Юна Хсу: ... -> I think I get the idea. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: I hope you understand how dire the situation is. Юна Хсу: Because considering everything we know so far... Юна Хсу: Frances must have touched a nerve. ; <> Юна Хсу: She's onto something that both factions want to keep confidential. ; <> Юна Хсу: In other words, she's in more danger than you can imagine. Внутренний голос: She's not bluffing. Юна Хсу: We both need more intel, Jason Dai. ; <> ; <> Юна Хсу: Or better still, hard evidence. Юна Хсу: Directors can't openly break the rules they made. That is the bottom line. ; <> //IF有提供操作組情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0&&$MCBelongControlDepartment=0)>> Юна Хсу: You said some directors are directly meddling, to shut this farm down. <<#EndIf>> //IF有提供篩選組情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=0&&$MCBelongSelectDepartment=0)>> Юна Хсу: You said some directors are directly meddling, to keep this farm going. <<#EndIf>> Юна Хсу: They must have puppets to carry out their plans in the dark. Юна Хсу: Your next mission is to find out who these puppets are. ; <> //IF有解開操作組支線 <<#If($KnowTruthControlDepartment=0)>> Внутренний голос: I already know it. Liam Hsu and Kevin Hu... <<#EndIf>> //IF有解開篩選組支線 <<#If($KnowTruthSelectDepartment=0)>> Внутренний голос: I already know it. George Liao... <<#EndIf>> <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> And why should I help you? -> What's in it for me? // -> What if I told you I already know?($KnowTruthSelectDepartment) ; <> -> What if I told you I already know?($KnowTruthControlDepartment) ; <> Юна Хсу: Oh? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: Consider me owe you one if you manage to identify any puppet of the directors. Юна Хсу: This favor will be returned when you're in need. ; <> <> //IF剛剛說已經找到了，且其實找到了(操作組版) <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=0&&$DLStateFloat=1)>> Юна Хсу: If you think you know... Юна Хсу: Give me a name. <<#EndIf>> //IF剛剛說已經找到了，且其實找到了(篩選組版) <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=0&&$DLStateFloat=1)>> Юна Хсу: If you think you know... Юна Хсу: Give me a name. <<#EndIf>> //IF剛剛沒說已經找到了，且其實找到了(操作組版) <<#If($MCBelongControlDepartment=0&&$DLStateFloat=0)>> <<#GoTo(@徐媛主動問主角是不是其實找到了)>> <<#EndIf>> //IF剛剛沒說已經找到了，且其實找到了(篩選組) <<#If($MCBelongSelectDepartment=0&&$DLStateFloat=0)>> <<@徐媛主動問主角是不是其實找到了>> Юна Хсу: Or, do you already have a lead? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I know who it is. <> //if剛剛沒給情報。 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=-1)>> Юна Хсу: I'm not convinced. Юна Хсу: Especially when you just proved yourself incompetent. <<#Simple(10)>> -> Of course I wouldn't play my trump card right away. -> I mean it. For real. -> Whatever. Suit yourself. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Юна Хсу: ... Юна Хсу: Give me a name, then. -> No progress. Юна Хсу: Figured. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //IF有解開操作組支線，且有說要講 <<#If($DLStateFloat=1&&$KnowTruthControlDepartment=0)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Kevin Hu is working for directors in favor of farm closure. ; <> Юна Хсу: The division lead of Ops? ; <> Юна Хсу: A man like him... Юна Хсу: Huh, it does make sense. ; <> -> Liam Hsu is working for directors in favor of farm closure. ; <> Юна Хсу: ... ; <> Юна Хсу: Liam Hsu is not on my list. Юна Хсу: I will investigate him soon enough. ; <> -> Kevin Hu and Liam Hsu are working for directors in favor of farm closure. ; <> Юна Хсу: The division lead of Ops? Юна Хсу: A man like him... ; <> Юна Хсу: ... Юна Хсу: Liam Hsu is not on my list. Юна Хсу: I will investigate him soon enough. ; <> -> It's not time to show my hand yet. Юна Хсу: I call your bluff. Юна Хсу: Do you have any card to play at all? <<#Simple(8)>> -> Believe it or not. -> Maybe I do. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: This deal stays open. Come back when you make up your mind. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //IF有解開篩選組支線，且有說要講 <<#If($DLStateFloat=1&&$KnowTruthSelectDepartment=0)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> George Liao of Screening is working for directors against farm closure. ; <> Юна Хсу: I remember him. Shea did a background check on him. Юна Хсу: If it's him... ; <> Внутренний голос: Did I give her new ideas...? Юна Хсу: Good. I see. ; <> -> It's not time to show my hand yet. Юна Хсу: I call your bluff. Юна Хсу: Do you have any card to play at all? <<#Simple(8)>> -> Believe it or not. -> Maybe I do. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: This deal stays open. Come back when you make up your mind. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //if告訴徐媛誰幫董事會做事了 <<#If($DLStateFloat=2)>> <> <> <> Юна Хсу: ... ; <> Юна Хсу: Jason Dai, I don't think you're stupid enough to deceive me. Юна Хсу: Still, a friendly reminder is due. If you lied, you will pay. Юна Хсу: But for now, I owe you one. ; <> Юна Хсу: Let me know when you're in need. Внутренний голос: I could really use her help someday... <<#EndIf>> //發出逼逼音效，徐媛看了一下投影手表 Юна Хсу: That wraps it up. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> We're making a good start. //IF有情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel>-1)>> Внутренний голос: She smiled. Юна Хсу: I think so, too. <<#EndIf>> //IF沒情報 <<#If($ToldYuanIntel=-1)>> Юна Хсу: For you, maybe. I'm not getting anything useful yet. <<#EndIf>> -> Shea Zhuang is a good subordinate.($InspectWhoTakeLiau) <> Юна Хсу: Why bring her up? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Just sharing a piece of my mind. -> Because of how she idolizes you. <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: ... Юна Хсу: I know that. Внутренний голос: I can't quite tell if she's smiling. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: Time for you to go. ; <> Юна Хсу: Don't stay. We can't afford to attract attention. Нин Ситу(c): Jason, we are getting results. Нин Ситу(c): Come back to the van. <> Юна Хсу: Go. Юна Хсу: I need to prepare for my next appointment. Юна Хсу: I'll be in touch. //徐媛淡入淡出開始離開 <<#Simple(3)>> -> What exactly do you want out of this? Юна Хсу: ... Юна Хсу: I want more power. Юна Хсу: To get power, I need information. Юна Хсу: You want to settle the score for Frances. Юна Хсу: For that, you need information, too. Юна Хсу: Our interests are aligned. That is all you need to know. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Юна Хсу: Bye, Jason Dai. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> //主角淡入淡出 <<#Wait(0.5)>> Внутренний голос: Time to go to the van. Внутренний голос: Maybe this is the end of it... <<#End>>

title: 回車上聽地窖數據結果2
body: Нин Ситу: 23? ; <> ; <> 23(c): ...No. <<#Simple(8)>> -> No what? -> No result yet? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): No evidence that they're increasing the power of flop generation. Френсис Чэн: Nothing at all? ; <> ; <> 23(c): Nothing at all. Everything fits perfectly together, above or below the counter. Нин Ситу: Are you sure? ; <> 23(c): I'm 100% positive. Нин Ситу: ... ; <> ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: What? How could it be? ; <> Нин Ситу: Show me the files, 23. ; <> 23(c): I cross-referenced every single line. There is nothing. Нин Ситу: Show me the files, all the same. ; <> 23(c): Are you suggesting I overlooked? Нин Ситу: I just want to confirm. ; <> 23(c): Normally you wouldn't ask. Нин Ситу: This is too important to afford any oversight, 23. ; <> ; <> 23(c): *Sigh* I know. Sorry. It's just... 23(c): ... 23(c): Files sent over. ; <> ; <> ; <> <> //司徒用顯示器看了一下，程芳也一起看 Френсис Чэн: They do seem right. Нин Ситу: Yeah. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: What now? Admit we made a big mistake? Лоуренс Чжан: It can't be. Both Auntie and Frances have proven Vision is selling more flops than it could generate... ; <> <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> Maybe they discovered some kind of new technology? Лоуренс Чжан: And kept it secret? Френсис Чэн: Impossible. Ms. Yeh's data shows all those extra flops are from Vision itself. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Maybe they tampered with the record of sourcing? ; <> Френсис Чэн: That... ; <> 23(c): That is a legit possibility, based on what we have. 23(c): However... <> -> Or maybe there is some kind of secret technology hidden in Silencio? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Френсис Чэн: This is too drastic to keep a technology secret. ; <> Френсис Чэн: If they did tamper with sourcing records, it can't be for proprietary technology... Нин Ситу: They're covering up evidence of crime. Френсис Чэн: I'm still in favor of our original theory. ; <> ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Френсис Чэн: ... Френсис Чэн: I still believe this data from the Cellar has been tampered with. ; <> 23(c): Impossible. This is raw data, retrieved right from the Cellar. ; <> 23(c): If this is tampered with, it means the Ops Division has never seen the actual data. 23(c): That, in turn, means Ops never managed the Cellar. The Cellar runs itself. They just play along. ; <> 23(c): Do you seriously believe that? Френсис Чэн: I do. You have no idea what Vision is capable of. ; <> ; <> ; <> 23(c): That is absur— 23(c): ... 23(c): I call it one big hoax, or money laundering scheme. ; <> Нин Ситу: 23... ; <> 23(c): Listen to me, Nin, please. 23(c): We must start over and be practical. It's very likely that our so-called "additional flops" do not exist. Нин Ситу: Unlikely. Vision provides flops for many clients. If they don't supply enough, people will find out. ; <> 23(c): It is possible. You are aware there's an arms race of flops going on among small and medium enterprises, right? ; <> 23(c): They're hoarding up flop contracts like there's no tomorrow. The idea is whoever stops first is out of the game. ; <> 23(c): They can't really use up all those flops they paid for. What if— Нин Ситу: Sunrise is one of Vision's clients, not to mention Growell and Datum. Are you suggesting they're blind, too? 23(c): Or… Or maybe they're all in this together. There's a gigantic conspiracy— ; <> Нин Ситу: Vision does not want anyone to see this data. You know how hard they tried. ; <> ; <> Нин Ситу: This isn't some ridiculously sophisticated misdirection campaign. 23(c): Then maybe— Нин Ситу: Enough, 23. ; <> 23(c): ... ; <> Нин Ситу: To verify data from the Cellar, we have two options. One, hack into the Flop Core. Нин Ситу: Two, retrieve data from other farms with abnormal flops output. 23(c): Other farms? We don't have that kind of time or resources. Нин Ситу: Yes. The Flop Core is the only viable option. ; <> 23(c): Don't tell me you want to— Нин Ситу: I know you hate it. 23(c): ...I hate it? Are you suggesting I am the problem? ; <> 23(c): You should hate it too. Infiltrating the Flop Core is a felony. Нин Ситу: ... Нин Ситу: Your choice, 23. ; <> Нин Ситу: I won't drag you into something you don't agree with. 23(c): This is so wrong in so many ways... <> Нин Ситу: I know. I've made my choice. ; <> Нин Ситу: Your turn. ; <> <> <<#End>> //尷尬的一段等待，張隆生成芳跟士傑面面相覷

title: 回車上聽地窖數據結果3
body: 23(c): ... 23(c): OK. Let's take the Flop Core. ; <> Внутренний голос: Situ looks immensely relieved. ; <> ; <> 23(c): But there's one condition. 23(c): You must not lead the operation. 23(c): I know you want to take the front line. Right? ; <> Нин Ситу: No. I can't let Lawrence and Jason take the risk. That would be— 23(c): Consider this. If you're seen, not necessarily caught... ; <> 23(c): That would alert OWL. Can we afford that? Внутренний голос: Alert OWL? I thought OWL was backing this operation...? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> What does alert OWL mean? -> I thought OWL was backing this operation? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Френсис Чэн: Wait... ; <> Внутренний голос: She interrupted me. Френсис Чэн: This investigation, it's not sanctioned by OWL? ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: What? ; <> Нин Ситу: ... 23(c): Nin, I think we should... <> Нин Ситу: I know. Нин Ситу: You're right, Frances. Sorry for keeping you in the dark. Внутренний голос: What the...? Лоуренс Чжан: No way! You're shitting me! ; <> ; <> Внутренний голос: Lawrence doesn't know, either? 23(c): Let Nin explain. <> Нин Ситу: ... ; <> Нин Ситу: This investigation is a personal project between 23 and I. OWL doesn't know about it. Френсис Чэн: That's why they assigned you to other tasks mid-operation. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: And why we don't have the budget for a second beacon... ; <> 23(c): You all noticed. <> Нин Ситу: Correct. But we have a reason to hide this operation from OWL. ; <> Нин Ситу: OWL belongs to the government, but is ultimately funded by big corporations. It's not a neutral organization. Нин Ситу: There are Vision's agents within OWL. We can't let them know about this. ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> What happens if OWL finds out? Нин Ситу: We will face administrative punishment, which is the least of our problems... -> What will Vision's agents do? 23(c): Protect Vision. 23(c): They will try to exert influence from within, to hinder our progress, if not completely halting it. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: Our boss will call a stop to this operation for sure. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Then why did you keep us in the dark? Нин Ситу: It was my idea. I didn't want to make things more complicated than they already are. -> Did you ask your boss? 23(c): No need. I just know it. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: You're in enough trouble already. I don't want to have you overwhelmed. <<#Simple(8)>> -> I see your point. // -> How are we supposed to be better off without transparency? Нин Ситу: We don't have to waste time on explaining things, and it's easier to foster trust. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Френсис Чэн: That is all in your favor. ; <> Внутренний голос: I seldom see Fran this harsh... ; <> Нин Ситу: ...You're right. Sorry. Consider me corrected. Лоуренс Чжан: It's you two against both Vision and OWL? Is that what you're saying? ; <> Нин Ситу: Kind of, although we're against a specific activity of Vision's, not the corporation itself... Лоуренс Чжан: That. Is. COOL! ; <> ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Ready to take on the whole world in order to make things right. That's what heroism is about! Нин Ситу: Don't dramatize, Lawrence. Нин Ситу: We have practical objective, which is to ensure the safety of the people in the Cellar. Лоуренс Чжан: Oh... ; <> Нин Ситу: I apologize for not making this clear sooner. ; <> Френсис Чэн: ... <<#Simple(8)>> -> Does your renegade activities affect us in any way? -> Hold on. If this is illegal, aren't we your accomplices? Нин Ситу: If the operation is compromised, you will be spared as misled/manipulated civilians. ; <> ; <> Нин Ситу: Not guilty, by reason of being uninformed. Френсис Чэн: That depends on what you tell them. ; <> ; <> 23(c): I knew this would happen... ; <> 23(c): Guys! This is exactly why we didn't want to let you know. <> Френсис Чэн: What do you mean? ; <> Внутренний голос: Fran's getting angry. ; <> <<#Simple(12)>> -> They're planning for our own good, Fran. Френсис Чэн: I know. Still... -> In case we doubt you? -> You mean we're to blame? Лоуренс Чжан: Jason... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: What 23 is trying to say is that if you don't know, you don't know. Honestly uninformed. ; <> Нин Ситу: Now that you know it, there's a whole new dimension of concerns. Френсис Чэн: ... ; <> Френсис Чэн: I see your point. Sorry for doubting you. Нин Ситу: The apology is all mine. We started it. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Now would you agree to not lead the charge, Nin? ; <> <> Нин Ситу: I... Нин Ситу: If I'm to hold back, Jason and Lawrence must infiltrate the Flop Core together. Нин Ситу: I can't have either of them acting alone. ; <> Нин Ситу: What do you say, Lawrence? Лоуренс Чжан: I say hell yeah! Been looking forward to some badass action! ; <> Нин Ситу: Jason? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I'm OK either way. Внутренний голос: Situ is looking at Fran, asking for her opinion? ; <> Френсис Чэн: As long as Jason agrees. ; <> Френсис Чэн: We don't have choices. If you go down, Ms. Situ, we all go down with you. <> -> Is it dangerous? Френсис Чэн: The risk of being identified is very high, but no physical danger. ; <> ; <> Френсис Чэн: As far as I know, the Flop Core is equipped with a sophisticated surveillance system, but no security guards. Нин Ситу: Our intel says the same. ; <> ; <> <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I'm going, then. Нин Ситу: OK. Внутренний голос: Fran seems to approve. <> -> I'm good as long as Fran gives the green light. Френсис Чэн: ... Френсис Чэн: Go then. There's no physical danger. ; <> <> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: Thank you. Нин Ситу: Now we have a direction. Next, specific strategy. ; <> Нин Ситу: Retrieving the data is simple enough. Exactly like what you did before. 23(c): Enter the Flop Core, plug in my decryption device, and call it a day. ; <> 23(c): Do you still have the thing, Lawrence? ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I do. How long does it take? ; <> 23(c): About 3 minutes, counting everything. 30 seconds to crack the encryption, then copy everything out. Лоуренс Чжан: I can see everything in plaintext after decryption? ; <> 23(c): What do you care? Just copy everything. You have all the time in the world to examine the data at home. 23(c): The copying part is automated. You just need to plug, unplug, and go. 23(c): Considering the sheer volume of the data, it will take a little while. Нин Ситу: Good. Next, let's work out an infiltration plan. ; <> Нин Ситу: The Flop Core is located on a restricted level. You need security clearance to make the Cellar elevator stop there. ; <> Нин Ситу: I'm afraid this is the only way to get in. 23(c): There's no farm staff, no permanent security guard. ; <> ; <> 23(c): As long as can get there, the rest is a breeze. 23(c): Two issues in front of us. First, how to get security clearance. Френсис Чэн: Second, an ID card to open the locked door. ; <> ; <> ; <> 23(c): You know your farm well, supervisor. <> Нин Ситу: The ID is a non-issue. We can forge one any time. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Forged by who? 23? -> Please, no more funny titles this time. Нин Ситу: Rest assured. I'm on top of the ID. ; <> Нин Ситу: I can't afford to let 23 screw around. 23(c): Hey! I have a serious face for serious occasions, too! ; <> ; <> Нин Ситу: What title do you have in mind? ; <> 23(c): Cable management engineer. Нин Ситу: ... ; <> 23(c): It's legit! There are tons of cables in the Flop Core. ; <> 23(c): Totally makes sense. <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: I suggest special inspector dispatched by the CEO. ; <> Внутренний голос: CEO? Shane Yan? Нин Ситу: Inspectors have access to all parts of the farm. Being sent by the CEO means no one dares to question you. ; <> //如果你們碰上什麼狀況，還可以利用這點應付。 <<#Simple(8)>> -> Are we both inspectors, me and Lawrence? -> Do we need rehearsing? Нин Ситу: No need. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: There is no one in the Flop Core. You don't need to perfect the act. Нин Ситу: Take the elevator to the Flop Core, open the door with the ID card, and it's done. Лоуренс Чжан: So the actual title doesn't matter? We only use the ID card as a key? Нин Ситу: Yes and no. ; <> Нин Ситу: If anything out of our plan happens, you will need to show a proper title. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: In that case, cable management engineer definitely won't work... ; <> Нин Ситу: The security clearance is a bit of an issue... ; <> <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why? // -> Can't you just hack it? The beacon is on. 23(c): Right. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): I can grant you security clearance through the beacon. ; <> 23(c): But there is one problem. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Come on, one problem is basically no problem. 23(c): The Flop Core is under maximum security. A visit by anyone, with clearance or not, triggers an alert. 23(c): I can delay this alert, but not cancel it. ; <> 23(c): You must get out before the alert goes out. 23(c): That is the only solution I have. What do you say, Nin? ; <> Нин Ситу: I say go ahead. You will have more than enough time. ; <> ; <> //IF有解開路線(選項分成有告訴徐媛跟沒告訴) <<#If($KnowTruthControlDepartment=0||$KnowTruthSelectDepartment=0)>> <> Внутренний голос: Maybe I could ask Yuna Hsu for help. Better still, she will give you a legit reason to visit. Нин Ситу: Why would she help you? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> In exchange for intel.($HaventToldEveryIntel) Нин Ситу: Intel? Внутренний голос: It is unrelated alright. -> I'll tell her the board of directors' pawns within Silencio. <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: How do you know she will buy it? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> She asked for it, and promised to return the favor. -> I have to take a leap of faith. <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Meaning you don't know what will happen... <<#Simple(8)>> -> Yeah, I don't really know. -> But I'm very optimistic about it. Well done, Jason. ; <> Нин Ситу: This could be a safer alternative. <> -> I gave her some intel before.($HaventToldEveryIntel) <<@問情報是給了啥給徐媛>> Нин Ситу: Intel? body: Лоуренс Чжан: Nin got the ID title wrong? Color me surprised. ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Yeah, she looks like the meticulous type. Лоуренс Чжан: Painstakingly. Внутренний голос: Get my life back on track, of course. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Keep working here. Лоуренс Чжан: You want to work for Vision!? -> Get my life back on track, of course. Лоуренс Чжан: Somehow I feel hurt, hearing that from you. ; <> <<#EndSimple>> //if第二日消夜有知道隆生怎麼認識司徒還有想加入鴞隊 <<#If($AskRonWhyKnowNin=0)>> Лоуренс Чжан: I told you last night, right? <<#EndIf>> Лоуренс Чжан: I'm working hard toward joining OWL! <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why would you want to do that? Лоуренс Чжан: Because they're so cool! Лоуренс Чжан: Just kidding, haha! -> Do they have open recruitment? Лоуренс Чжан: I don't know, but Nin says there are chances as long as I keep working with her. Внутренний голос: I've got a feeling that he's being used... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: OWL helped me, multiple times. I want to be one of them. Внутренний голос: Helped? Лоуренс Чжан: ... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I've done flop contribution before. My family went there and brought me along. <<#Simple(8)>> -> How long before? Лоуренс Чжан: When I was in middle school. ; <> Внутренний голос: Middle school!? <> -> Why did they bring you along? Лоуренс Чжан: Because they needed extra money, I guess. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Also, how was I supposed to survive on my own, a middle schooler? Внутренний голос: Middle school!? <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Nothing long term. I was racked up for about two weeks. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Do they take kids that young? Лоуренс Чжан: Not anymore, but back then there was no rule against it. -> Was it scary? Лоуренс Чжан: No. I don't get scared easily, even back then. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Oh, that was for another corporation, not Vision. Name's Tendril. Внутренний голос: Tendril, one of Vision's key competitors... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: The service contract said two weeks, but we didn't finish. There was an accident... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: ... Внутренний голос: He winced. Лоуренс Чжан: The accident killed both my parents and left me half dead. ; <> ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Tendril planned to let me die and be done with it. Easier to cover up. Лоуренс Чжан: Then Nin appeared, saved me and exposed Tendril's malpractice. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I owe her my life. Внутренний голос: Ah... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: ... <> <<#End>>

title: 跟隆生搭地窖電梯中2
body: //對話停止幾秒 <<#Simple(8)>> -> I'm sorry. -> I don't know what to say. Лоуренс Чжан: I-it's nothing, really! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Damn! Sorry, I didn't intend to ruin the moment! ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: My point is! Лоуренс Чжан: There are many terrible corporations like Tendril, and people can't do anything about them. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Tendril is still doing what it's been doing all along... Лоуренс Чжан: That only force that could stop them is Nin and people like her. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Are you talking about her, or OWL? Лоуренс Чжан: I did ask her that question, you know? Лоуренс Чжан: And she said... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: It's all the same. Лоуренс Чжан: You take the initiative as a person. To get things done, you need power and resources from an organization. Лоуренс Чжан: OWL provides what you need, at a cost, but generally a good deal. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> That's going a long way to say nothing. Лоуренс Чжан: It's her style, haha. -> A result-oriented view. Лоуренс Чжан: Sort of? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Anyway, that's why I want to join OWL. Лоуренс Чжан: This might sound childish, mind you... Лоуренс Чжан: But I'll do what it takes for the power to do the right thing. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Don't you want it, Jason? Лоуренс Чжан: Being an OWL agent, you can protect Ms. Cheng. ; <> Внутренний голос: ... ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I don't think it's related. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: ...Oh, I see. -> Maybe. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Right? -> She doesn't need my protection. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I mean, if only to help her... Лоуренс Чжан: ... -> You mean, I'm not protecting her now? ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: No, I don't mean that! Внутренний голос: The way I said it was too mean... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Sorry, I meant no offense. <<#Simple(8)>> -> None taken. Лоуренс Чжан: Thank you... -> That was not very nice. Лоуренс Чжан: Yeah... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: ... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: ... <<#Simple(10)>> -> Is there someone you want to protect? Лоуренс Чжан: Now? I guess...no? ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I want to do something nonetheless, if only to make the world a better place. <<#Simple(8)>> -> By "do something", you mean? Лоуренс Чжан: Hmm... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Help the disadvantaged against oppressors. Лоуренс Чжан: For example, big corps in the flop farming industry... <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> You hate flop farming that much? <<#GoTo(@恨，恨之入骨。)>> -> You think flop farming as a whole is wrong? Лоуренс Чжан: Absolutely wrong. Лоуренс Чжан: It does feed families. At the same time, it breaks more. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: It leaves people permanently scarred. I'm just one example. Лоуренс Чжан: Nin has been trying to talk me out of it... Лоуренс Чжан: But I can't. I hate flop farming and everything related to it. ; <> <<#GoTo(@不、不過當然不恨篩選組的大家啦！)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> I know the feeling. Лоуренс Чжан: Right? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> You hate flop farming? <<@恨，恨之入骨。>> Лоуренс Чжан: Nin has been trying to talk me out of it... //解鎖路線，之後跟司徒對話可以選出隆聲恨運算 Лоуренс Чжан: But I do hate flop farming as an industry with a passion. <<@不、不過當然不恨篩選組的大家啦！>> Лоуренс Чжан: That does not apply to my colleagues at Screening, though! ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I know there are good people even in the worst place. Лоуренс Чжан: However... ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> They are still facilitating evil? Лоуренс Чжан: Hm... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Probably... Внутренний голос: He's trying pretty hard not to be judgmental. <> -> There are more bad people. Лоуренс Чжан: Exactly. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Ops represents the bad side. <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> I saw plenty of good people working for Ops. Лоуренс Чжан: ... Лоуренс Чжан: Who are the bad guys, then... -> Maybe. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: ... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Phew. Let's focus on the operation. //電梯停下 Лоуренс Чжан: We're almost there. Better get this done quick. ; <> <<#End>>

title: 在運算核心遇到警衛2
body: //張龍生自己走到定點等主角，走進去看到蕭勇明走過來 Майкл Сяо: Freeze! Who are you people? Майкл Сяо: Mr. Dai...? Внутренний голос: Shit. Didn't they say there's no security officer? ; <> Внутренний голос: Worse still, he knows me. Майкл Сяо: What are you doing here? ; <> <> <<@還是得回答蕭勇明問為啥在運算核心>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I'm assisting this inspector from HQ. ; <> Майкл Сяо: Inspector!? ; <> ; <> Внутренний голос: What's wrong? He seems alerted by that title. ; <> Внутренний голос: Oh, I forgot. Situ just called in and told us the title should be engineering manager! ; <> Майкл Сяо: Is this the inspector? ; <> Внутренний голос: ...He doesn't know Lawrence. That much I can tell. ; <> Майкл Сяо: They told me... ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: No, you got my title wrong. -> I'm with him. Майкл Сяо: Sir? Your name and title? ; <> ; <> Внутренний голос: ...He doesn't know Lawrence. That much I can tell. Лоуренс Чжан: Good day, officer. ; <> -> What are you doing here?($DLStateFloat) <> Майкл Сяо: Answer me first! Внутренний голос: He's adamant... <<#GoTo(@還是得回答蕭勇明問為啥在運算核心)>> <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: I'm from HQ. Engineering manager. ; <> Внутренний голос: What's that about? Лоуренс Чжан: The regular servicing of the Flop Core is due. That's why I'm here today. Внутренний голос: Ah, right, he's playing his role... ; <> Майкл Сяо: Engineering manager? ; <> Майкл Сяо: Why are you in farm uniform? ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: You have a problem with my uniform? ; <> Майкл Сяо: N-no. I was just curious. ; <> Майкл Сяо: Because I was not informed of any visitor today. Майкл Сяо: Pardon me. I need to confirm your identity. Please come this way. ; <> ; <> <<#End>> //主角隆生自動往前走

title: 在運算核心遇到警衛3
body: Майкл Сяо: You're young for an HQ manager. Лоуренс Чжан: Ugh. The key, my friend…is bribing the right people! ; <> Майкл Сяо: Eh...? Внутренний голос: Dude that was awful... ; <> Майкл Сяо: I appreciate the humor, hahaha... ; <> Майкл Сяо: And may I know your name? Лоуренс Чжан: ...My name? ; <> ; <> ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: My name is, hmm... ; <> Внутренний голос: Shit, he didn't check the name on the fake ID. <<#Simple(8)>> -> There's no time for this. He must report back to HQ within the hour. Майкл Сяо: Sorry, Mr. Dai. I must follow procedures. -> Just show him your ID and be done with it, sir. Лоуренс Чжан: Ah, right. Here, take this. ; <> ; <> <<#GoTo(@給蕭永明看通行證)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> Майкл Сяо: Sir, your name is? Лоуренс Чжан: ...Chen, the family name. ; <> Майкл Сяо: Full name, please? Лоуренс Чжан: It's written right here on my ID! Are you blind? ; <> Майкл Сяо: Ah, thank you. ; <> <<@給蕭永明看通行證>> //給蕭永明看通行證 Майкл Сяо: Sophie Cao... ; <> Майкл Сяо: ...Um, sir? //if剛剛說姓陳 <<#If($RonCallHimselfChen=true)>> Майкл Сяо: You said the family name's Chen...? ; <> ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I said Cao. Are you deaf? Майкл Сяо: Ok...ay? ; <> Внутренний голос: Fuck me... ; <> <<#EndIf>> Майкл Сяо: Isn't the name Sophie, kind of, uh, a bit feminine? ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: ...My mom wanted a girl, and Sophie's pretty damn good name. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: She had a boy in the end, but still thought Sophie's a pretty damn good name. Got a problem, eh? Внутренний голос: That's ridiculous, man... ; <> Майкл Сяо: No! It's just...unconventional. ; <> Внутренний голос: Don't tell me that worked!? ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: I'm going in, if you've done asking. ; <> Майкл Сяо: I'm sorry, there is one more issue. ; <> Майкл Сяо: We just received orders to not let anyone into the Flop Core. Майкл Сяо: If you absolutely have to, please talk to my boss. ; <> Майкл Сяо: Since radio doesn't work on this floor, I'm afraid you'll need to take a detour upstairs. Майкл Сяо: I'm terribly sorry for this inconvenience. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Ah... <<#Simple(8)>> -> He really doesn't have time for it. -> Can't you see he already has a pass? Майкл Сяо: It's an order. I'm sorry. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Майкл Сяо: Please follow me. I will take you to the security office. Лоуренс Чжан: WHAT THE FUCK is this, idiot!? ; <> Майкл Сяо: Huh...? ; <> Внутренний голос: Is that intended for...me? <<#Simple(8)>> -> I'M SORRY, SIR! Майкл Сяо: Eh...!? -> What? Лоуренс Чжан: I'm talking to you, imbecile! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: You didn't inform the security office? Huh? Лоуренс Чжан: Now you want me to go up again? Лоуренс Чжан: How long did the ride down take me, huh!? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> I'm sorry. I didn't know they have this temporary order. Лоуренс Чжан: DIDN'T KNOW?? What is the company paying you for!? -> It takes, forever! Лоуренс Чжан: Right! Forever! Лоуренс Чжан: And! And... Внутренний голос: Come one! Keep the act going! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: I will let your boss know about this! Внутренний голос: Oh? Hsiao is freaking out a little. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: You are a dead man, you! Лоуренс Чжан: And you, security guy! Do you have any idea how I deal with dipshits like you? ; <> Майкл Сяо: ...Um, no? Лоуренс Чжан: I'll, I... Лоуренс Чжан: I'll make you, uh... Лоуренс Чжан: You've seen it! You tell him! ; <> Внутренний голос: Dude you're leaving this mess to me? <<#Simple(4)>> -> You make them kneel and kowtow! Майкл Сяо: Kneel and kowtow!? Внутренний голос: Oops, that was a terrible idea... Лоуренс Чжан: Damn right! Kowtow till you have a concussion! That's what I call proper punishment! ; <> Внутренний голос: He wants to go on!? Майкл Сяо: Th-that's... Внутренний голос: Huh? Hsiao is shaken? Hey, this could actually work. <<#GoTo(@荒謬嚇蕭永明結束呀呀)>> -> You spank them! Майкл Сяо: S-spank? Внутренний голос: Geez what am I doing... Лоуренс Чжан: Sp— No! I kick their sorry asses! ; <> Внутренний голос: Nice save! <<#GoTo(@荒謬嚇蕭永明結束呀呀)>> -> You fire them on the spot! Лоуренс Чжан: Right! That's what I do! ; <> Внутренний голос: Good. Now Hsiao is seriously freaking out. <<#GoTo(@荒謬嚇蕭永明結束呀呀)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: What? You're scared shitless? I'll tell him, them! Лоуренс Чжан: ...I make them do 1,000 pushups! ; <> Внутренний голос: ...This is getting weirder and weirder. Майкл Сяо: Corporal punishment? Майкл Сяо: 1,000 times!? Внутренний голос: Huh? Don't tell me he gets scared by that? <<@荒謬嚇蕭永明結束呀呀>> Майкл Сяо: Wait!! Майкл Сяо: Okay... ; <> Майкл Сяо: Since you have a pass, I suppose it's alright. Майкл Сяо: Please go in. Внутренний голос: Phew. That did it. ; <> Лоуренс Чжан: Dai. You wait outside. ; <> Внутренний голос: What? That's not part of the script. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Sir, you may need a hand. Лоуренс Чжан: I don't. You stay here. <<#Simple(8)>> -> You will need me. -> This is not what I was told. Лоуренс Чжан: Now I tell you to stay, you stay. Майкл Сяо: R-right! Майкл Сяо: Listen to your superior, Mr. Dai. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> OK. I'll wait here. Внутренний голос: I have to act along while Hsiao is here... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Лоуренс Чжан: Good. I'm going in, then. ; <> Майкл Сяо: Have a productive day. ; <> ; <> //張隆生進去 <<#End>>

title: 在運算核心遇到警衛4
body:
Внутренний голос: What the hell is Lawrence doing...?
Майкл Сяо: Phew. That was intense. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰)>>
Майкл Сяо: He's got some temper!
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Yeah. Thank you for not provoking him any further.
    Майкл Сяо: I didn't want to get us both fired.
    //IF有幫過蕭勇明
        //而且戴先生你之前還幫過我，再怎麼樣我也不能害到你啊！
    //
-> You're seriously afraid of him?
    Майкл Сяо: Of course! Aren't you...?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Майкл Сяо: He has a pass. Nothing could go wrong!
Внутренний голос: ...
Майкл Сяо: I'm having a really bad day. They told me to guard the door here this morning, totally out of the blue. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰低頭)>>
Внутренний голос: This morning...?
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> This is not your regular duty?
    Майкл Сяо: No.
-> What do you mean?
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Майкл Сяо: This is not part of my job. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰低頭返回)>>
Майкл Сяо: You know me, Mr. Dai! I patrol the shuttle platform.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Why the change of duty today?
    //
-> You said this assignment is out of the blue?
    Майкл Сяо: Yeah.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Майкл Сяо: I don't know what's going on... ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰低頭)>>
Майкл Сяо: My boss just sent me here, telling me to watch out of shady figures with fake ID.
Майкл Сяо: Normally we don't patrol this part of the farm. We don't have the security clearance.
Майкл Сяо: Told me to watch out for an inspector of sorts. I guess it's all false alarm. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰低頭返回)>>
Майкл Сяо: One mistake on their end, a ton of errands for me to run...
//IF一開始有說是監察員
<<#If($ToldShauRonIsSupervisor=true)>>
    Майкл Сяо: Oh, my heart skipped a bit when Mr. Cao said he's an inspector.
    Внутренний голос: Mr. Cao? Ah, he means Lawrence.
    Майкл Сяо: I was like, woah, really!?
<<#EndIf>>
Внутренний голос: Wait... ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>
Внутренний голос: Does that mean somebody informed Vision of our infiltration plan...?
//突然有逼逼聲
Майкл Сяо: Ha! ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站插腰返回)>> ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
Майкл Сяо: Time's up.
Майкл Сяо: Time for shift change. I should go now.
Внутренний голос: Great. I can finally have this place to myself.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> Sure. See you later.
    Майкл Сяо: Yes! ; <<PlayUntil(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站點頭)>>
-> Shift change? Where's the other guard? ; <<Set($AskShauNextGuardWho,true)>>
    Майкл Сяо: Oh, I don't know. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抬手)>>
    Внутренний голос: Huh?
    Майкл Сяо: The boss told me to just leave when it's time. Someone will come along to fill the gap. ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抬手返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    -> Don't you need to do the handover?
    -> Someone? You mean the next guard?
        Майкл Сяо: I have no idea.
    -> ...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Майкл Сяо: I was like, who's supposed to take over? Isn't that gonna leave a gap between shifts? ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭)>>
    Майкл Сяо: The boss told me to shut up. Don't know why such secrecy.
    Внутренний голос: ... ; <<Play(蕭勇明,MBU_蕭勇明_側站抓頭返回)>>
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
Майкл Сяо: OK. Bye.
//蕭勇明走調
<<Set($DLState,蕭勇明不守運算核心走掉)>>
Внутренний голос: The operation is messy, but generally moving forward...
Внутренний голос: Should I check on Lawrence in the Flop Core? ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭)>>
Внутренний голос: Nope. He took the ID card. I can't open the door now.
Внутренний голос: Guess I'll have to wait...
Внутренний голос: What the heck is he doing there? I need to ask him later. ; <<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭返回)>>
//if有問輪班警衛是誰
<<#If($AskShauNextGuardWho=true)>>
    Внутренний голос: And what Hsiao said before he left makes me uneasy...
<<#EndIf>>
<<#End>>

<<#EndSimple>>

<<#EndIf>>
Нин Ситу(c): I see.

Нин Ситу(c): You can grant Jason elevator access via the beacon.

Френсис Чэн: Ms. Situ brought me on. -> Oh, hey! Френсис Чэн: Hee hee. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Liking the surprise, eh? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Very much. 23(c): Smart answer, haha! -> Why are you bringing Fran here? <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: To keep her under protection. We can't leave her alone. ; <> 23(c): BTW, I'm in the driver's seat. Can't have so many people in the back. 23(c): Blame the frugal boss for not getting a bigger van. Нин Ситу: I spent most of the budget on your hardware upgrade. ; <> 23(c): I know. Can't love you enough for that! <> Внутренний голос: Wasn't Situ on a dangerous mission a while ago...? ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Didn't expect to see you so soon. -> How's the other mission of yours going? Нин Ситу: Tracking down a fugitive. Didn't take long. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Tracking down or shooting down? I heard gunshots. ; <> Нин Ситу: ... Нин Ситу: He held someone hostage. I had to take him out. Нин Ситу: Not proud of it, but this is our everyday work. -> I thought this kind of work would take a while. Нин Ситу: OWL is very efficient. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: This is not relevant, especially to you and Frances. Внутренний голос: She's forcing a change of subject. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Say, why did they assign you other missions? Нин Ситу: By which you mean? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> They know you're already knee-deep in a big one. Нин Ситу: ... Внутренний голос: ...It's like she's actively searching for an answer. <<#GoTo(@司徒解釋臨時任務)>> -> Calling you back in the middle of a dangerous mission doesn't make sense. <<@司徒解釋臨時任務>> Нин Ситу: OWL is not your average law enforcement agency. We deal with all sorts of situations. ; <> Нин Ситу: Hot swapping between multiple missions is more common than you think. Нин Ситу: We're required to maintain maximum mobility, in case of emergency. <> <<#EndSimple>> -> You're right. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: Let's finish what we came here to do. Нин Ситу: Jason, the decryption device. ; <> <>;<>;<>;<> //主角把破解器放桌上滑給司徒。 //司徒把破解器插上電腦 Нин Ситу: Do we have the data, 23? 23(c): We do. 23(c): This will take a while. <> Нин Ситу: Roger. ; <> Нин Ситу: Take your time. Нин Ситу: Now, then... ; <> Нин Ситу: How are you feeling, Jason? ; <> <> <<@司徒在主角前行工廠完問好不好>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> As good as can be. Нин Ситу: Is that so? Good. -> Bad. Нин Ситу: Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Because my life is royally screwed up. -> Because a giant corporation is after my girlfriend. Френсис Чэн: J... -> Because Lawrence is not here and I have to do two men's job. -> No particular reason. <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: I see. -> Why ask?($DLStateFloat) <> Нин Ситу: You just went through a series of infiltration activities. I need to evaluate your stress level. <<#GoTo(@司徒在主角前行工廠完問好不好)>> <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: Since yesterday, you saw Yuna Hsu twice. Внутренний голос: So 23 told her about what happened in the Cellar. Нин Ситу: What do you make of her? Внутренний голос: She's one huge walking trouble... <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I don't have any particular thought. Нин Ситу: I see. -> She's an opportunity. We can use her. Нин Ситу: I see. Внутренний голос: She likes my response. -> She's a real threat. Нин Ситу: I see. -> She's a puppet of Vision's. Нин Ситу: I see. <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: How do you feel about your infiltration tasks? Внутренний голос: I've gotta do what I've gotta do. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> It should not be my job. -> Dangerous, challenging, and thrilling? -> I've gotta do what I've gotta do. -> I'm not sure how I feel yet. <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: I see. //if有問司徒有沒有殺人 <<#If($AskIfSiTuKillPeople=true)>> Нин Ситу: And one more question. Нин Ситу: Why did you care so much about whether or not I killed the fugitive? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Curiosity. -> Did I care that much? Нин Ситу: I see. <<#GoTo(@司徒開始問殺人如何如何呀)>> -> I need to know what kind of people I'm working with. ; <> Нин Ситу: Did you find your answer with that question? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I don't care about the fugitive. Just wanted to see your response. <> Нин Ситу: To find out how I see the act of killing? Нин Ситу: ... <> -> Maybe not quite the answer I need, but it helped. <<#EndSimple>> <<@司徒開始問殺人如何如何呀>> Нин Ситу: Do you see the willingness to kill as a moral issue? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Moral issue? Нин Ситу: Sorry, let me rephrase. <<@司徒換說法問主角殺人>> Нин Ситу: Do you think killing another person is wrong? Regardless of reasons. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> No. Under some circumstances, killing is justified. Нин Ситу: Does "justified" mean "right"? <> <<@殺人對錯問問看>> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I think so. -> Maybe not right, but it's definitely not wrong. Нин Ситу: I see. -> Huh?($DLStateFloat) <> Нин Ситу: Is it right to kill another person, under the appropriate circumstance? <<#GoTo(@殺人對錯問問看)>> <<#EndSimple>> -> Yeah. Killing is wrong, no matter what reason. Нин Ситу: I see. <<#EndSimple>> -> I think killing is wrong, but that's just a personal opinion. Нин Ситу: I see. -> Probably. Нин Ситу: Let me rephrase. <<#GoTo(@司徒換說法問主角殺人)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Is this some sort of profiling or evaluation? Нин Ситу: More or less. <<#Simple(8)>> -> What for? Нин Ситу: I need to know what kind of people I'm working with. //if剛剛選過:我想了解我在跟什麼樣的人合作。 <<#If($AskIfSiTuKillPeople2=true)>> Внутренний голос: That's what I said... <<#EndIf>> Внутренний голос: Should I believe her...? -> Then I refuse to participate. Нин Ситу: You could if you want. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> How many more questions do we have? Нин Ситу: None. It's done. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: OK, enough questions. Нин Ситу: You did well, performing infiltrations without any preparation. Нин Ситу: Plus. //if找球球 <<#If($BallHelpOpenDoor=0)>> Нин Ситу: You seem to have found your own way to get into Ms. Yeh's office. <<#EndIf>> //if找到方法下地窖 <<#If($IntoCellarByStealID=0||$IntoCellarByHelpSun=0)>> Нин Ситу: And according to 23, you found ways to get elevator access, too. Нин Ситу: Very well done. <<#Simple(8)>> -> I asked for a few favors. -> Chalk it up to luck. Нин Ситу: Being aware of resources you have is a critical talent. ; <> ; <> Нин Ситу: You deserve a pat on the back and then some. Внутренний голос: Fran looks very excited... ; <> ; <> Внутренний голос: What's she getting at...? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //if兩次都躲開 <<#If($ControlOfficeHide=true&&$CellarHideCar=true)>> 23(c): And he's got good reflexes, too. ; <> ; <> <<#GoTo(@23說主角反應很快壓嘿喔)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> //if兩次都躲開 <<#If($ControlOfficeHide=true&&$CellarHideCar=true)>> 23(c): Don't remember if I told you, Nin. ; <> ; <> 23(c): He's got some great reflexes. <<@23說主角反應很快壓嘿喔>> 23(c): He dodged witnesses, twice. All on his own, while I had no visual. 23(c): You have an eye for talent, Nin. ; <> Нин Ситу: I know. ; <> <<#EndIf>> //發出警告錯誤音效 23(c): Ah... ; <> 23(c): Hey, folks, bad news. ; <> 23(c): Or maybe it's good news, depending on your perspective. 23(c): We retrieved waaaay more data than I expected. This is about a whole decade's worth. Нин Ситу: Meaning? ; <> ; <> ; <> 23(c): Meaning, first of all, my invention is awesome. 23(c): Then, it will take this crappy computer days to cross reference all records. ; <> 23(c): I can build a cluster processor with what we have. That could shorten the process to hours. 23(c): Your call, Nin. Shall we wait here till it's done crunching numbers? Нин Ситу: ... ; <> ; <> Нин Ситу: We can afford a few hours. ; <> Нин Ситу: I will ask the security officer to extend our parking permit. Френсис Чэн: Is that safe? Won't they have questions? ; <> 23(c): I showed them a visitor's pass from Vision HQ. ; <> 23(c): They won't suspect a thing. <<#Simple(6)>> -> How did you get a pass? 23(c): How else? Forged it, of course. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Френсис Чэн: Are you sure? ; <> 23(c): Chillax. These security officers have learned better. No questions asked as long as you have a pass. 23(c): I did plenty of tests with funny titles like Blackboard Technician or Plumbing Aesthetics Assessor. ; <> 23(c): As long as the pass looks legit and the barcode works, they don't care. Ha! ; <> 23(c): I mean, seriously? Who the heck even has blackboards these days? Hahaha! ; <> 23(c): Hahahahaha! //發出逼一聲。 <> Нин Ситу: I'm muting her. ; <> Френсис Чэн: Haha... ; <> Нин Ситу: Jason, go back to the farm while 23 is working on the data. Нин Ситу: Find yourself something to do, and wait for further instructions. <<#Simple(8)>> -> What about Fran? Нин Ситу: She stays here. Can't let anyone see her. ; <> Френсис Чэн: I'm taking the time to learn from Ms. Situ! ; <> Внутренний голос: Learn what? Нин Ситу: Frances is interested in our work, so I'm giving her a tour of things. ; <> Френсис Чэн: Now I know how to tail someone without getting caught! <<#Simple(8)>> -> What do you need that knowledge for? Френсис Чэн: It's cool! Френсис Чэн: You're boring, J. -> Wow, teach me when you've got time. Френсис Чэн: Sure! -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <> -> Roger. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Нин Ситу: That's it. Will let you know when we have results. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Copy that. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>>

title: 第二簽約者進來
body: Чейз Ло: Good day. Джордж Ляо: Good day, Mr. Luo. My name is George Liao. ; <> Джордж Ляо: This is Jason Dai, new employee under training. He's here to watch and observe. ; <> Внутренний голос: Don't I get a chance to speak...? ; <> Чейз Ло: Ah. ; <> Внутренний голос: Huh? He's in a whole lot better shape than the previous guy. ; <> Чейз Ло: Where's my daughter? I don't see her here. ; <> Джордж Ляо: ... ; <> Джордж Ляо: We are trying to locate her at the moment, too. Чейз Ло: Is that so... ; <> Чейз Ло: Then the payment for contributing is...? Джордж Ляо: Yes, she took it. ; <> Джордж Ляо: Because you listed her as the sole— ; <> Чейз Ло: I know what I did. ; <> Джордж Ляо: ... Джордж Ляо: Sir, I'm— ; <> Чейз Ло: Never mind. Just tell me what happens next. ; <> Джордж Ляо: You mean...? Чейз Ло: I know you don't have any power to do anything about it. Чейз Ло: Let's just complete the procedure and be done with it. ; <> Джордж Ляо: Thank you for understanding, but— ; <> Чейз Ло: It was a bet. I thought my daughter wouldn't ditch me. Чейз Ло: I was aware of possible consequences before being racked up. Чейз Ло: Well, I lost. Чейз Ло: I have a gambling addiction. It's the reason why I ended up here in the first place. ; <> Чейз Ло: A good gambler knows when to admit defeat. Чейз Ло: Come on. Where should I sign? Let's get this done and... Чейз Ло: And... And I'll go home. Чейз Ло: ... ; <> Внутренний голос: He's weeping... Чейз Ло: ... Джордж Ляо: I have a child, too, Mr. Luo. ; <> Джордж Ляо: Not my own, but close enough for me to understand how you feel. Джордж Ляо: Kids, they don't always grow up like we want them to. ; <> Джордж Ляо: But it's their life. All we could do is watch and wish them the best. ; <> Джордж Ляо: Leave the rest to fate. Чейз Ло: What are you getting at? ; <> ; <> Джордж Ляо: We take care of ourselves and leave them be. Чейз Ло: Is that supposed to make me feel better? ; <> ; <> Джордж Ляо: Making you feel better is not my job. Джордж Ляо: My job is to provide clients with actionable plans, such as subsidies. ; <> Чейз Ло: Subsidies? ; <> Внутренний голос: Not again? How much money do you have? ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> Mr. Liao? Джордж Ляо: I know what I'm doing. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Джордж Ляо: In your case, not a subsidy, per se. ; <> Джордж Ляо: Please check this offer out. You may need to provide additional biological data, but there's a good pay for it. Чейз Ло: This is... ; <> Чейз Ло: This is ridiculously generous. Vision will pay that much for my biological data?? Джордж Ляо: Yes. ; <> Чейз Ло: But don't you have it already? You monitored everything while I was racked up. Джордж Ляо: We need your permission to use this data for research and publication. Чейз Ло: Really...? ; <> 23(c): Really? F? Френсис Чэн(c): I'm not aware of any policy like that... ; <> 23(c): The old guy is inventing excuses on the fly to give away free money. Внутренний голос: ...How could he afford to do that? 23(c): Forgot to tell you. F is on the line, too. She's bored. 23(c): Watch your tongue, Jason. <> Внутренний голос: ... ; <> Чейз Ло: I, I can't find a reason to say no... //合作者碰了一下投影幕 << PlayUntil (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_開啟) >>;<< Play (簽約機械, MBU_簽約機械_點擊) >>;<> Чейз Ло: Here, signed. Now, what's the catch...? Джордж Ляо: There's no catch. Payment will arrive in a week or so. ; <> Чейз Ло: With this money, I could... ; <> Джордж Ляо: And, Mr. Luo. ; <> Джордж Ляо: We have your daughter's current contact. I will send that over, too. ; <> ; <> Джордж Ляо: She's not responding to us. But if it's you, things could be different. Чейз Ло: I can't thank you enough! I thought she was— ; <> ; <> Джордж Ляо: That concludes our session, if you have no more questions. Джордж Ляо: I have other appointments. Pardon me. Чейз Ло: Please. Don't let me hold you any longer. Джордж Ляо: Bye, Mr. Luo. Чейз Ло: Bye, and thank you. ; <> <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //羅先生起立離開 <<#End>>

body:

<<#Simple(99999)>>

<<#EndSimple>>

        -> Does the time matter?

        <<#EndSimple>>
        Джордж Ляо: ... ; <<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外低頭)>>
        Джордж Ляо: No, it's just me worrying too much.
        Джордж Ляо: That phone call was private business. Keep your nose where it belongs. ; <<Play(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外低頭返回)>>
    -> Can't I be curious?
        Джордж Ляо: You're too old for that.
        Внутренний голос: Hey, old timer...
        Джордж Ляо: That phone call was private business. Keep your nose where it belongs.
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Джордж Ляо: Now, we're all done here.
Джордж Ляо: I have work to do. See you later.
<<#Simple(8)>>
-> See you.
    //
-> That's it?
    Джордж Ляо: That's it.
-> ...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<PlayUntil(廖吉興,MBU_廖吉興_簽約側坐看外返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 慈恩突襲後23評論
body: 23(c): What's she poking around for? ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Aren't you busy working on the data? 23(c): The computer is busy working on the data. Homo sapiens know to use tools. -> I was wondering that, too. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> 23(c): Watch out for yourself, Jason. 23(c): Don't get involved in office politics. ; <> <<#Simple(8)>> -> Office politics? Between whom? 23(c): How am I supposed to know? 23(c): But I can tell it's about time to pick sides. 23(c): One bad move and they'll swallow you alive. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> What do you think I should do? 23(c): Stop lolling around. Figure out what's really going on before it's too late. 23(c): Do what Yuna Hsu is doing. Внутренний голос: Yuna Hsu, huh... -> I don't care. title: 小楊安裝發送難過對話
body: //這裡小楊是做再安裝發送走廊的小台地上 //有發現 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=true||$DidGetOffTheCar=true)>> Йейл Янг: Hey Jason, do you mind if we talk for a bit? ; <> ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I don't have the energy for this. Йейл Янг: Oh, I see. <<#GoTo(@跳楊冶平自己離開情節)>> -> Depends on what it is. Йейл Янг: I don't know what to make of Mr. Hsu going forward. <<#Simple(10)>> -> What does that have to do with me? -> Is that really important? Йейл Янг: Y-you're right... Йейл Янг: Sorry for wasting your time. <<#GoTo(@跳楊冶平自己離開情節)>> -> What do you mean? // -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Йейл Янг: He's grumpy and stubborn, but I respected him. Йейл Янг: He's a capable worker and one heck of a man, never yielding to anything he doesn't agree with. ; <> Йейл Янг: You know how terrible this place is. He is like a pillar that holds the place up. Йейл Янг: To this day, he has been my role model. I wanted to grow into something like him. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why this, all of a sudden? Йейл Янг: Sorry. Am I boring you out? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> No. I'm just curious. Йейл Янг: I don't know. I just feel... <> Йейл Янг: ...Lost? -> Sort of. We should move. Йейл Янг: Y-you're right... Йейл Янг: Sorry for wasting your time. <<#GoTo(@跳楊冶平自己離開情節)>> <<#EndSimple>> -> And now you feel betrayed. Йейл Янг: Right...? ; <> Йейл Янг: That's one way to put it... Внутренний голос: He seems surprised that I know his feeling. ; <> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Внутренний голос: Come on, I've seen this way too many times. Внутренний голос: Idolizing someone, trying so hard to grow into their shoes. Йейл Янг: It's like, I don't know what to live for anymore... Внутренний голос: When this idol crashes and burns, the whole world goes with them. Йейл Янг: What do you make of Mr. Hsu? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Rotten bastard. Forget about him. Йейл Янг: Really...? Внутренний голос: He seems disheartened... -> He's just a man, and a man makes mistakes. Йейл Янг: Do we simply forgive him when his mistake has consequences like this...? <<#Simple(8)>> -> He's still the same man. -> I see you have found your own answer. Йейл Янг: Yes... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> A selfish man, sacrificing others for his own agenda. Йейл Янг: I see... -> My opinion doesn't matter. You need to find your own answer. Йейл Янг: ... Йейл Янг: You're right... <<#EndSimple>> Йейл Янг: That's all I have to say. Sorry for wasting your time. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Yale, you're your own man. Liam Hsu has nothing to do with it. Йейл Янг: ... Йейл Янг: Thank you, Jason. -> Do you hate him? Йейл Янг: I hate what he has done, not the person... Йейл Янг: ... Йейл Янг: Or maybe they're the same thing. I don't know anymore... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> <<@跳楊冶平自己離開情節>> Йейл Янг: ... ; <> Йейл Янг: Ah, I just realized I have work to do. Йейл Янг: See you then. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. // -> Are you OK? Йейл Янг: Yeah, I am. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //小楊離開 <> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //沒發現 <<#If($LetTsaiShinStayHelp=false&&$DidGetOffTheCar=false)>> Йейл Янг: Oh hi, Jason. ; <> ; <> Йейл Янг: What's up? Внутренний голос: He looks a bit pale. <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Are you OK? Йейл Янг: I'm alright. A bit tired is all. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Why did you keep me waiting in the car? <<#GoTo(@追問冶平為啥不讓下車時間)>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> Why did you keep me waiting in the car? <<@追問冶平為啥不讓下車時間>> Йейл Янг: Ah, what? Йейл Янг: Oh, that. No particular reason. ; <> Йейл Янг: ... Йейл Янг: Say, Jason. Suppose someone in your family is a murderer, will you tell the police? Внутренний голос: That's a wild change of subject... <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I will. Йейл Янг: Why? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> Because it's the right thing to do. -> I don't want my family to live in constant fear. -> For my own conscience. -> I can't tell why but I just will. <<#EndSimple>> -> I won't. Йейл Янг: Why? ; <> <<#Simple(99999)>> -> This might sound selfish, but family is family. -> Talk him into turning himself in, maybe. I can't be a snitch. -> He must have a justified reason. -> I can't tell why but I just won't. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Йейл Янг: I see... Внутренний голос: What happened to him...? Йейл Янг: ... ; <> Йейл Янг: Sorry. That was a weird conversation. <<#EndSimple>> Йейл Янг: Ah, I just realized I have work to do. Йейл Янг: See you then. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Bye. // -> Are you OK? Йейл Янг: Yeah, I am. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> //小楊離開 <> <<#End>> <<#EndIf>>

title: 第二次陳木海搭話(地窖停車場)
body: //陳木海站在地窖停車場左邊機器旁邊，對話轉身用機器 Вуди Чэнь(c): Hello, Jason Dai. Внутренний голос: Woody Chen...!? <<#Simple(8)>> -> Woody Chen. // -> Why call me now? Вуди Чэнь(c): Your line has been busy. I've finally caught a break. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Yeah. // -> You've been calling me all this time? Вуди Чэнь(c): No, I don't need to, but that is not the point. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): Let's cut to the chase. I've made breakthrough. //if只說了故事沒說張延安名字 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaChangStory=1)>> Вуди Чэнь(c): The man you once possessed, I've established contact with him. Вуди Чэнь(c): I will meet up with him later this evening to exchange intel. <<#Simple(8)>> -> That was quick. Вуди Чэнь(c): It's not hard, as long as you have the right connections. -> Count me in. Let's go together. Вуди Чэнь(c): That is what I'm calling you about. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): After the exchange, I will decide what to share with you. Внутренний голос: Meaning there are things he won't tell me... <<#Simple(8)>> -> I need to know it all. Вуди Чэнь(c): No. Вуди Чэнь(c): You cannot be there, and I will decide what to share. <<#Simple(8)>> -> Come on, you wouldn't have found him if it weren't for me. Вуди Чэнь(c): Indeed. For that, you have earned your share of intel. Вуди Чэнь(c): However... -> Why? -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): Because you did not fully trust me. In return, I will not fully trust you. <<#Simple(8)>> -> I didn't trust you? Вуди Чэнь(c): You chose to keep the name from me, didn't you? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I really didn't know. Вуди Чэнь(c): Sorry, but I think you're lying. -> You call that distrust? Вуди Чэнь(c): Yes, by my standard. <<#EndSimple>> -> But now I trust you, totally. Вуди Чэнь(c): Fabricating trust when it's convenient to you isn't helping. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): Enough talk about that. Вуди Чэнь(c): I have my own standards, and you won't sway me. -> I see. Вуди Чэнь(c): Good. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): That's it, then. Вуди Чэнь(c): Wait for my update. <<#End>> <<#EndIf>> //if有說故事且有說張延安名字 //if有說地點 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=-2||$ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=0)>> Вуди Чэнь(c): I followed the location you provided. //if說錯 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=-2)>> Вуди Чэнь(c): It was incorrect. The wild goose chase wasted too much of my time. Вуди Чэнь(c): Don't tell me things you aren't 100% certain of. <<#Simple(6)>> -> Did you find the guy? Вуди Чэнь(c): ... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): Yes, only after mobilizing a fleet of our kin. <<#EndIf>> //if說對。 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=0)>> Вуди Чэнь(c): Your intel was good. I located him soon enough. <<#EndIf>> <<#EndIf>> Вуди Чэнь(c): Ivan Zhang, usually goes by the name of Felix Zhang. Вуди Чэнь(c): He runs a noodle restaurant for cover, and has a weapons smuggling business on the side. //if不知道地點 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=-2||$ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=-1)>> Вуди Чэнь(c): The restaurant is right on this street. Вуди Чэнь(c): I suppose you have been there. <<#EndIf>> Вуди Чэнь(c): On top of everything, he also does human trafficking, slipping outsiders into Wanpei. Вуди Чэнь(c): He is not your average civilian, but there isn't any visible connection to the Source... <<#Simple(8)>> -> What next? Вуди Чэнь(c): Next... -> I thought I told you he possessed some Source technology? Вуди Чэнь(c): ... Вуди Чэнь(c): Maybe. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): We must have a talk with him. <<#Simple(8)>> -> When? // -> We? Вуди Чэнь(c): Yes. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): This evening. Вуди Чэнь(c): We should find him in his restaurant. <<#Simple(8)>> -> I'm not sure if I'll have time. Вуди Чэнь(c): You will find time, I believe. -> OK. -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): Listen. Вуди Чэнь(c): I told you how I do things last time. Вуди Чэнь(c): I'm in touch with everybody, and make sure nobody is in direct contact with anybody. Вуди Чэнь(c): Theoretically this applies to Ivan Zhang, too, although he is not an MBU. Вуди Чэнь(c): I'm taking you with me for two reasons. Вуди Чэнь(c): First, you already know about him. //IF知到地點 <<#If($ToldWoodSeaWhereChang=0)>> Вуди Чэнь(c): And you know about his hideout, too. <<#EndIf>> Вуди Чэнь(c): I do not need to protect his privacy. Вуди Чэнь(c): Two, you gave me this lead, so you deserve to know. Вуди Чэнь(c): This is how we foster trust. Вуди Чэнь(c): Are we clear? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> All clear. Вуди Чэнь(c): Good. -> But does Ivan Zhang know we're coming? Вуди Чэнь(c): Yes. <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): He knows who we are, when we're coming, and why. Вуди Чэнь(c): There's one thing he does not know. Вуди Чэнь(c): That you are the MBU who used to control him. Вуди Чэнь(c): I don't know what you did when you were in control, but chances are he didn't like it, am I right? <> <<#If($WrongSyringe = true)>> <> <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(10)>> -> Yeah. // -> I killed one of his subordinates with his body.($DLStateFloat) Вуди Чэнь(c): ... -> ... <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): For our own good, do not let him know. Вуди Чэнь(c): Can you do that? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> No problem. Вуди Чэнь(c): Good. -> But I want him to know. Вуди Чэнь(c): What? Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> -> I want to apologize. -> He deserves to know. -> I just want to. <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): ... Вуди Чэнь(c): I respect your choice. Вуди Чэнь(c): But please make sure it happens after I'm done questioning, will you? Вуди Чэнь(c): We can't afford to compromise this. <<#Simple(999999)>> -> OK. Вуди Чэнь(c): Good. -> I can't promise anything. Вуди Чэнь(c): Then we must cancel the meeting. Вуди Чэнь(c): Let me ask you again. Вуди Чэнь(c): Can you make sure your big reveal happens after I'm done questioning? <<#Simple(999999)>> -> Okay. Вуди Чэнь(c): Good. -> Let's cancel it, then. Вуди Чэнь(c): ... Вуди Чэнь(c): If it's your choice, so be it. Вуди Чэнь(c): This conversation is over. Вуди Чэнь(c): Bye, kin. <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Вуди Чэнь(c): See you later. <<#End>>
